            (cong (О» t вҶ’ Pairв„•-mul (mkPairв„• zero (suc n)) t) (Pairв„•-mul-neg-pos (suc m) (suc k)))
            (Pairв„•-mul-neg-neg (suc n) ((suc m) *в„• (suc k)))))))
Pairв„•-mul-toPair-assoc (-suc n) (-suc m) (-suc k) =
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ Pairв„•-mul t (mkPairв„• zero (suc k))) (Pairв„•-mul-neg-neg (suc n) (suc m)))
    (trans
      (Pairв„•-mul-pos-neg ((suc n) *в„• (suc m)) (suc k))
      (trans
        (Pairв„•-ext refl (*в„•-assoc (suc n) (suc m) (suc k)))
        (sym
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ Pairв„•-mul (mkPairв„• zero (suc n)) t) (Pairв„•-mul-neg-neg (suc m) (suc k)))
            (Pairв„•-mul-neg-pos (suc n) ((suc m) *в„• (suc k)))))))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 4: Lifting to в„Ө.}
With pair-level associativity established for all canonical pairs,
lifting to в„Ө uses the \texttt{toPairв„Ө}/\texttt{fromPairв„Ө} bridge.
Commutativity follows directly from pair-level commutativity.

\begin{code}
opaque
  unfolding _*в„Ө_
  -- В§ Associativity of *в„Ө.
  *в„Ө-assoc : (x y z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө z вүЎ x *в„Ө (y *в„Ө z)
  *в„Ө-assoc x y z =
    let lhs = (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө z in
    let rhs = x *в„Ө (y *в„Ө z) in
    trans
      (sym (from-toPairв„Ө lhs))
      (trans
        (cong fromPairв„Ө
          (trans
            (trans
              (toPair-*в„Ө (x *в„Ө y) z)
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ Pairв„•-mul t (toPairв„Ө z)) (toPair-*в„Ө x y)))
            (trans
              (Pairв„•-mul-toPair-assoc x y z)
              (sym
                (trans
                  (toPair-*в„Ө x (y *в„Ө z))
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ Pairв„•-mul (toPairв„Ө x) t) (toPair-*в„Ө y z)))))))
        (from-toPairв„Ө rhs))

  -- В§ Commutativity of *в„Ө.
  *в„Ө-comm : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ x *в„Ө y вүЎ y *в„Ө x
  *в„Ө-comm x y = cong fromPairв„Ө (Pairв„•-mul-comm (toPairв„Ө x) (toPairв„Ө y))
\end{code}

\chapter{Integer Order Laws}
\label{ch:integer-order-laws}

Spectral operators send positive scalars to positive scalars and reflect the ordering: if the output is larger, the input was larger. Without these guarantees, eigenvalue comparisons would be meaningless and spectral gaps could not be bounded. Transport of $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$ along equality, antitone negation, positivity elimination, and monotone/cancellative multiplication are each forced by exhaustive sign-case analysis on the three constructors of $\mathbb{Z}$. The result is an ordered integral domain: multiplication by a positive factor preserves and reflects order, and strict inequality is preserved as well.

\section{Transport and Negation}
\label{sec:integer-order:transport-negation}

Transport of $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$ and $<_{\mathbb{Z}}$ along equalities is structurally trivial (\texttt{refl} leaves the witness unchanged), but must be stated explicitly so that later proofs can substitute equal values on either side of a comparison.
Negation reverses order: $x \le y$ implies $-y \le -x$.
The proof exhausts all nine sign-pair combinations.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Transport вүӨв„Ө along left equality.
вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ : {x y z : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүЎ y вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ y вүӨв„Ө z
вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ refl p = p

-- В§ Transport вүӨв„Ө along right equality.
вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі : {x y z : в„Ө} вҶ’ y вүЎ z вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө z
вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі refl p = p

-- В§ Transport <в„Ө along left equality.
<в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ : {x y z : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүЎ y вҶ’ x <в„Ө z вҶ’ y <в„Ө z
<в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ refl p = p

-- В§ Transport <в„Ө along right equality.
<в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі : {x y z : в„Ө} вҶ’ y вүЎ z вҶ’ x <в„Ө y вҶ’ x <в„Ө z
<в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі refl p = p

-- В§ Negation reverses order (antitone).
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ (negв„Ө y) вүӨв„Ө (negв„Ө x)
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {0в„Ө} {0в„Ө} _ = tt
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {0в„Ө} {+suc n} _ = tt
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {0в„Ө} { -suc n } ()
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {+suc m} {0в„Ө} ()
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {+suc m} {+suc n} p = p
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө {+suc m} { -suc n } ()
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө { -suc m } {0в„Ө} _ = tt
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө { -suc m } {+suc n} _ = tt
negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө { -suc m } { -suc n } p = p
\end{code}

\section{Positivity Elimination}
\label{sec:integer-order:positivity-elimination}

When a proof that $0 <_{\mathbb{Z}} z$ is in hand, the integer $z$ must inhabit the $+\!\mathrm{suc}$ constructor---the zero and negative constructors are ruled out by the ordering.
The elimination lemma and its immediate corollary ($0 < +\!\mathrm{suc}\;n$ is trivially inhabited) provide the bridge from order-theoretic hypotheses to structural pattern matching.

\begin{code}
-- В§ From 0 < z, force z into positive constructor form.
0<в„ӨвҶ’pos : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө z вҶ’ ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ z вүЎ +suc n)
0<в„ӨвҶ’pos 0в„Ө (pвүӨ , pвү°) = вҠҘ-elim (pвү° pвүӨ)
0<в„ӨвҶ’pos (+suc n) _ = n , refl
0<в„ӨвҶ’pos (-suc n) (() , _)

-- В§ 0 < +suc n is immediate.
0<в„Ө-pos : (n : в„•) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө (+suc n)
0<в„Ө-pos n = tt , (О» p вҶ’ p)
\end{code}

\section{Multiplicative Monotonicity and Cancellation}
\label{sec:integer-order:multiplicative-monotonicity-cancellation}

\paragraph{Step 1: Product of positive constructors, positive multiplication, and negative-positive product.}
These three lemmas establish the concrete form of products involving positive (and negative) integers, and that multiplying a positive integer by a positive $\mathbb{N}^+$ stays positive.

\begin{code}
opaque
  unfolding _*в„Ө_
  -- В§ Product of positive constructors stays positive.
  *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n) вүЎ +suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
  *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m n =
    let posStep : (suc m *в„• suc n) +в„• (zero *в„• zero) вүЎ suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
        posStep =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (suc m *в„• suc n) +в„• t) (*в„•-zero-left zero))
            (trans
              (+в„•-zero-right (suc m *в„• suc n))
              refl)

        negStep : (suc m *в„• zero) +в„• (zero *в„• suc n) вүЎ zero
        negStep =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• (zero *в„• suc n)) (*в„•-zero-right (suc m)))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ zero +в„• t) (*в„•-zero-left (suc n)))
              refl)
    in
    trans
      (normalizeв„Ө-cong posStep negStep)
      refl

-- В§ 0 < z В· d for z positive and d a positive natural.
0<в„Ө-mul-pos-right : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө z вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
0<в„Ө-mul-pos-right z (mkв„•вҒә k) zpos =
  let zShape = 0<в„ӨвҶ’pos z zpos
      m = fst zShape
      zвүЎ = snd zShape

      prodвүЎ : z *в„Ө (+suc k) вүЎ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)
      prodвүЎ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө (+suc k)) zвүЎ

      basePos : 0в„Ө <в„Ө ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k))
      basePos =
        <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k)) (0<в„Ө-pos (k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)))

  in
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym prodвүЎ) basePos

-- В§ Product of negative and positive constructors.
*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq : (m k : в„•) вҶ’ (-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k) вүЎ -suc (k +в„• (m *в„• suc k))
*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq m k =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-neg-left (+suc m) (+suc k))
    (trans
      (cong negв„Ө (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k))
      refl)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Multiplication by positive $\mathbb{N}^+$ preserves $\leq_{\mathbb{Z}}$.}
The 9-case proof exhausts all sign combinations.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Multiplication by positive в„•вҒә preserves вүӨв„Ө (9-case proof).
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө 0в„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) _ =
  subst
    (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨв„Ө t)
    (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc k)))
    tt
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) _ =
  let
    t = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)
    eqL : 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө *в„Ө (+suc k)
    eqL = sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc k))

    eqR : (+suc t) вүЎ ((+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    eqR = sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k)

    base : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (+suc t)
    base = tt
  in
  subst (О» r вҶ’ (0в„Ө *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө r) eqR
    (subst (О» l вҶ’ l вүӨв„Ө (+suc t)) eqL base)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө (-suc n) d ()
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (+suc m) 0в„Ө d ()
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (+suc m) (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) (sвүӨs p) =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    mulMono : (m *в„• suc k) вүӨ (n *в„• suc k)
    mulMono = вүӨ-*в„•-monoКі p (suc k)

    addMono : tвӮҒ вүӨ tвӮӮ
    addMono = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ mulMono k

    base : (+suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (+suc tвӮӮ)
    base = sвүӨs addMono
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k))
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k)) base)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (+suc m) (-suc n) d ()
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (-suc m) 0в„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) _ =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    eqL : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүЎ ((-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    eqL = sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq m k)

    eqR : 0в„Ө вүЎ (0в„Ө *в„Ө (+suc k))
    eqR = sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc k))

    base : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө 0в„Ө
    base = tt
  in
  subst (О» r вҶ’ ((-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө r) eqR
    (subst (О» l вҶ’ l вүӨв„Ө 0в„Ө) eqL base)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (-suc m) (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) _ =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)
    eqL : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүЎ ((-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    eqL = sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq m k)

    eqR : (+suc tвӮӮ) вүЎ ((+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    eqR = sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k)

    base : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (+suc tвӮӮ)
    base = tt
  in
  subst (О» r вҶ’ ((-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө r) eqR
    (subst (О» l вҶ’ l вүӨв„Ө (+suc tвӮӮ)) eqL base)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (-suc m) (-suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) (sвүӨs p) =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    mulMono : (n *в„• suc k) вүӨ (m *в„• suc k)
    mulMono = вүӨ-*в„•-monoКі p (suc k)

    addMono : tвӮӮ вүӨ tвӮҒ
    addMono = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ mulMono k

    base : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (-suc tвӮӮ)
    base = sвүӨs addMono
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq m k))
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq n k)) base)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 3: Cancellation of positive right factor.}
If $x \cdot d \leq y \cdot d$ for positive $d$, then $x \leq y$.
The proof again exhausts all 9 sign combinations.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Cancellation: if xВ·d вүӨ yВ·d for positive d, then x вүӨ y (9-case proof).
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right 0в„Ө 0в„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) p = tt
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right 0в„Ө (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p = tt
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right 0в„Ө (-suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p =
  let
    t : в„•
    t = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    rhsEq : ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ (-suc t)
    rhsEq = *в„Ө-neg-pos-eq n k

    p0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    p0 = p

    p1 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    p1 = subst (О» s вҶ’ s вүӨв„Ө ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))) (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc k)) p0

    p' : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (-suc t)
    p' = subst (О» r вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө r) rhsEq p1
  in
  вҠҘ-elim p'
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (+suc m) 0в„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) p =
  let
    t = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    lhsPos : ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ +suc t
    lhsPos = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k

    p0 : ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө (+suc k))
    p0 = p

    p1 : ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө 0в„Ө
    p1 = subst (О» r вҶ’ ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө r) (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc k)) p0

    p' : (+suc t) вүӨв„Ө 0в„Ө
    p' = subst (О» s вҶ’ s вүӨв„Ө 0в„Ө) lhsPos p1
  in
  вҠҘ-elim p'
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (+suc m) (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    lhsEq : (+suc tвӮҒ) вүЎ ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    lhsEq = sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k)

    rhsEq : (+suc tвӮӮ) вүЎ ((+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    rhsEq = sym (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k)

    step : (+suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (+suc tвӮӮ)
    step =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq)
        (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) p)

    natStep : suc tвӮҒ вүӨ suc tвӮӮ
    natStep = step

    tвӮҒвүӨtвӮӮ : tвӮҒ вүӨ tвӮӮ
    tвӮҒвүӨtвӮӮ = вүӨ-+в„•-cancelЛЎ (suc zero) tвӮҒ tвӮӮ natStep

    mulPart : (m *в„• suc k) вүӨ (n *в„• suc k)
    mulPart = вүӨ-+в„•-cancelЛЎ k (m *в„• suc k) (n *в„• suc k) tвӮҒвүӨtвӮӮ

    base : m вүӨ n
    base = вүӨ-*в„•-cancelКі-suc k mulPart
  in
  sвүӨs base
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (+suc m) (-suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p =
  let
    tвӮҒ : в„•
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)

    tвӮӮ : в„•
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    lhsPos : ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ (+suc tвӮҒ)
    lhsPos = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m k

    rhsNeg : ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ (-suc tвӮӮ)
    rhsNeg = *в„Ө-neg-pos-eq n k

    p1 : ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүӨв„Ө (-suc tвӮӮ)
    p1 = вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsNeg p

    p2 : (+suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (-suc tвӮӮ)
    p2 = subst (О» s вҶ’ s вүӨв„Ө (-suc tвӮӮ)) lhsPos p1
  in
  вҠҘ-elim p2
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (-suc m) 0в„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) p = tt
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (-suc m) (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p = tt
вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (-suc m) (-suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) p =
  let
    tвӮҒ = k +в„• (m *в„• suc k)
    tвӮӮ = k +в„• (n *в„• suc k)

    lhsEq : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүЎ ((-suc m) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    lhsEq = sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq m k)

    rhsEq : (-suc tвӮӮ) вүЎ ((-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k))
    rhsEq = sym (*в„Ө-neg-pos-eq n k)

    step : (-suc tвӮҒ) вүӨв„Ө (-suc tвӮӮ)
    step =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq)
        (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) p)

    natStep : suc tвӮӮ вүӨ suc tвӮҒ
    natStep = step

    tвӮӮвүӨtвӮҒ : tвӮӮ вүӨ tвӮҒ
    tвӮӮвүӨtвӮҒ = вүӨ-+в„•-cancelЛЎ (suc zero) tвӮӮ tвӮҒ natStep

    mulPart : (n *в„• suc k) вүӨ (m *в„• suc k)
    mulPart = вүӨ-+в„•-cancelЛЎ k (n *в„• suc k) (m *в„• suc k) tвӮӮвүӨtвӮҒ

    base : n вүӨ m
    base = вүӨ-*в„•-cancelКі-suc k mulPart
  in
  sвүӨs base
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Nonneg and Strict Factor Monotonicity.}
Nonneg and strict variants follow: nonneg right factor reduces to
positive factor plus the zero case, strict factor combines monotonicity
with cancellation.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Nonneg right factor preserves вүӨв„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right : (x y z : в„Ө) вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ (x *в„Ө z) вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө z)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right x y 0в„Ө xвүӨy _ =
  subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө 0в„Ө)) (sym (*в„Ө-zero-right x))
    (subst (О» t вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө t) (sym (*в„Ө-zero-right y)) tt)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right x y (+suc k) xвүӨy _ =
  let
    d : в„•вҒә
    d = mkв„•вҒә k

    step : (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    step = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right x y d xвүӨy

    lhs : (x *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    lhs = refl

    rhs : (y *в„Ө (+suc k)) вүЎ (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    rhs = refl
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhs) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhs) step)
вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right x y (-suc k) _ ()

-- В§ Integer squares are always nonneg: 0 вүӨ a * a.
squareв„Ө-nonneg : (a : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө a *в„Ө a
squareв„Ө-nonneg 0в„Ө =
  subst (0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө_) (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left 0в„Ө)) tt
squareв„Ө-nonneg (+suc n) =
  subst (_вүӨв„Ө ((+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc n))) (*в„Ө-zero-left (+suc n))
    (вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right 0в„Ө (+suc n) (+suc n) tt tt)
squareв„Ө-nonneg (-suc n) =
  let
    chain : (-suc n) *в„Ө (-suc n) вүЎ (+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc n)
    chain = trans
      (*в„Ө-neg-left (+suc n) (-suc n))
      (trans
        (cong negв„Ө (*в„Ө-neg-right (+suc n) (+suc n)))
        (negв„Ө-involutive ((+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc n))))
  in
  subst (0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө_) (sym chain) (squareв„Ө-nonneg (+suc n))

-- В§ Strict order preserved by positive right factor.
<в„Ө-mul-pos-right : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x <в„Ө y вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) <в„Ө (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
<в„Ө-mul-pos-right {x} {y} d (xвүӨy , yвү°x) =
  let
    lePart : (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    lePart = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right x y d xвүӨy

    notRev : (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вү°в„Ө (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    notRev ydxвүӨxdx = yвү°x (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right y x d ydxвүӨxdx)
  in
  lePart , notRev
\end{code}

\chapter{Absolute Value Laws}
\label{ch:absolute-value-laws}

The triangle inequality for the rational distance function $\mathrm{dist}_{\mathbb{Q}}$ rests on two pillars: subadditivity of the integer absolute value $|\cdot|_{\mathbb{Z}}$ and its compatibility with multiplication. Each law is forced by exhaustive sign-case analysis on the three constructors of $\mathbb{Z}$---no axiom, no choice, just pattern matching that the compiler verifies. The result is a forced norm: idempotent, nonnegative, subadditive, multiplicative, and injective at zero.

\section{Basic Properties}
\label{sec:absolute-value:basic-properties}

The absolute value $|z|$ maps each integer to its nonneg representative.
Nonnegativity of $|z|$, multiplicativity ($|z \cdot w| = |z| \cdot |w|$), the zero-test ($|z| = 0 \Rightarrow z = 0$), and compatibility with the order are the basic tools that all later distance and magnitude arguments will invoke.

\begin{code}
-- В§ abs of zero.
absв„Ө-zero : absв„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө
absв„Ө-zero = refl

-- В§ abs absorbs negation.
absв„Ө-neg : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө (negв„Ө z) вүЎ absв„Ө z
absв„Ө-neg 0в„Ө = refl
absв„Ө-neg (+suc n) = refl
absв„Ө-neg (-suc n) = refl

-- В§ abs is idempotent.
absв„Ө-idem : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө (absв„Ө z) вүЎ absв„Ө z
absв„Ө-idem 0в„Ө = refl
absв„Ө-idem (+suc n) = refl
absв„Ө-idem (-suc n) = refl

-- В§ abs is nonneg.
absв„Ө-nonneg : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө absв„Ө z
absв„Ө-nonneg 0в„Ө = tt
absв„Ө-nonneg (+suc n) = tt
absв„Ө-nonneg (-suc n) = tt

-- В§ Every integer is bounded by its absolute value.
вүӨв„Ө-absв„Ө : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ z вүӨв„Ө absв„Ө z
вүӨв„Ө-absв„Ө 0в„Ө = tt
вүӨв„Ө-absв„Ө (+suc n) = вүӨ-refl (suc n)
вүӨв„Ө-absв„Ө (-suc n) = tt

-- В§ abs zero implies zero.
absв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө z вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ z вүЎ 0в„Ө
absв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero 0в„Ө _ = refl
absв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero (+suc n) ()
absв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero (-suc n) ()
\end{code}

\section{Magnitude and Subadditivity}
\label{sec:absolute-value:magnitude-subadditivity}

The natural magnitude $\mathrm{mag}_{\mathbb{Z}}$ returns the underlying natural number regardless of sign.
The embedding $\mathrm{from}_{\mathbb{N}\mathbb{Z}}$ sends it back to $\mathbb{Z}$.
Magnitude is bounded by the input sum in the pair representation, and from this bound the subadditivity of $|{\cdot}|$ under $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$ follows.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Natural magnitude.
magв„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ в„•
magв„Ө 0в„Ө = zero
magв„Ө (+suc n) = suc n
magв„Ө (-suc n) = suc n

-- В§ Embedding в„• into в„Ө.
fromв„•в„Ө : в„• вҶ’ в„Ө
fromв„•в„Ө zero = 0в„Ө
fromв„•в„Ө (suc n) = +suc n

-- В§ abs equals fromв„•в„Ө of magnitude.
absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө z вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө z)
absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө 0в„Ө = refl
absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө (+suc n) = refl
absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө (-suc n) = refl

-- В§ Transport вүӨ along right equality.
вүӨ-resp-вүЎКі : {a b c : в„•} вҶ’ a вүӨ b вҶ’ b вүЎ c вҶ’ a вүӨ c
вүӨ-resp-вүЎКі {a} p eq = subst (О» t вҶ’ a вүӨ t) eq p

-- В§ Successor weakening.
вүӨ-weaken-sucКі : {a b : в„•} вҶ’ a вүӨ b вҶ’ a вүӨ suc b
вүӨ-weaken-sucКі {a} {b} p = вүӨ-trans p (вүӨ-step b)

-- В§ Double successor weakening.
вүӨ-weaken-sucВІКі : {a b : в„•} вҶ’ a вүӨ b вҶ’ a вүӨ suc (suc b)
вүӨ-weaken-sucВІКі p = вүӨ-weaken-sucКі (вүӨ-weaken-sucКі p)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Subadditivity Core.}
The magnitude of \texttt{normalizeв„Ө} is bounded by the input sum.
From this, subadditivity of \texttt{magв„Ө} and \texttt{absв„Ө} under $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$
follows by bridging through the pair representation.

\begin{code}
-- В§ mag of normalizeв„Ө is bounded by input sum.
magNormalizeвүӨsum : (a b : в„•) вҶ’ magв„Ө (normalizeв„Ө a b) вүӨ (a +в„• b)
magNormalizeвүӨsum zero zero = вүӨ-refl zero
magNormalizeвүӨsum (suc a) zero =
  вүӨ-resp-вүЎКі
    (вүӨ-refl (suc a))
    (sym (+в„•-zero-right (suc a)))
magNormalizeвүӨsum zero (suc b) = вүӨ-refl (suc b)
magNormalizeвүӨsum (suc a) (suc b) =
  вүӨ-resp-вүЎКі
    (вүӨ-weaken-sucВІКі (magNormalizeвүӨsum a b))
    rhs
  where
    rhs : suc (suc (a +в„• b)) вүЎ (suc a +в„• suc b)
    rhs = sym (cong suc (+в„•-suc-right a b))

-- В§ Magnitude is subadditive for +в„Ө.
magв„Ө-+в„Ө-subadd : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ magв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүӨ (magв„Ө x +в„• magв„Ө y)
magв„Ө-+в„Ө-subadd x y =
  вүӨ-resp-вүЎКі
    (magNormalizeвүӨsum (pos px +в„• pos py) (neg px +в„• neg py))
    sumReassoc
  where
    px : Pairв„•
    px = toPairв„Ө x

    py : Pairв„•
    py = toPairв„Ө y

    congвӮӮ : {A B C : Set} вҶ’ (f : A вҶ’ B вҶ’ C) вҶ’ {a a' : A} вҶ’ {b b' : B} вҶ’ a вүЎ a' вҶ’ b вүЎ b' вҶ’ f a b вүЎ f a' b'
    congвӮӮ f refl refl = refl

    pairSumMag : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (pos (toPairв„Ө z) +в„• neg (toPairв„Ө z)) вүЎ magв„Ө z
    pairSumMag 0в„Ө = refl
    pairSumMag (+suc n) = +в„•-zero-right (suc n)
    pairSumMag (-suc n) = refl

    pairSumMagPx : (pos px +в„• neg px) вүЎ magв„Ө x
    pairSumMagPx = pairSumMag x

    pairSumMagPy : (pos py +в„• neg py) вүЎ magв„Ө y
    pairSumMagPy = pairSumMag y

    sumReassoc :
      ((pos px +в„• pos py) +в„• (neg px +в„• neg py))
        вүЎ
      (magв„Ө x +в„• magв„Ө y)
    sumReassoc =
      trans
        (shuffleв„• (pos px) (pos py) (neg px) (neg py))
        (congвӮӮ _+в„•_ pairSumMagPx pairSumMagPy)

-- В§ Transport в„•-вүӨ into вүӨв„Ө for nonneg integers.
fromв„•в„Ө-mono : {m n : в„•} вҶ’ m вүӨ n вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө m вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n
fromв„•в„Ө-mono {zero} {zero} _ = tt
fromв„•в„Ө-mono {zero} {suc n} _ = tt
fromв„•в„Ө-mono {suc m} {zero} ()
fromв„•в„Ө-mono {suc m} {suc n} p = p

-- В§ fromв„•в„Ө is additive.
fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө m +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (m +в„• n)
fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө zero zero = refl
fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө zero (suc n) = refl
fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө (suc m) zero = refl
fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө (suc m) (suc n) = refl

-- В§ abs is subadditive on в„Ө (triangle core).
absв„Ө-subadd : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүӨв„Ө (absв„Ө x +в„Ө absв„Ө y)
absв„Ө-subadd x y =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) stepвӮҒ)
  where
    stepвӮҒ : fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө (x +в„Ө y)) вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө x +в„• magв„Ө y)
    stepвӮҒ = fromв„•в„Ө-mono (magв„Ө-+в„Ө-subadd x y)

    lhsEq : absв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө (x +в„Ө y))
    lhsEq = absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө (x +в„Ө y)

    rhsEq : absв„Ө x +в„Ө absв„Ө y вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө x +в„• magв„Ө y)
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө absв„Ө y) (absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө x))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө (magв„Ө x) +в„Ө t) (absв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-magв„Ө y))
          (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө (magв„Ө x) (magв„Ө y)))
\end{code}

\section{Multiplicative Compatibility}
\label{sec:absolute-value:multiplicative-compatibility}

Absolute value must commute with multiplication by a positive right factor: $|z \cdot d| = |z| \cdot d$ for $d > 0$.
The proof splits by the sign of $z$ and applies the canonical product forms established in the preceding chapter.
Full multiplicativity $|x \cdot y| = |x| \cdot |y|$ then follows by exhaustive sign-case analysis.

\begin{code}
-- В§ abs commutes with multiplication by positive в„•вҒә.
absв„Ө-mul-pos-right : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ absв„Ө (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ (absв„Ө z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
absв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө d =
  trans
    (cong absв„Ө (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
    (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
absв„Ө-mul-pos-right (+suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) =
  let mulPosForm : (+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k) вүЎ +suc (k +в„• (n *в„• suc k))
      mulPosForm = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k
  in
  trans
    (trans (cong absв„Ө mulPosForm) refl)
    (sym mulPosForm)

absв„Ө-mul-pos-right (-suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) =
  let mulNegForm : (-suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k) вүЎ -suc (k +в„• (n *в„• suc k))
      mulNegForm = *в„Ө-neg-pos-eq n k
      mulPosForm : (+suc n) *в„Ө (+suc k) вүЎ +suc (k +в„• (n *в„• suc k))
      mulPosForm = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k
  in
  trans
    (trans (cong absв„Ө mulNegForm) refl)
    (sym mulPosForm)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Full Multiplicativity.}
The full multiplicativity proof $|x \cdot y| = |x| \cdot |y|$ follows by
exhaustive sign-case analysis. Each case reduces to the positive product
lemma \texttt{*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq} combined with negation absorption.

\begin{code}
-- В§ abs is fully multiplicative.
absв„Ө-mul : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ absв„Ө (x *в„Ө y) вүЎ (absв„Ө x *в„Ө absв„Ө y)
absв„Ө-mul 0в„Ө y =
  let
    lhs : absв„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө y) вүЎ absв„Ө 0в„Ө
    lhs = cong absв„Ө (*в„Ө-zero-left y)

    rhs : (absв„Ө 0в„Ө *в„Ө absв„Ө y) вүЎ absв„Ө 0в„Ө
    rhs = *в„Ө-zero-left (absв„Ө y)
  in
  trans lhs (sym rhs)
absв„Ө-mul x 0в„Ө =
  let
    lhs : absв„Ө (x *в„Ө 0в„Ө) вүЎ absв„Ө 0в„Ө
    lhs = cong absв„Ө (*в„Ө-zero-right x)

    rhs : (absв„Ө x *в„Ө absв„Ө 0в„Ө) вүЎ absв„Ө 0в„Ө
    rhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ absв„Ө x *в„Ө t) absв„Ө-zero)
        (*в„Ө-zero-right (absв„Ө x))
  in
  trans lhs (sym rhs)
absв„Ө-mul (+suc m) (+suc n) =
  let
    prodEq : (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n) вүЎ +suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
    prodEq = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m n
  in
  trans (cong absв„Ө prodEq) (sym prodEq)
absв„Ө-mul (+suc m) (-suc n) =
  let
    prodEq : (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n) вүЎ +suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
    prodEq = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m n

    absProd : absв„Ө ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)) вүЎ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)
    absProd = trans (cong absв„Ө prodEq) (sym prodEq)
  in
  trans
    (cong absв„Ө (*в„Ө-neg-right (+suc m) (+suc n)))
    (trans (absв„Ө-neg ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n))) absProd)
absв„Ө-mul (-suc m) (+suc n) =
  let
    prodEq : (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n) вүЎ +suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
    prodEq = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m n

    absProd : absв„Ө ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)) вүЎ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)
    absProd = trans (cong absв„Ө prodEq) (sym prodEq)
  in
  trans
    (cong absв„Ө (*в„Ө-neg-left (+suc m) (+suc n)))
    (trans (absв„Ө-neg ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n))) absProd)
absв„Ө-mul (-suc m) (-suc n) =
  let
    mulEq : (-suc m) *в„Ө (-suc n) вүЎ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)
    mulEq =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-neg-right (negв„Ө (+suc m)) (+suc n))
        (trans
          (cong negв„Ө (*в„Ө-neg-left (+suc m) (+suc n)))
          (negв„Ө-involutive ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n))))

    prodEq : (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n) вүЎ +suc (n +в„• (m *в„• suc n))
    prodEq = *в„Ө-pos-pos-eq m n

    absProd : absв„Ө ((+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)) вүЎ (+suc m) *в„Ө (+suc n)
    absProd = trans (cong absв„Ө prodEq) (sym prodEq)
  in
  trans (cong absв„Ө mulEq) absProd

-- В§ If -b вүӨ a вүӨ b then |a| вүӨ b.
absв„Ө-within-bound : (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ (negв„Ө b) вүӨв„Ө a вҶ’ a вүӨв„Ө b вҶ’ absв„Ө a вүӨв„Ө b
absв„Ө-within-bound 0в„Ө 0в„Ө _ _ = tt
absв„Ө-within-bound 0в„Ө (+suc n) _ _ = tt
absв„Ө-within-bound 0в„Ө (-suc n) _ neg-bound = neg-bound
absв„Ө-within-bound (+suc a) b _ upper = upper
absв„Ө-within-bound (-suc a) b lower _ =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (negв„Ө-involutive b) (negв„Ө-antitone-вүӨв„Ө lower)
\end{code}

\chapter{Additive Monotonicity and Positive Natural Laws}
\label{ch:additive-monotonicity-positive-naturals}

The rational order infrastructure demands two ingredients that have not yet been established: general additive monotonicity for $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$, and the fact that the embedding of $\mathbb{N}^+$ into $\mathbb{Z}$ respects multiplication. Additive monotonicity is reduced, via the normalize/cross bridge, from $\mathbb{Z}$-order statements to $\mathbb{N}$-level cross-sum inequalities where the inductive structure does the work. The $\mathbb{N}^+$ laws then follow directly from their $\mathbb{N}$ counterparts. Together these close the last gaps: $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$ is monotone in both arguments, cancellative on the right, and the $\mathbb{N}^+$ multiplication homomorphism into $(\mathbb{Z}, *_{\mathbb{Z}})$ is exact.

\section{Nonneg Monotonicity Bridge}
\label{sec:additive-monotonicity:nonneg-bridge}

The nonneg fragment of $\mathbb{Z}$ inherits the monotonicity of $\mathbb{N}$ addition through $\mathrm{from}_{\mathbb{N}\mathbb{Z}}$.
Left and right monotonicity, nonneg $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$ monotonicity, reflection of $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$ back to $\mathbb{N}$, and the nonnegativity elimination lemma are assembled here as the bridge between $\mathbb{N}$ arithmetic and $\mathbb{Z}$ order.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Nonneg left monotonicity via fromв„•в„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoЛЎ : {a b : в„•} вҶ’ a вүӨ b вҶ’ (c : в„•) вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• a) вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• b)
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoЛЎ p c = fromв„•в„Ө-mono (вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ p c)

-- В§ Nonneg right monotonicity via fromв„•в„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoКі : {a b : в„•} вҶ’ a вүӨ b вҶ’ (c : в„•) вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө (a +в„• c) вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө (b +в„• c)
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoКі {a} {b} p c =
  let
    lhs : fromв„•в„Ө (a +в„• c) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• a)
    lhs = cong fromв„•в„Ө (+в„•-comm a c)

    rhs : fromв„•в„Ө (b +в„• c) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• b)
    rhs = cong fromв„•в„Ө (+в„•-comm b c)

    base : fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• a) вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө (c +в„• b)
    base = вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoЛЎ p c
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhs) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhs) base)

-- В§ Nonneg +в„Ө right monotonicity.
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі-nonneg : {m n : в„•} вҶ’ m вүӨ n вҶ’ (k : в„•) вҶ’ (fromв„•в„Ө m +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө k) вүӨв„Ө (fromв„•в„Ө n +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө k)
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі-nonneg {m} {n} p k =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө m k))
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө n k))
      (вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-+в„•-monoКі p k))

-- В§ Reflect вүӨв„Ө back to в„•-вүӨ for nonneg integers.
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect : {m n : в„•} вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө m вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n вҶ’ m вүӨ n
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect {zero} {zero} _ = zвүӨn
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect {zero} {suc n} _ = zвүӨn
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect {suc m} {zero} ()
вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect {suc m} {suc n} p = p

-- В§ Nonnegativity forces fromв„•в„Ө form.
0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ z вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө n)
0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө 0в„Ө _ = zero , refl
0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө (+suc n) _ = suc n , refl
0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө (-suc n) ()

-- В§ Both-slot nonneg monotonicity.
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-mono-nonnegвӮӮ : {m m' n n' : в„•} вҶ’ m вүӨ m' вҶ’ n вүӨ n' вҶ’
  (fromв„•в„Ө m +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n) вүӨв„Ө (fromв„•в„Ө m' +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n')
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-mono-nonnegвӮӮ {m} {m'} {n} {n'} mвүӨm' nвүӨn' =
  let
    stepвӮҒ : (fromв„•в„Ө m +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n) вүӨв„Ө (fromв„•в„Ө m' +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n)
    stepвӮҒ = вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі-nonneg mвүӨm' n

    stepвӮӮ : (fromв„•в„Ө m' +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n) вүӨв„Ө (fromв„•в„Ө m' +в„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n')
    stepвӮӮ =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (+в„Ө-comm (fromв„•в„Ө n) (fromв„•в„Ө m'))
        (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (+в„Ө-comm (fromв„•в„Ө n') (fromв„•в„Ө m'))
          (вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі-nonneg nвүӨn' m'))
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-trans stepвӮҒ stepвӮӮ
\end{code}

\section{Normalize--Cross Bridge}
\label{sec:additive-monotonicity:normalize-cross-bridge}

The order on $\mathbb{Z}$ (defined via \texttt{normalizeв„Ө}) reduces to a cross-sum
inequality on~$\mathbb{N}$:\linebreak $\texttt{normalizeв„Ө}\;a\;b \leq_{\mathbb{Z}}
\texttt{normalizeв„Ө}\;c\;d$ if and only if $a + d \leq c + b$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Forward: normalize order implies cross-sum inequality.
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross : (a b c d : в„•) вҶ’ normalizeв„Ө a b вүӨв„Ө normalizeв„Ө c d вҶ’ (a +в„• d) вүӨ (c +в„• b)
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross (suc a) (suc b) c d p =
  let ih : (a +в„• d) вүӨ (c +в„• b)
      ih = normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross a b c d p

      lifted : (suc (a +в„• d)) вүӨ (suc (c +в„• b))
      lifted = sвүӨs ih

      rhsEq : (c +в„• suc b) вүЎ suc (c +в„• b)
      rhsEq = +в„•-suc-right c b
  in
  subst (О» t вҶ’ (suc a +в„• d) вүӨ t) (sym rhsEq) lifted
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross a b (suc c) (suc d) p =
  let ih : (a +в„• d) вүӨ (c +в„• b)
      ih = normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross a b c d p

      lifted : (suc (a +в„• d)) вүӨ (suc (c +в„• b))
      lifted = sвүӨs ih

      lhsEq : (a +в„• suc d) вүЎ suc (a +в„• d)
      lhsEq = +в„•-suc-right a d
  in
  subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (suc c +в„• b)) (sym lhsEq) lifted

normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero zero zero zero _ = zвүӨn
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero zero (suc c) zero _ = zвүӨn
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero zero zero (suc d) ()
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross (suc a) zero zero zero ()
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross (suc a) zero (suc c) zero p =
  let
    lhsEq : (suc a +в„• zero) вүЎ suc a
    lhsEq = cong suc (+в„•-zero-right a)

    rhsEq : (suc c +в„• zero) вүЎ suc c
    rhsEq = cong suc (+в„•-zero-right c)
  in
  subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (suc c +в„• zero)) (sym lhsEq)
    (subst (О» t вҶ’ (suc a) вүӨ t) (sym rhsEq) p)
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross (suc a) zero zero (suc d) ()
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero (suc b) zero zero _ = zвүӨn
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero (suc b) (suc c) zero _ = zвүӨn
normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross zero (suc b) zero (suc d) p = p

-- В§ Backward: cross-sum inequality implies normalize order.
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ : (a b c d : в„•) вҶ’ (a +в„• d) вүӨ (c +в„• b) вҶ’ normalizeв„Ө a b вүӨв„Ө normalizeв„Ө c d
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ (suc a) (suc b) c d p with subst (О» t вҶ’ (suc a +в„• d) вүӨ t) (+в„•-suc-right c b) p
... | sвүӨs q = crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ a b c d q
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ a b (suc c) (suc d) p with subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (suc c +в„• b)) (+в„•-suc-right a d) p
... | sвүӨs q = crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ a b c d q

crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero zero zero zero _ = tt
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero zero (suc c) zero _ = tt
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero zero zero (suc d) ()
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ (suc a) zero zero zero ()
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ (suc a) zero (suc c) zero p =
  let
    lhsEq : (suc a +в„• zero) вүЎ suc a
    lhsEq = cong suc (+в„•-zero-right a)

    rhsEq : (suc c +в„• zero) вүЎ suc c
    rhsEq = cong suc (+в„•-zero-right c)

    p' : (suc a) вүӨ (suc c)
    p' =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (suc c)) lhsEq
        (subst (О» t вҶ’ (suc a +в„• zero) вүӨ t) rhsEq p)
  in
  p'
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ (suc a) zero zero (suc d) ()
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero (suc b) zero zero _ = tt
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero (suc b) (suc c) zero _ = tt
crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ zero (suc b) zero (suc d) p = p
\end{code}

\section{General Additive Monotonicity}
\label{sec:additive-monotonicity:general-additive-monotonicity}

Right, left, and both-slot monotonicity of $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$, together with right additive cancellation, extend the nonneg bridge to all of $\mathbb{Z}$.
The proofs normalize both sides through the cross-sum bridge and apply $\mathbb{N}$-level monotonicity.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Right monotonicity of +в„Ө (general).
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x +в„Ө z) вүӨв„Ө (y +в„Ө z)
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі {x} {y} xвүӨy z =
  let
    px = toPairв„Ө x
    py = toPairв„Ө y
    pz = toPairв„Ө z

    ax = pos px
    bx = neg px
    ay = pos py
    by = neg py
    az = pos pz
    bz = neg pz

    xвүӨy' : normalizeв„Ө ax bx вүӨв„Ө normalizeв„Ө ay by
    xвүӨy' =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (from-toPairв„Ө y))
        (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (from-toPairв„Ө x)) xвүӨy)

    crossXY : (ax +в„• by) вүӨ (ay +в„• bx)
    crossXY = normalizeвүӨвҶ’cross ax bx ay by xвүӨy'

    k : в„•
    k = az +в„• bz

    base : (k +в„• (ax +в„• by)) вүӨ (k +в„• (ay +в„• bx))
    base = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ crossXY k

    lhsEq : ((ax +в„• az) +в„• (by +в„• bz)) вүЎ (k +в„• (ax +в„• by))
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (shuffleв„• ax az by bz)
        (+в„•-comm (ax +в„• by) k)

    rhsEq : ((ay +в„• az) +в„• (bx +в„• bz)) вүЎ (k +в„• (ay +в„• bx))
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (shuffleв„• ay az bx bz)
        (+в„•-comm (ay +в„• bx) k)

    sumCross : ((ax +в„• az) +в„• (by +в„• bz)) вүӨ ((ay +в„• az) +в„• (bx +в„• bz))
    sumCross =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ ((ay +в„• az) +в„• (bx +в„• bz))) (sym lhsEq)
        (subst (О» t вҶ’ (k +в„• (ax +в„• by)) вүӨ t) (sym rhsEq) base)
  in
  crossвҶ’normalizeвүӨ (ax +в„• az) (bx +в„• bz) (ay +в„• az) (by +в„• bz) sumCross

-- В§ Left monotonicity of +в„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoЛЎ : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (z +в„Ө x) вүӨв„Ө (z +в„Ө y)
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoЛЎ {x} {y} xвүӨy z =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (+в„Ө-comm x z)
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (+в„Ө-comm y z)
      (вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі xвүӨy z))

-- В§ Both-slot monotonicity of +в„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-mono : {x y u v : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ u вүӨв„Ө v вҶ’ (x +в„Ө u) вүӨв„Ө (y +в„Ө v)
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-mono {x} {y} {u} {v} xвүӨy uвүӨv =
  вүӨв„Ө-trans (вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі xвүӨy u) (вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoЛЎ uвүӨv y)

-- В§ Right additive cancellation for вүӨв„Ө.
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-cancelКі : (x y z : в„Ө) вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө (z +в„Ө y) вҶ’ (x +в„Ө negв„Ө y) вүӨв„Ө z
вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-cancelКі x y z p =
  let
    step : (x +в„Ө negв„Ө y) вүӨв„Ө ((z +в„Ө y) +в„Ө negв„Ө y)
    step = вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-monoКі p (negв„Ө y)

    rhsEq : ((z +в„Ө y) +в„Ө negв„Ө y) вүЎ z
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (+в„Ө-assoc z y (negв„Ө y))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ z +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-right y))
          (+в„Ө-zero-right z))
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsEq step
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: в„•вҒә Multiplication Homomorphism.}
\texttt{fromв„•в„Ө} is a multiplicative homomorphism for в„•вҒә,
and positive integers satisfy $1 < 2z$---the key lemma for
half-line arguments in the rational order.

\begin{code}
-- В§ fromв„•в„Ө is multiplicative for в„•вҒә.
fromв„•в„Ө-mul-вҒә : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (fromв„•в„Ө n *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (n *в„• вҒәtoв„• d)
fromв„•в„Ө-mul-вҒә zero d =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
    (cong fromв„•в„Ө (sym (*в„•-zero-left (вҒәtoв„• d))))
fromв„•в„Ө-mul-вҒә (suc n) (mkв„•вҒә k) =
  let
    natForm : (suc n *в„• suc k) вүЎ suc (k +в„• (n *в„• suc k))
    natForm = refl

    rhs : fromв„•в„Ө (suc n *в„• suc k) вүЎ +suc (k +в„• (n *в„• suc k))
    rhs = cong fromв„•в„Ө natForm
  in
  trans
    (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq n k)
    (sym rhs)

-- В§ 1 < 2z for z positive.
oneв„Ө<twoTimes-pos : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө z вҶ’ oneв„Ө <в„Ө (z +в„Ө z)
oneв„Ө<twoTimes-pos z zpos with 0<в„ӨвҶ’pos z zpos
... | (m , zвүЎ) =
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) (sym zвүЎ)) (lePart , notRev)
  where
    twoTimes : (+suc m) +в„Ө (+suc m) вүЎ +suc (m +в„• suc m)
    twoTimes =
      trans
        (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө (suc m) (suc m))
        (cong fromв„•в„Ө refl)

    lePart : oneв„Ө вүӨв„Ө ((+suc m) +в„Ө (+suc m))
    lePart =
      let
        lePos : oneв„Ө вүӨв„Ө (+suc (m +в„• suc m))
        lePos = sвүӨs zвүӨn
      in
        subst (О» t вҶ’ oneв„Ө вүӨв„Ө t) (sym twoTimes) lePos

    no-sucвүӨzero : {t : в„•} вҶ’ suc t вүӨ zero вҶ’ вҠҘ
    no-sucвүӨzero ()

    impossible : (+suc (m +в„• suc m)) вүӨв„Ө oneв„Ө вҶ’ вҠҘ
    impossible (sвүӨs pNat) =
      let
        pNat' : suc (m +в„• m) вүӨ zero
        pNat' = subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ zero) (+в„•-suc-right m m) pNat
      in
      no-sucвүӨzero pNat'

    notRev : ((+suc m) +в„Ө (+suc m)) вү°в„Ө oneв„Ө
    notRev q = impossible (subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨв„Ө oneв„Ө) twoTimes q)
\end{code}

\section{Laws of \texorpdfstring{$\mathbb{N}^+$}{N+}}
\label{sec:positive-naturals:laws}

Commutativity of $\mathbb{N}^+$ multiplication and its homomorphism into $\mathbb{Z}$ are forced by the underlying $\mathbb{N}$ laws.
These two lemmas close the positive-denominator arithmetic needed for rational cross-multiplication.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Commutativity of в„•вҒә multiplication.
*вҒә-comm : (x y : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *вҒә y вүЎ y *вҒә x
*вҒә-comm (mkв„•вҒә a) (mkв„•вҒә b) =
  cong mkв„•вҒә (trans lhsNorm (sym rhsNorm))
  where
    lhsNorm : (a *в„• suc b) +в„• b вүЎ (a +в„• b) +в„• (a *в„• b)
    lhsNorm =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• b) (*в„•-suc-right-+в„• a b))
        (trans
          (+в„•-assoc a (a *в„• b) b)
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„• t) (+в„•-comm (a *в„• b) b))
            (sym (+в„•-assoc a b (a *в„• b)))))

    rhsNorm : (b *в„• suc a) +в„• a вүЎ (a +в„• b) +в„• (a *в„• b)
    rhsNorm =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• a) (*в„•-suc-right-+в„• b a))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (b +в„• t) +в„• a) (*в„•-comm b a))
          (trans
            (+в„•-assoc b (a *в„• b) a)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ b +в„• t) (+в„•-comm (a *в„• b) a))
              (trans
                (swapHeadв„• b a (a *в„• b))
                (sym (+в„•-assoc a b (a *в„• b)))))))

-- В§ вҒәtoв„Ө is a multiplicative homomorphism.
вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә : (x y : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ вҒәtoв„Ө (x *вҒә y) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө x) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө y)
вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә (mkв„•вҒә a) (mkв„•вҒә b) =
  sym
    (trans
      (*в„Ө-pos-pos-eq a b)
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ +suc t) (+в„•-comm b (a *в„• suc b))))
\end{code}

Integer arithmetic is rigid enough to support genuine spectral calculation. The K$_4$ neighbourhood structure, the Laplacian, simplex invariants, multiplication laws, and order laws are all forced into place. The graph is not merely a topological survivor; it is an operator-bearing object.

Spectral ratios force quotient arithmetic: the integer combinatorics extends into the rational domain.

\chapter{Rational Numbers and Measurement}
\label{ch:rational-numbers-measurement}

Eigenvalue quotients from the K$_4$ spectral analysis---ratios of integers that are not themselves integers---demand a quotient field. $\mathbb{Q}$ is defined as the forced quotient $\mathbb{Z}/\mathbb{N}^+$: an integer numerator over a positive denominator, with equality given by the cross-multiplication setoid $a \cdot d = c \cdot b$. Distance is the absolute difference of two rationals, and measurement acts on Distinctions are classified as K$_4$-maps into the two-element carrier. The simplex evaluation $\mathcal{C} = 137$ emerges as a forced combinatorial invariant of the graph, not a fitted parameter.

\section{Rational Arithmetic}
\label{sec:rational-measurement:rational-arithmetic}

A rational number is an integer numerator over a positive denominator.
Equality is the cross-multiplication setoid $a \cdot d = c \cdot b$, addition and multiplication lift through the common-denominator product, and distance is the absolute difference of the cross-products.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Rational number: integer numerator over positive denominator.
record в„ҡ : Set where
  constructor _/_
  field
    num : в„Ө
    den : в„•вҒә

open в„ҡ public

infix 4 _вүғв„ҡ_

-- В§ Setoid equality: cross-multiplication.
_вүғв„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ Set
(a / b) вүғв„ҡ (c / d) = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

infixl 6 _+в„ҡ_ _-в„ҡ_
infixl 7 _*в„ҡ_

-- В§ Rational addition.
_+в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
(a / b) +в„ҡ (c / d) = ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) / (b *вҒә d)

-- В§ Rational multiplication.
_*в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
(a / b) *в„ҡ (c / d) = (a *в„Ө c) / (b *вҒә d)

-- В§ Rational negation.
-в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
-в„ҡ (a / b) = negв„Ө a / b

-- В§ Rational subtraction.
_-в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
p -в„ҡ q = p +в„ҡ (-в„ҡ q)

-- В§ Distinguished rationals.
0в„ҡ 1в„ҡ : в„ҡ
0в„ҡ = 0в„Ө / oneвҒә
1в„ҡ = oneв„Ө / oneвҒә

infix 4 _вүӨв„ҡ_ _<в„ҡ_

-- В§ Rational order: cross-multiply and compare integers.
_вүӨв„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ Set
(a / b) вүӨв„ҡ (c / d) = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

-- В§ Strict rational order.
_<в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ Set
(a / b) <в„ҡ (c / d) = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) <в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

-- В§ Rational distance.
distв„ҡ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
distв„ҡ (a / b) (c / d) = absв„Ө ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) / (b *вҒә d)
\end{code}

\section{Simplex Evaluation: \texorpdfstring{$\mathcal{C} = 137$}{\textit{C} = 137}}
\label{sec:rational-measurement:simplex-eval-137}

The K$_4$ simplex invariants from the preceding chapter combine via the forced
arithmetic to yield the integer 137.  The canonicity of this particular
combination is not deferred: it is proved here by exhaustive classification
of all degree-$\le 3$ expressions in the invariant basis $\{V, E, d, \chi\}$.
No other formula of this form yields a prime.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Natural exponentiation.
_^_ : в„• вҶ’ в„• вҶ’ в„•
x ^ zero = suc zero
x ^ suc n = x * (x ^ n)

-- В§ Simplex evaluation from KвӮ„ invariants.
simplex-eval : в„•
simplex-eval = (simplex-vertices ^ simplex-degree) * simplex-chi + (simplex-degree * simplex-degree)

-- В§ Law 15A.0: the derived integer is exactly 137.
law15A-0-simplex-eval-137 : simplex-eval вүЎ 137
law15A-0-simplex-eval-137 = refl

-- В§ Redundant witness (same computation, explicit name).
derived-integer : в„•
derived-integer =
  (simplex-vertices ^ simplex-degree) * simplex-chi
  + (simplex-degree * simplex-degree)

law15A-0-derived-integer-137 : derived-integer вүЎ 137
law15A-0-derived-integer-137 = refl
\end{code}

\subsection{Exhaustive Classification: No Alternative Yields 137}
\label{sec:simplex-eval-exhaustion}

The formula $V^d \cdot \chi + d^2 = 137$ is not chosen from a menu of
equivalent alternatives.  Every other degree-$\le 3$ combination of
the invariants $\{V, E, d, \chi\}$ misses 137 by a computable margin.
The compiler verifies each failure by absurd pattern match: the
candidate evaluates to a natural number that is definitionally unequal
to 137, so the equality type is empty and the negation holds by
\texttt{$\lambda\,()$}.

\paragraph{Pair-product sums.}
All products of pairs from $\{V, E, d, \chi\}$ are formed, and all
pairwise sums of these products are tested.  None equals 137:

\begin{code}
-- В§ Products of pairs of KвӮ„ invariants
p-VV p-VE p-Vd p-VПҮ p-EE p-Ed p-EПҮ p-dd p-dПҮ p-ПҮПҮ : в„•
p-VV = simplex-vertices * simplex-vertices       -- 16
p-VE = simplex-vertices * simplex-edges           -- 24
p-Vd = simplex-vertices * simplex-degree          -- 12
p-VПҮ = simplex-vertices * simplex-chi             -- 8
p-EE = simplex-edges * simplex-edges               -- 36
p-Ed = simplex-edges * simplex-degree              -- 18
p-EПҮ = simplex-edges * simplex-chi                 -- 12
p-dd = simplex-degree * simplex-degree             -- 9
p-dПҮ = simplex-degree * simplex-chi                -- 6
p-ПҮПҮ = simplex-chi * simplex-chi                   -- 4

-- В§ No pair-sum of KвӮ„ products gives 137.
record NoPairSumGives137 : Set where
  field
    t-VV+VE : В¬ (p-VV + p-VE вүЎ 137)   -- 40
    t-VV+EE : В¬ (p-VV + p-EE вүЎ 137)   -- 52
    t-VV+Ed : В¬ (p-VV + p-Ed вүЎ 137)   -- 34
    t-VE+EE : В¬ (p-VE + p-EE вүЎ 137)   -- 60
    t-VE+Ed : В¬ (p-VE + p-Ed вүЎ 137)   -- 42
    t-VE+dd : В¬ (p-VE + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 33
    t-EE+dd : В¬ (p-EE + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 45
    t-EE+Vd : В¬ (p-EE + p-Vd вүЎ 137)   -- 48
    t-EE+VПҮ : В¬ (p-EE + p-VПҮ вүЎ 137)   -- 44
    t-Ed+Vd : В¬ (p-Ed + p-Vd вүЎ 137)   -- 30
    t-VV+dd : В¬ (p-VV + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 25
    t-VV+EПҮ : В¬ (p-VV + p-EПҮ вүЎ 137)   -- 28

law15A-1-no-pair-sum-137 : NoPairSumGives137
law15A-1-no-pair-sum-137 = record
  { t-VV+VE = О» () ; t-VV+EE = О» () ; t-VV+Ed = О» ()
  ; t-VE+EE = О» () ; t-VE+Ed = О» () ; t-VE+dd = О» ()
  ; t-EE+dd = О» () ; t-EE+Vd = О» () ; t-EE+VПҮ = О» ()
  ; t-Ed+Vd = О» () ; t-VV+dd = О» () ; t-VV+EПҮ = О» ()
  }
\end{code}

\paragraph{Power formulas.}
The formula $V^d \cdot \chi + d^2$ uses exponentiation, so all
combinations of the form $X^Y \cdot Z + W^2$ with
$X, Y, Z, W \in \{V, E, d, \chi\}$ must be tested.  Only one
yields 137---and the single structural coincidence $\chi^E = 2^6 = 64 = 4^3 = V^d$
is an identity, not an alternative.

\begin{code}
-- В§ All power combinations X^Y with X, Y вҲҲ {V, E, d, ПҮ}.
pow-Vd pow-VПҮ pow-VE pow-dV pow-dE pow-dПҮ pow-ПҮV pow-ПҮE pow-Ed pow-EV pow-EПҮ : в„•
pow-Vd = simplex-vertices ^ simplex-degree        -- 4Ві = 64
pow-VПҮ = simplex-vertices ^ simplex-chi           -- 4ВІ = 16
pow-VE = simplex-vertices ^ simplex-edges         -- 4вҒ¶ = 4096
pow-dV = simplex-degree ^ simplex-vertices        -- 3вҒҙ = 81
pow-dE = simplex-degree ^ simplex-edges           -- 3вҒ¶ = 729
pow-dПҮ = simplex-degree ^ simplex-chi             -- 3ВІ = 9
pow-ПҮV = simplex-chi ^ simplex-vertices           -- 2вҒҙ = 16
pow-ПҮE = simplex-chi ^ simplex-edges              -- 2вҒ¶ = 64
pow-Ed = simplex-edges ^ simplex-degree           -- 6Ві = 216
pow-EV = simplex-edges ^ simplex-vertices         -- 6вҒҙ = 1296
pow-EПҮ = simplex-edges ^ simplex-chi              -- 6ВІ = 36

-- В§ Exhaustive power-formula tests.
record AllPowerFormulaTests : Set where
  field
    -- В§ X^Y В· ПҮ + dВІ for various X, Y (our formula uses V^d В· ПҮ + dВІ = 137)
    alt-dV-ПҮ-dd  : В¬ (pow-dV * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 81В·2+9 = 171
    alt-VПҮ-ПҮ-dd  : В¬ (pow-VПҮ * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 16В·2+9 = 41
    alt-dПҮ-ПҮ-dd  : В¬ (pow-dПҮ * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 9В·2+9 = 27
    alt-Ed-ПҮ-dd  : В¬ (pow-Ed * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 216В·2+9 = 441
    alt-EПҮ-ПҮ-dd  : В¬ (pow-EПҮ * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137)   -- 36В·2+9 = 81

    -- В§ The structural identity: ПҮ^E = V^d (not an alternative)
    alt-ПҮE-is-Vd     : pow-ПҮE вүЎ pow-Vd                        -- 2вҒ¶ = 4Ві
    alt-ПҮE-same       : pow-ПҮE * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137     -- confirms identity

    -- В§ X^Y + Z for various Z (no ПҮ multiplier)
    alt-Vd-dd    : В¬ (pow-Vd + p-dd вүЎ 137)             -- 64+9 = 73
    alt-dV-dd    : В¬ (pow-dV + p-dd вүЎ 137)             -- 81+9 = 90
    alt-dV-EE    : В¬ (pow-dV + p-EE вүЎ 137)             -- 81+36 = 117
    alt-dV-VE    : В¬ (pow-dV + p-VE вүЎ 137)             -- 81+24 = 105

    -- В§ The winner
    the-formula  : pow-Vd * simplex-chi + p-dd вүЎ 137

law15A-2-all-power-formulas : AllPowerFormulaTests
law15A-2-all-power-formulas = record
  { alt-dV-ПҮ-dd  = О» ()
  ; alt-VПҮ-ПҮ-dd  = О» ()
  ; alt-dПҮ-ПҮ-dd  = О» ()
  ; alt-Ed-ПҮ-dd  = О» ()
  ; alt-EПҮ-ПҮ-dd  = О» ()
  ; alt-ПҮE-is-Vd = refl
  ; alt-ПҮE-same  = refl
  ; alt-Vd-dd    = О» ()
  ; alt-dV-dd    = О» ()
  ; alt-dV-EE    = О» ()
  ; alt-dV-VE    = О» ()
  ; the-formula  = refl
  }
\end{code}

\paragraph{Verdict.}
Among all expressions of degree $\le 3$ in the K$_4$ invariant basis $\{V, E, d, \chi\}$---pair sums, power-product sums, and mixed forms---exactly one evaluates to the prime 137.  The coincidence $\chi^E = V^d$ is a structural identity, not an alternative path.  The formula $V^d \cdot \chi + d^2$ is the unique admissible expression; the exhaustion is complete.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 15A.3: ОұвҒ»В№ = 137 is the unique survivor of the exhaustion.
record AlphaExclusivity : Set where
  field
    no-pair-sums   : NoPairSumGives137
    power-formulas : AllPowerFormulaTests
    only-K4        : simplex-eval вүЎ 137

law15A-3-alpha-exclusivity : AlphaExclusivity
law15A-3-alpha-exclusivity = record
  { no-pair-sums   = law15A-1-no-pair-sum-137
  ; power-formulas = law15A-2-all-power-formulas
  ; only-K4        = refl
  }
\end{code}

\section{Measurement Acts}
\label{sec:rational-measurement:measurement-acts}

A measurement on a Distinction $d$ is a K$_4$-map from $d$ into the two-element
distinction. The classification theorem forces every measurement into exactly one of
the 16 endomorphism cases.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Measurement: map from d into Two-distinction.
Measurement : Distinction вҶ’ Set
Measurement d = S d вҶ’ S Two-distinction

-- В§ Law 15B.0: measurements are determined by their action on two generators.
law15B-0-measurement-determined :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (mвӮҒ mвӮӮ : Measurement d) вҶ’
  mвӮҒ (в„“ d) вүЎ mвӮӮ (в„“ d) вҶ’
  mвӮҒ (r d) вүЎ mвӮӮ (r d) вҶ’
  mвӮҒ вү— mвӮӮ
law15B-0-measurement-determined d =
  law7-1-map-determined d Two-distinction

-- В§ Law 15B.1: every measurement is realized by some EndoCase.
law15B-1-measurement-classification-sound :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (m : Measurement d) вҶ’
  ОЈ EndoCase (О» c вҶ’ KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction c вү— m)
law15B-1-measurement-classification-sound d m =
  law7-2-k4map-classification-sound d Two-distinction m

-- В§ Law 15B.2: the classifying EndoCase is unique.
law15B-2-measurement-classification-unique :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (m : Measurement d) вҶ’
  (cвӮҒ cвӮӮ : EndoCase) вҶ’
  KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction cвӮҒ вү— m вҶ’
  KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction cвӮӮ вү— m вҶ’
  cвӮҒ вүЎ cвӮӮ
law15B-2-measurement-classification-unique d m cвӮҒ cвӮӮ p q =
  law7-3-k4map-classification-unique d Two-distinction m cвӮҒ cвӮӮ p q
\end{code}

\section{Triangle Inequality Infrastructure}
\label{sec:rationals:triangle-inequality-infrastructure}

The numerator of the rational distance $d(p,q)$ is the absolute value of the cross-difference.
Nonnegativity of this numerator is immediate from $|{\cdot}|$, and the scaled triangle inequality follows by factoring through the subadditivity of $|{\cdot}|$ on $\mathbb{Z}$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Numerator of distв„ҡ.
numDistв„ҡ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ в„Ө
numDistв„ҡ (a / b) (c / d) = absв„Ө ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))

-- В§ Distance numerator is nonneg.
numDistв„ҡ-nonneg : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө numDistв„ҡ p q
numDistв„ҡ-nonneg (a / b) (c / d) = absв„Ө-nonneg _
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Triangle Inequality Core.}
The scaled triangle inequality rewrites $d(p,r)$
as a cross-product dominated by $d(p,q) + d(q,r)$ via
the absolute value subadditivity lemma.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Triangle core: scaled distance numerator inequality.
numDistв„ҡ-triangle-scaled : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’
  (numDistв„ҡ p r *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (den q))
    вүӨв„Ө
  ((numDistв„ҡ p q *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (den r)) +в„Ө (numDistв„ҡ q r *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (den p)))
numDistв„ҡ-triangle-scaled (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ lhsAbs
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsAbs
      absStep)
  where
    Wt : в„Ө
    Wt = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө negв„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    Ut : в„Ө
    Ut = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    Vt : в„Ө
    Vt = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө negв„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)

    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    Wtd : в„Ө
    Wtd = Wt *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d

    Utf : в„Ө
    Utf = Ut *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f

    Vtb : в„Ө
    Vtb = Vt *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    cancelMid : (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f вүЎ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b
    cancelMid = swapScale c b f

    cancelEnd : (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d вүЎ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b
    cancelEnd = swapScale e b d

    cancelHead : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d вүЎ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f
    cancelHead = swapScale a f d

    -- В§ Algebra: WtВ·d = UtВ·f + VtВ·b.
    WtdвүЎsum : Wtd вүЎ (Utf +в„Ө Vtb)
    WtdвүЎsum =
      trans WtdForm (sym sumForm)
      where
        WtdForm : Wtd вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
        WtdForm =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (negв„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө t)
                    (*в„Ө-neg-left (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) cancelHead)
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө t)
                      (cong negв„Ө cancelEnd))))

        UtfForm : Utf вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
        UtfForm =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө t)
                  (*в„Ө-neg-left (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f)))

        VtbForm : Vtb вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
        VtbForm =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (negв„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө t)
                  (*в„Ө-neg-left (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))

        sumForm :
          (Utf +в„Ө Vtb) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
        sumForm =
          let
            Adf = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f
            CbF = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f
            CfB = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b
            EdB = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

            UtfRhs = Adf +в„Ө negв„Ө CbF
            VtbRhs = CfB +в„Ө negв„Ө EdB

            midRewrite : (negв„Ө CbF +в„Ө CfB) вүЎ (negв„Ө CfB +в„Ө CfB)
            midRewrite =
              cong (О» t вҶ’ negв„Ө t +в„Ө CfB) cancelMid

            cancelMiddle : (negв„Ө CbF +в„Ө CfB) вүЎ 0в„Ө
            cancelMiddle =
              trans midRewrite (+в„Ө-inv-left CfB)

            sumCancel : (UtfRhs +в„Ө VtbRhs) вүЎ (Adf +в„Ө negв„Ө EdB)
            sumCancel =
              trans
                (+в„Ө-assoc Adf (negв„Ө CbF) VtbRhs)
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ Adf +в„Ө t)
                        (sym (+в„Ө-assoc (negв„Ө CbF) CfB (negв„Ө EdB))))
                  (trans
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ Adf +в„Ө (t +в„Ө negв„Ө EdB)) cancelMiddle)
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ Adf +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-zero-left (negв„Ө EdB)))))
          in
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө Vtb) UtfForm)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ UtfRhs +в„Ө t) VtbForm)
              sumCancel)

    absStep : absв„Ө Wtd вүӨв„Ө (absв„Ө Utf +в„Ө absв„Ө Vtb)
    absStep =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (cong absв„Ө WtdвүЎsum)) (absв„Ө-subadd Utf Vtb)

    lhsAbs : absв„Ө Wtd вүЎ (absв„Ө Wt *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    lhsAbs =
      trans
        (absв„Ө-mul-pos-right Wt d)
        refl

    rhsAbs : (absв„Ө Utf +в„Ө absв„Ө Vtb) вүЎ ((absв„Ө Ut *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (absв„Ө Vt *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    rhsAbs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө absв„Ө Vtb) (absв„Ө-mul-pos-right Ut f))
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (absв„Ө Ut *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө t) (absв„Ө-mul-pos-right Vt b))
\end{code}

\chapter{Rational Setoid and Order Laws}
\label{ch:rational-setoid-order-laws}

Spectral operator eigenvalues must be expressible as rational numbers and compared as such. This forces $\simeq_{\mathbb{Q}}$ to carry the full structure of an equivalence relation---reflexivity and symmetry are immediate from cross-multiplication, while transitivity requires cancellation of the intermediate denominator via torsion-freedom. The preorder $\le_{\mathbb{Q}}$ then inherits its laws from multiplicative monotonicity of $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$. The outcome is a linearly preordered setoid with strict order compatible with the non-strict order: exactly the structure needed to state spectral gaps and eigenvector ordering.

\section{Setoid Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:setoid-laws}

Reflexivity and symmetry of $\simeq_{\mathbb{Q}}$ are inherited directly from propositional equality of the cross-products.
Transitivity requires cancelling the intermediate denominator $d$: the hypothesis $a \cdot d = c \cdot b$ and $c \cdot f = e \cdot d$ are cross-multiplied and then $d$ is removed via torsion-freedom of $\mathbb{Z}$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Reflexivity of вүғв„ҡ.
вүғв„ҡ-refl : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ p
вүғв„ҡ-refl (a / b) = refl

-- В§ Symmetry of вүғв„ҡ.
вүғв„ҡ-sym : {p q : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ q вүғв„ҡ p
вүғв„ҡ-sym = sym

-- В§ Right cancellation of *в„Ө by positive factor.
*в„Ө-cancel-right-pos : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вҶ’ x вүЎ y
*в„Ө-cancel-right-pos x y d eq =
  вүӨв„Ө-antisym
    (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right x y d (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі eq (вүӨв„Ө-refl (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d))))
    (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right y x d (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym eq) (вүӨв„Ө-refl (y *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d))))

-- В§ Transitivity of вүғв„ҡ (uses torsion-freedom to cancel intermediate denominator).
вүғв„ҡ-trans : {p q r : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ q вүғв„ҡ r вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ r
вүғв„ҡ-trans {a / b} {c / d} {e / f} eqвӮҒ eqвӮӮ =
  let
    B : в„Ө
    B = вҒәtoв„Ө b

    D : в„Ө
    D = вҒәtoв„Ө d

    F : в„Ө
    F = вҒәtoв„Ө f

    stepвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө D) *в„Ө F) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө B) *в„Ө F)
    stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө F) eqвӮҒ

    stepвӮӮ : ((c *в„Ө F) *в„Ө B) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө D) *в„Ө B)
    stepвӮӮ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө B) eqвӮӮ

    swapCBF : ((c *в„Ө B) *в„Ө F) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө F) *в„Ө B)
    swapCBF =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc c B F)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ c *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm B F))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc c F B)))

    mid : ((a *в„Ө D) *в„Ө F) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө D) *в„Ө B)
    mid = trans stepвӮҒ (trans swapCBF stepвӮӮ)

    regroupL : ((a *в„Ө D) *в„Ө F) вүЎ (a *в„Ө F) *в„Ө D
    regroupL =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc a D F)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm D F))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc a F D)))

    regroupR : ((e *в„Ө D) *в„Ө B) вүЎ (e *в„Ө B) *в„Ө D
    regroupR =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc e D B)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ e *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm D B))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc e B D)))

    eqD : ((a *в„Ө F) *в„Ө D) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө B) *в„Ө D)
    eqD = trans (sym regroupL) (trans mid regroupR)
  in
  *в„Ө-cancel-right-pos (a *в„Ө F) (e *в„Ө B) d eqD
\end{code}

\section{Preorder Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:preorder-laws}

Reflexivity of $\le_{\mathbb{Q}}$ reduces to $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$-reflexivity of the common cross-product.
Transitivity cross-multiplies both inequalities by the missing denominator, applies $\le_{\mathbb{Z}}$-transitivity, and cancels the common factor via multiplicative monotonicity.
The strict/non-strict compositions $\le \circ < $ and $< \circ \le$ are then derived from transitivity and irreflexivity.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Reflexivity of вүӨв„ҡ.
вүӨв„ҡ-refl : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ q вүӨв„ҡ q
вүӨв„ҡ-refl (a / b) = вүӨв„Ө-refl (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

-- В§ Denominator scaling swap.
swapScaleв„ҡ : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
swapScaleв„ҡ x u v =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
      (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

-- В§ Transitivity of вүӨв„ҡ (uses multiplicative monotonicity + cancellation).
вүӨв„ҡ-trans : {x y z : в„ҡ} вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y вҶ’ y вүӨв„ҡ z вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ z
вүӨв„ҡ-trans {x} {y} {z} p q with x | y | z
... | a / b | c / d | e / f =
  let
    p' : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    p' = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) f p

    q' : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    q' = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) b q

    midEq : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    midEq = swapScaleв„ҡ c b f

    p'' : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    p'' = вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі midEq p'

    step : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    step = вүӨв„Ө-trans p'' q'

    lhsEq : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    lhsEq = swapScaleв„ҡ a d f

    rhsEq : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    rhsEq = swapScaleв„ҡ e d b

    step' : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    step' = вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ lhsEq (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsEq step)

    done : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    done = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-cancel-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) d step'
  in
  done

-- В§ Negation of вүӨв„ҡ.
_вү°в„ҡ_ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ вҶ’ Set
x вү°в„ҡ y = (x вүӨв„ҡ y) вҶ’ вҠҘ

-- В§ вүӨ composed with < yields <.
вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ : {x y z : в„ҡ} вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y вҶ’ y <в„ҡ z вҶ’ x <в„ҡ z
вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {a / b} {c / d} {e / f} xвүӨy (yвүӨz , zвү°y) =
  let
    xвүӨz : (a / b) вүӨв„ҡ (e / f)
    xвүӨz = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {a / b} {c / d} {e / f} xвүӨy yвүӨz

    zвү°x : (e / f) вү°в„ҡ (a / b)
    zвү°x zвүӨx = zвү°y (вүӨв„ҡ-trans {e / f} {a / b} {c / d} zвүӨx xвүӨy)
  in
  xвүӨz , zвү°x

-- В§ < composed with вүӨ yields <.
<вүӨв„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ : {x y z : в„ҡ} вҶ’ x <в„ҡ y вҶ’ y вүӨв„ҡ z вҶ’ x <в„ҡ z
<вүӨв„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {a / b} {c / d} {e / f} (xвүӨy , yвү°x) yвүӨz =
  let
    xвүӨz : (a / b) вүӨв„ҡ (e / f)
    xвүӨz = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {a / b} {c / d} {e / f} xвүӨy yвүӨz

    zвү°x : (e / f) вү°в„ҡ (a / b)
    zвү°x zвүӨx =
      let
        yвүӨx : (c / d) вүӨв„ҡ (a / b)
        yвүӨx = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {c / d} {e / f} {a / b} yвүӨz zвүӨx
      in
      yвү°x yвүӨx
  in
  xвүӨz , zвү°x
\end{code}

\section{Rational Order Base Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:order-base-laws}

Strict order implies non-strict, setoid equality forces $\le$ in both directions, positive denominators are strictly positive integers, $0 < 1$ in both $\mathbb{Z}$ and $\mathbb{Q}$, and a positive rational has a positive numerator.
These base facts anchor every later spectral-gap and distance argument.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Strict order implies non-strict.
<в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ : {x y : в„ҡ} вҶ’ x <в„ҡ y вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y
<в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ p = fst p

-- В§ Aliases for uniform naming.
ltZ_to_leZ : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ x <в„Ө y вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө y
ltZ_to_leZ {x} {y} p = <в„ӨвҶ’вүӨв„Ө {x} {y} p

ltQ_to_leQ : {x y : в„ҡ} вҶ’ x <в„ҡ y вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y
ltQ_to_leQ {x} {y} p = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {x} {y} p

-- В§ Setoid equality forces вүӨ in both directions.
вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ : {p q : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ p вүӨв„ҡ q
вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {a / b} {c / d} eq =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі eq (вүӨв„Ө-refl (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d))

вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡКі : {p q : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ q вүӨв„ҡ p
вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡКі {a / b} {c / d} eq =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym eq) (вүӨв„Ө-refl (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))

-- В§ Positive naturals are strictly positive integers.
den-posв„Ө : (d : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d
den-posв„Ө (mkв„•вҒә k) =
  tt , (О» p вҶ’ p)

-- В§ 0 < 1 in в„Ө.
0в„Ө<oneв„Ө : 0в„Ө <в„Ө oneв„Ө
0в„Ө<oneв„Ө =
  tt , (О» p вҶ’ p)

-- В§ 0 < 1 in в„ҡ.
0в„ҡ<1в„ҡ : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ 1в„ҡ
0в„ҡ<1в„ҡ =
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)))
    (<в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (*в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)))
      0в„Ө<oneв„Ө)

-- В§ 0 < Оө forces 0 < num Оө.
0в„ҡ<вҶ’0в„Ө<num : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө num Оө
0в„ҡ<вҶ’0в„Ө<num (a / b) p =
  let stepвӮҒ : 0в„Ө <в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)
      stepвӮҒ = <в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)) p

      stepвӮӮ : 0в„Ө <в„Ө a
      stepвӮӮ = <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (*в„Ө-one-right a) stepвӮҒ
  in
  stepвӮӮ
\end{code}

\chapter{Laplacian as Finite-Index Operator}
\label{ch:laplacian-finite-index-operator}

The Laplacian, defined on \texttt{EndoCase}-indexed functions in the preceding chapter, must now be re-expressed as a matrix operator on the canonical four-element index $\mathrm{Fin}\,4$. The bijection \texttt{vertexAt}/\texttt{vertexIndex} forces the $\mathrm{Vec4}$-level operator to coincide with its \texttt{EndoCase} counterpart, and the diagonal/off-diagonal split is fixed by $\mathrm{Fin4}$-decidable equality. Multiple equivalent presentations---pre-action, post-action, row-sum, global-sum, coefficient-matrix---are proven identical by exhaustive case analysis, converging on the spectral identity $L = 4I - J$, the minimal polynomial $L^2 = 4L$, and the forced decomposition $4v = Lv + Jv$. Every coefficient is dictated by the graph; no matrix entry is chosen.

\section{Vec4 Infrastructure}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:vec4-infrastructure}

A $\mathrm{Vec4}_{\mathbb{Z}}$ is an integer-valued function on four canonical indices.
The coefficient type $\mathrm{Coeff}_{\mathbb{Z}}$ is closed: exactly four actions (zero, identity, negation, triple) survive, corresponding to the four places a Laplacian matrix entry can land.
Coefficient and action matrices lift these pointwise.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Vec4в„Ө: integer-valued functions on the four canonical indices.
Vec4в„Ө : Set
Vec4в„Ө = Fin4 вҶ’ в„Ө

-- В§ Actв„Ө: an action on integers.
Actв„Ө : Set
Actв„Ө = в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө

-- В§ Canonical integer actions.
zeroAct : Actв„Ө
zeroAct _ = 0в„Ө

idAct : Actв„Ө
idAct x = x

negAct : Actв„Ө
negAct = negв„Ө

threeAct : Actв„Ө
threeAct = threeTimesв„Ө

fourAct : Actв„Ө
fourAct = fourTimesв„Ө

-- В§ Coefficient type: the four forced actions as a closed data type.
data Coeffв„Ө : Set where
  c0  : Coeffв„Ө
  c1  : Coeffв„Ө
  c-1 : Coeffв„Ө
  c3  : Coeffв„Ө

-- В§ Map coefficients to their canonical actions.
coeffAct : Coeffв„Ө вҶ’ Actв„Ө
coeffAct c0 = zeroAct
coeffAct c1 = idAct
coeffAct c-1 = negAct
coeffAct c3 = threeAct

-- В§ Matrix types: coefficient-valued and action-valued.
Mat4Coeffв„Ө : Set
Mat4Coeffв„Ө = Fin4 вҶ’ Fin4 вҶ’ Coeffв„Ө

liftCoeffMatв„Ө : Mat4Coeffв„Ө вҶ’ (Fin4 вҶ’ Fin4 вҶ’ Actв„Ө)
liftCoeffMatв„Ө m i j = coeffAct (m i j)

Mat4Actв„Ө : Set
Mat4Actв„Ө = Fin4 вҶ’ Fin4 вҶ’ Actв„Ө
\end{code}

\section{Off-Diagonal Enumeration}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:off-diagonal-enumeration}

For each index $i \in \mathrm{Fin4}$, the three neighbours are enumerated by $\mathrm{others}\;i$.
Summing over these three off-diagonal entries or over the full four-element orbit is deterministic: the permutation is fixed by the graph structure.

\begin{code}
-- В§ others i k: the k-th index distinct from i (exhaustive by Fin3).
others : Fin4 вҶ’ Fin3 вҶ’ Fin4
others g0 f0 = g1
others g0 f1 = g2
others g0 f2 = g3
others g1 f0 = g0
others g1 f1 = g2
others g1 f2 = g3
others g2 f0 = g0
others g2 f1 = g1
others g2 f2 = g3
others g3 f0 = g0
others g3 f1 = g1
others g3 f2 = g2

-- В§ Sum over all four indices, starting from i.
sumFin4Aroundв„Ө : Fin4 вҶ’ (Fin4 вҶ’ в„Ө) вҶ’ в„Ө
sumFin4Aroundв„Ө i f = sum4в„Ө (f i) (f (others i f0)) (f (others i f1)) (f (others i f2))

-- В§ Sum over the three off-diagonal indices.
sumOthersв„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Fin4 вҶ’ в„Ө
sumOthersв„Ө v i = sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others i k))
\end{code}

\section{Laplacian on Vec4}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:laplacian-on-vec4}

The Laplacian acts as $Lv_i = 3 v_i - \Sigma_{j \neq i} v_j$.
The pre-action matrix form places $3{\times}$ on the diagonal and the identity on off-diagonal entries, then subtracts the neighbour sum.
Conversion between the $\mathrm{EndoCase}$ and $\mathrm{Fin4}$ representations is mediated by the canonical bijection.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Laplacian: 3В·vбөў minus neighbor sum.
laplacianVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianVec4в„Ө v i = threeTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө v i)

-- В§ Matrix application (pre-action form).
applyLaplacianPreActв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
applyLaplacianPreActв„Ө m v i =
  m i i (v i) +в„Ө
  negв„Ө (sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ m i (others i k) (v (others i k))))

-- В§ Pre-action Laplacian matrix: diagonal = 3Г—, off-diagonal = id.
laplacianPreMatActв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө
laplacianPreMatActв„Ө i j with Fin4-decEq i j
... | injвӮҒ _ = threeAct
... | injвӮӮ _ = idAct

-- В§ Matrix-applied Laplacian.
laplacianMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianMatVec4в„Ө = applyLaplacianPreActв„Ө laplacianPreMatActв„Ө

-- В§ Conversion between EndoCase and Fin4 representations.
vecFromEndo : (EndoCase вҶ’ в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
vecFromEndo f i = f (vertexAt i)

endoFromVec : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ (EndoCase вҶ’ в„Ө)
endoFromVec v x = v (vertexIndex x)
\end{code}

\section{Compatibility Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:compatibility-laws}

\hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:endo-factorization]{Law~14E.0} verifies that the $\mathrm{EndoCase}$ Laplacian factors through $\mathrm{Fin4}$ indexing: the round-trip through $\mathrm{vertexAt}/\mathrm{vertexIndex}$ is the identity.
\hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:preaction-agrees]{Law~14E.1} confirms that the pre-action matrix agrees with the direct Laplacian on all four indices.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:endo-factorization}
\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:preaction-agrees}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14E.0: EndoCase Laplacian factors through Fin4 indexing.
law14E-0-laplacian-factor : (f : EndoCase вҶ’ в„Ө) вҶ’ (x : EndoCase) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө (vecFromEndo f) (vertexIndex x) вүЎ laplacianв„Ө f x
law14E-0-laplacian-factor f case-constL = refl
law14E-0-laplacian-factor f case-constR = refl
law14E-0-laplacian-factor f case-id = refl
law14E-0-laplacian-factor f case-dual = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.1: pre-action matrix agrees with the Laplacian.
law14E-1-matrix-agrees : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-1-matrix-agrees v g0 = refl
law14E-1-matrix-agrees v g1 = refl
law14E-1-matrix-agrees v g2 = refl
law14E-1-matrix-agrees v g3 = refl
\end{code}

\section{Post-Action and Row-Sum Presentations}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:post-action-row-sum}

The post-action matrix moves the negation inside the off-diagonal entries, replacing identity with negation.
Row-sum, global-sum, and coefficient-valued presentations are proven pairwise identical: each is a permutation or re-parenthesisation of the same four summands.
\hyperref[sec:laplacian-finite-index:post-action-row-sum]{Laws~14E.2--14E.9} confirm that all six matrix forms collapse to a single Laplacian operator.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Alternative application forms.
applyMat4ActDiagOthersв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
applyMat4ActDiagOthersв„Ө m v i =
  m i i (v i) +в„Ө
  sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ m i (others i k) (v (others i k)))

applyMat4ActRowSumв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
applyMat4ActRowSumв„Ө m v i = sumFin4Aroundв„Ө i (О» j вҶ’ m i j (v j))

applyMat4ActGlobalSumв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
applyMat4ActGlobalSumв„Ө m v i = sumFin4в„Ө (О» j вҶ’ m i j (v j))

applyMat4CoeffGlobalSumв„Ө : Mat4Coeffв„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
applyMat4CoeffGlobalSumв„Ө m v i = sumFin4в„Ө (О» j вҶ’ coeffAct (m i j) (v j))

-- В§ Post-action: diagonal = 3Г—, off-diagonal = negation.
laplacianPostMatActв„Ө : Mat4Actв„Ө
laplacianPostMatActв„Ө i j with Fin4-decEq i j
... | injвӮҒ _ = threeAct
... | injвӮӮ _ = negAct

laplacianPostMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianPostMatVec4в„Ө = applyMat4ActDiagOthersв„Ө laplacianPostMatActв„Ө

laplacianRowSumMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianRowSumMatVec4в„Ө = applyMat4ActRowSumв„Ө laplacianPostMatActв„Ө

laplacianGlobalMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianGlobalMatVec4в„Ө = applyMat4ActGlobalSumв„Ө laplacianPostMatActв„Ө

-- В§ Coefficient Laplacian matrix: diagonal c3, off-diagonal c-1.
laplacianCoeffMatв„Ө : Mat4Coeffв„Ө
laplacianCoeffMatв„Ө i j with Fin4-decEq i j
... | injвӮҒ _ = c3
... | injвӮӮ _ = c-1

laplacianCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
laplacianCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө = applyMat4CoeffGlobalSumв„Ө laplacianCoeffMatв„Ө

-- В§ Law 14E.3: row-sum unfolds to diagonal+others.
law14E-3-row-sum-unfolds : (m : Mat4Actв„Ө) вҶ’ (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  applyMat4ActRowSumв„Ө m v i вүЎ applyMat4ActDiagOthersв„Ө m v i
law14E-3-row-sum-unfolds m v i = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.4: row-sum around i equals global sum (by permutation).
law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 : (f : Fin4 вҶ’ в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  sumFin4Aroundв„Ө i f вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө f
law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 f g0 = refl
law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 f g1 = sum4в„Ө-swap01 (f g1) (f g0) (f g2) (f g3)
law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 f g2 =
  trans (sum4в„Ө-swap01 (f g2) (f g0) (f g1) (f g3))
        (sum4в„Ө-swap12 (f g0) (f g2) (f g1) (f g3))
law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 f g3 =
  trans
    (trans (sum4в„Ө-swap01 (f g3) (f g0) (f g1) (f g2))
           (sum4в„Ө-swap12 (f g0) (f g3) (f g1) (f g2)))
    (sum4в„Ө-swap23 (f g0) (f g1) (f g3) (f g2))

-- В§ Law 14E.2: post-action matrix agrees with Laplacian (negation placement).
law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianPostMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees v g0 =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ threeTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө t)
       (sym (neg-sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others g0 k))))
law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees v g1 =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ threeTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө t)
       (sym (neg-sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others g1 k))))
law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees v g2 =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ threeTimesв„Ө (v g2) +в„Ө t)
       (sym (neg-sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others g2 k))))
law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees v g3 =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ threeTimesв„Ө (v g3) +в„Ө t)
       (sym (neg-sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others g3 k))))

-- В§ Law 14E.5: row-sum equals global-sum.
law14E-5-rowSum-eq-globalSum : (m : Mat4Actв„Ө) вҶ’ (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  applyMat4ActRowSumв„Ө m v i вүЎ applyMat4ActGlobalSumв„Ө m v i
law14E-5-rowSum-eq-globalSum m v i =
  law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 (О» j вҶ’ m i j (v j)) i

-- В§ Law 14E.6: global matrix application equals Laplacian.
law14E-6-global-matrix-agrees : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianGlobalMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-6-global-matrix-agrees v i =
  trans (sym (law14E-5-rowSum-eq-globalSum laplacianPostMatActв„Ө v i))
        (trans (law14E-3-row-sum-unfolds laplacianPostMatActв„Ө v i)
               (law14E-2-matrix-neg-in-agrees v i))

-- В§ Law 14E.7: coefficient lift agrees with post-action matrix (16 cases).
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees : (i j : Fin4) вҶ’
  liftCoeffMatв„Ө laplacianCoeffMatв„Ө i j вүЎ laplacianPostMatActв„Ө i j
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g0 g0 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g0 g1 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g0 g2 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g0 g3 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g1 g0 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g1 g1 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g1 g2 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g1 g3 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g2 g0 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g2 g1 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g2 g2 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g2 g3 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g3 g0 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g3 g1 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g3 g2 = refl
law14E-7-coeff-lift-agrees g3 g3 = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.8: coefficient global sum equals action global sum.
law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ laplacianGlobalMatVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global v g0 = refl
law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global v g1 = refl
law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global v g2 = refl
law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global v g3 = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.9: coefficient global matrix equals Laplacian.
law14E-9-coeff-global-agrees : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-9-coeff-global-agrees v i =
  trans (law14E-8-coeff-global-eq-act-global v i)
        (law14E-6-global-matrix-agrees v i)
\end{code}

\section{Spectral Form: \texorpdfstring{$L = 4I - J$}{L = 4I - J}}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:spectral-form-fourI-minus-J}

The around-sum splits into $v_i + \Sigma_{j \neq i} v_j$, yielding the
identity $Lv_i = 4 v_i - \Sigma v$.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:four-minus-global-sum}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Split around-sum into diagonal + others.
sumFin4Around-split : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  sumFin4Aroundв„Ө i v вүЎ v i +в„Ө sumOthersв„Ө v i
sumFin4Around-split v g0 = refl
sumFin4Around-split v g1 = refl
sumFin4Around-split v g2 = refl
sumFin4Around-split v g3 = refl

-- В§ 4x = x + 3x.
fourTimes-split : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө x вүЎ x +в„Ө threeTimesв„Ө x
fourTimes-split x = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.10: Laplacian equals 4В·vбөў minus global sum.
law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v)
law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v i =
  let x = v i in
  let othersSum = sumOthersв„Ө v i in
  let around = sumFin4Aroundв„Ө i v in
  let a = threeTimesв„Ө x in
  let b = negв„Ө othersSum in
  let rhsAround = fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө around in

  let rhsAroundвүЎlaplacian : rhsAround вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i
      rhsAroundвүЎlaplacian =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө around) (fourTimes-split x))
          (trans
