            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (x +в„Ө a) +в„Ө t) (trans (cong negв„Ө (sumFin4Around-split v i)) (neg-+в„Ө x othersSum)))
            (trans
              (+в„Ө-assoc x a (negв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө othersSum))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө x) (negв„Ө othersSum)))
                )
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө ((t) +в„Ө negв„Ө othersSum)) (+в„Ө-comm a (negв„Ө x)))
                  (trans
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-assoc (negв„Ө x) a (negв„Ө othersSum)))
                    (trans
                      (sym (+в„Ө-assoc x (negв„Ө x) (a +в„Ө negв„Ө othersSum)))
                      (trans
                        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (a +в„Ө negв„Ө othersSum)) (+в„Ө-inv-right x))
                        (trans
                          (+в„Ө-zero-left (a +в„Ө negв„Ө othersSum))
                          refl))))))))
  in
  trans
    (sym rhsAroundвүЎlaplacian)
    (cong (О» s вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 v i))
\end{code}

\section{Eigenvector Classification}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:eigenvector-classification}

Sum-zero vectors are 4-eigenvectors: when $\Sigma v = 0$, the $-\Sigma v$ term vanishes and $Lv = 4v$.
Constant vectors are 0-eigenvectors: the $4v_i - 4v_i = 0$ cancellation is immediate.
The $J$ operator maps every vector to the constant vector at $\Sigma v$, so $J \circ J = 4J$ and $J$ as a coefficient matrix is the all-ones matrix.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:sum-zero-implies-eigen4}
\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:eigen4-implies-sum-zero}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14E.11: sum-zero vectors are 4-eigenvectors.
law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 v i sum0 =
  trans
    (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v i)
    (trans
      (cong (О» s вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
      (+в„Ө-zero-right (fourTimesв„Ө (v i))))

-- В§ Constant vector and J operator.
constVec4в„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
constVec4в„Ө x _ = x

JVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
JVec4в„Ө v _ = sumFin4в„Ө v

-- В§ Coefficient matrix for J: all ones.
onesCoeffMatв„Ө : Mat4Coeffв„Ө
onesCoeffMatв„Ө _ _ = c1

JCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
JCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө = applyMat4CoeffGlobalSumв„Ө onesCoeffMatв„Ө

-- В§ Sum of constant vector is four times its value.
sumFin4-const : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (constVec4в„Ө x) вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө x
sumFin4-const x = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.12: J as coefficient matrix.
law14E-12-ones-matrix-is-J : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  JCoeffGlobalMatVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-12-ones-matrix-is-J v i = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.13: constant vectors are 0-eigenvectors.
law14E-13-const-eigen0 : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө (constVec4в„Ө x) i вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-13-const-eigen0 x i =
  trans
    (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll (constVec4в„Ө x) i)
    (trans
      (cong (О» s вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (sumFin4-const x))
      (+в„Ө-inv-right (fourTimesв„Ө x)))
\end{code}

\section{\texorpdfstring{$J$}{J} Operator Properties}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:j-operator-properties}

$J$ is constant across indices, its sum is $4 \Sigma v$, and $J$ scales constants by 4.
$J \circ J = 4J$ and the sum-zero criterion $\Sigma v = 0$ is equivalent to membership in the 4-eigenspace of $L$.
These identities are assembled here as the spectral raw material for the decomposition $4v = Lv + Jv$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ J is constant across indices.
J-constant : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i j : Fin4) вҶ’ JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v j
J-constant v i j = refl

-- В§ Sum of J v is four times the sum of v.
sumFin4-J : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v) вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v)
sumFin4-J v = refl

-- В§ J v is definitionally the constant vector at sum v.
J-is-constVec : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’ JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ constVec4в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v) i
J-is-constVec v i = refl

-- В§ Law 14E.17: J scales constants by 4.
law14E-17-J-const-four : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө (constVec4в„Ө x) i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө x
law14E-17-J-const-four x i = sumFin4-const x

-- В§ Law 14E.18: J вҲҳ J = 4 В· J.
law14E-18-JJ-fourJ : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v i)
law14E-18-JJ-fourJ v i =
  trans (sumFin4-J v) refl

-- В§ Law 14E.19: pointwise 4-eigenvectors force sum-zero.
law14E-19-eigen4вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-19-eigen4вҶ’sum0 v eigen4 =
  let a = fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) in
  let s = sumFin4в„Ө v in
  let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ a
      eqвӮҖ =
        trans
          (sym (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v g0))
          (eigen4 g0)
  in
  negв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero s (+в„Ө-cancel-left a (negв„Ө s) eqвӮҖ)

-- В§ Law 14E.20: sum-zero вҶ” pointwise 4-eigenspace.
law14E-20-sum0вҶ’eigen4 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
law14E-20-sum0вҶ’eigen4 v sum0 i = law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 v i sum0

law14E-20-eigen4вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-20-eigen4вҶ’sum0 = law14E-19-eigen4вҶ’sum0
\end{code}

\section{Operator Identity and Kernel}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:operator-identity-kernel}

\hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:operator-identity]{Law~14E.21} establishes $L = 4I - J$ pointwise.
The kernel condition $Lv_i = 0$ is then equivalent to $4 v_i = Jv_i$, which forces every component to equal $\tfrac{1}{4} \Sigma v$---the defining property of constant vectors.
\hyperref[sec:laplacian-finite-index:operator-identity-kernel]{Laws~14E.23--14E.27} package this equivalence in both directions.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:operator-identity}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14E.21: L = 4I вҲ’ J pointwise.
law14E-21-L-four-minus-J : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v i)
law14E-21-L-four-minus-J v i =
  trans (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v i) refl

-- В§ Law 14E.22: kernel condition L v i = 0 вҶ” 4В·vбөў = J v i.
law14E-22-L0вҶ’fourEqJ : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  fourTimesв„Ө (v i) вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-22-L0вҶ’fourEqJ v i L0 =
  let a = fourTimesв„Ө (v i) in
  let j = JVec4в„Ө v i in
  let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө j вүЎ 0в„Ө
      eqвӮҖ = trans (sym (law14E-21-L-four-minus-J v i)) L0
  in
  let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө j) +в„Ө j вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө j
      stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө j) eqвӮҖ
      stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө j +в„Ө j) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө j
      stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө j) j)) stepвӮҒ
      stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө j
      stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left j))) stepвӮӮ
  in
  trans
    (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a))
    (trans stepвӮғ (+в„Ө-zero-left j))

law14E-22-fourEqJвҶ’L0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-22-fourEqJвҶ’L0 v i fourEqJ =
  let a = fourTimesв„Ө (v i) in
  let j = JVec4в„Ө v i in
  trans
    (law14E-21-L-four-minus-J v i)
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (cong negв„Ө (sym fourEqJ)))
      (+в„Ө-inv-right a))

-- В§ Pointwise vector equality.
Vec4Eq : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Set
Vec4Eq v w = (i : Fin4) вҶ’ v i вүЎ w i

-- В§ Kernel predicate.
KernelL : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Set
KernelL v = (i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ 0в„Ө

-- В§ Law 14E.23: L = 4I вҲ’ J as Vec4Eq.
law14E-23-L-eq-four-minus-J : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v i))
law14E-23-L-eq-four-minus-J v i = law14E-21-L-four-minus-J v i

-- В§ Law 14E.24: kernel forces fourTimes-constant.
law14E-24-kernelвҶ’fourTimes-constant : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ KernelL v вҶ’ (i j : Fin4) вҶ’
  fourTimesв„Ө (v i) вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v j)
law14E-24-kernelвҶ’fourTimes-constant v ker i j =
  let fi = law14E-22-L0вҶ’fourEqJ v i (ker i) in
  let fj = law14E-22-L0вҶ’fourEqJ v j (ker j) in
  trans fi (trans refl (sym fj))

-- В§ Law 14E.25: kernel вҶ” fourEqJ pointwise.
law14E-25-kernelвҶ’fourEqJ : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ KernelL v вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  fourTimesв„Ө (v i) вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i
law14E-25-kernelвҶ’fourEqJ v ker i = law14E-22-L0вҶ’fourEqJ v i (ker i)

law14E-25-fourEqJвҶ’kernel : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i) вҶ’ KernelL v
law14E-25-fourEqJвҶ’kernel v hyp i = law14E-22-fourEqJвҶ’L0 v i (hyp i)

-- В§ Law 14E.26: kernel forces sum = 4В·vбөў.
law14E-26-kernelвҶ’sumEqFour : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ KernelL v вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
law14E-26-kernelвҶ’sumEqFour v ker i =
  trans
    refl
    (trans
      (sym (law14E-25-kernelвҶ’fourEqJ v ker i))
      refl)

-- В§ Law 14E.27: sum = 4В·vбөў forces kernel.
law14E-27-sumEqFourвҶ’kernel : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)) вҶ’ KernelL v
law14E-27-sumEqFourвҶ’kernel v hyp =
  law14E-25-fourEqJвҶ’kernel v (О» i вҶ’ sym (trans refl (hyp i)))

-- В§ Law 14E.14: J is constant.
law14E-14-J-constant : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i j : Fin4) вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v j
law14E-14-J-constant = J-constant

-- В§ Law 14E.15: sum-zero вҶ” J v = 0.
law14E-15-sum0-to-J0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-15-sum0-to-J0 v i sum0 = sum0

law14E-15-J0-to-sum0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ JVec4в„Ө v g0 вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-15-J0-to-sum0 v J0 = J0

-- В§ Law 14E.16: L вҲҳ J = 0.
law14E-16-LJ-zero : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-16-LJ-zero v i =
  let s = sumFin4в„Ө v in
  trans
    (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll (JVec4в„Ө v) i)
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) (sumFin4-J v))
      (+в„Ө-inv-right (fourTimesв„Ө s)))
\end{code}

\section{Image of the Laplacian}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:image-of-laplacian}

Adding a constant $c$ to every component shifts the global sum by $4c$.
The core identity $\Sigma(L v) = 0$ then follows from $L = 4I - J$ and the fact that $\Sigma(4v) = 4 \Sigma v = \Sigma(Jv)$.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:sum-laplacian-zero}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Add constant to each component.
sumFin4-addConst : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (c : в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ v i +в„Ө c) вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө v +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c
sumFin4-addConst v c =
  let
    a0 = v g0
    a1 = v g1
    a2 = v g2
    a3 = v g3
    r23 = (a2 +в„Ө c) +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c)
    r1  = (a1 +в„Ө c) +в„Ө r23

    stepвӮҒ : (a0 +в„Ө c) +в„Ө r1 вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r1)
    stepвӮҒ = +в„Ө-assoc a0 c r1

    stepвӮӮ : r1 вүЎ a1 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r23)
    stepвӮӮ = +в„Ө-assoc a1 c r23

    stepвӮғ : c +в„Ө r1 вүЎ a1 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r23))
    stepвӮғ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ c +в„Ө t) stepвӮӮ)
        (swapHeadв„Ө c a1 (c +в„Ө r23))

    stepвӮ„ : (a0 +в„Ө c) +в„Ө r1 вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r23)))
    stepвӮ„ = trans stepвӮҒ (cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө t) stepвӮғ)

    stepвӮ…a : r23 вүЎ a2 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))
    stepвӮ…a = +в„Ө-assoc a2 c (a3 +в„Ө c)

    stepвӮ…b : c +в„Ө r23 вүЎ a2 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c)))
    stepвӮ…b =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ c +в„Ө t) stepвӮ…a)
        (swapHeadв„Ө c a2 (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c)))

    stepвӮ…c : c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r23) вүЎ a2 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))))
    stepвӮ…c =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ c +в„Ө t) stepвӮ…b)
        (swapHeadв„Ө c a2 (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))))

    stepвӮҶ : a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө r23))) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))))))
    stepвӮҶ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө t)) stepвӮ…c

    stepвӮҮa : c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c) вүЎ a3 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө c)
    stepвӮҮa = swapHeadв„Ө c a3 c

    stepвӮҮb : c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c)) вүЎ a3 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө c))
    stepвӮҮb =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ c +в„Ө t) stepвӮҮa)
        (swapHeadв„Ө c a3 (c +в„Ө c))

    stepвӮҮc : c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))) вүЎ a3 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө c)))
    stepвӮҮc =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ c +в„Ө t) stepвӮҮb)
        (swapHeadв„Ө c a3 (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө c)))

    stepвӮҲ : c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c))) вүЎ a3 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c
    stepвӮҲ = trans stepвӮҮc refl

    stepвӮү : a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (c +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө c)))))) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c)))
    stepвӮү = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө t))) stepвӮҲ

    stepвӮҒвӮҖa : a2 +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c) вүЎ (a2 +в„Ө a3) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c
    stepвӮҒвӮҖa = sym (+в„Ө-assoc a2 a3 (fourTimesв„Ө c))

    stepвӮҒвӮҖb : a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c)) вүЎ (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө a3)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c
    stepвӮҒвӮҖb =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a1 +в„Ө t) stepвӮҒвӮҖa)
        (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a1 (a2 +в„Ө a3) (fourTimesв„Ө c)))

    stepвӮҒвӮҖc : a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (a3 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c))) вүЎ (a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө a3))) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө c
    stepвӮҒвӮҖc =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө t) stepвӮҒвӮҖb)
        (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a0 (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө a3)) (fourTimesв„Ө c)))
  in
  trans
    refl
    (trans
      stepвӮ„
      (trans
        stepвӮҶ
        (trans
          stepвӮү
          (trans
            stepвӮҒвӮҖc
            refl))))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Distribution and Global Sum.}
\texttt{fourTimesв„Ө} distributes over $+_{\mathbb{Z}}$, commutes with
\texttt{sumFin4в„Ө}, and yields the global-sum-zero law for the Laplacian.

\begin{code}
-- В§ fourTimes distributes over +в„Ө.
fourTimes-+в„Ө : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө y
fourTimes-+в„Ө x y =
  trans
    (sym (sumFin4-const (x +в„Ө y)))
    (trans
      (sumFin4-addConst (constVec4в„Ө x) y)
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө y) (sumFin4-const x))
        refl))

-- В§ Sum of fourTimes equals fourTimes of sum.
sumFin4-fourTimes : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)) вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v)
sumFin4-fourTimes v =
  let
    a0 = v g0
    a1 = v g1
    a2 = v g2
    a3 = v g3
  in
  sym
    (trans
      refl
      (trans
        (fourTimes-+в„Ө a0 (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө a3)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө a0 +в„Ө t) (fourTimes-+в„Ө a1 (a2 +в„Ө a3)))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө a0 +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө a1 +в„Ө t)) (fourTimes-+в„Ө a2 a3))
            refl))))

-- В§ Law 14E.28: global sum of the Laplacian is zero.
law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 v =
  let
    s = sumFin4в„Ө v

    step0 :
      sumFin4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) вүЎ
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g1) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3)
    step0 =
      cong
        (О» t0 вҶ’ sum4в„Ө t0 (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g1) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3))
        (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v g0)

    step1 :
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g1) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3) вүЎ
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3)
    step1 =
      cong
        (О» t1 вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) t1 (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3))
        (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v g1)

    step2 :
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g2) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3) вүЎ
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g2) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3)
    step2 =
      cong
        (О» t2 вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) t2 (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3))
        (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v g2)

    step3 :
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g2) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (laplacianVec4в„Ө v g3) вүЎ
      sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g2) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g3) +в„Ө negв„Ө s)
    step3 =
      cong
        (О» t3 вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (v g0) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g1) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө (v g2) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) t3)
        (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll v g3)

    rewriteSum :
      sumFin4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) вүЎ
      sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s)
    rewriteSum =
      trans
        refl
        (trans step0 (trans step1 (trans step2 (trans step3 refl))))
  in
  trans
    rewriteSum
    (trans
      (sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)) (negв„Ө s))
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) (sumFin4-fourTimes v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө t) (sym (neg-fourTimesв„Ө s)))
          (+в„Ө-inv-right (fourTimesв„Ө s)))))
\end{code}

\section{Minimal Polynomial and Operator Algebra}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:minimal-polynomial-operator-algebra}

$L^2 = 4L$ is the minimal polynomial $x(x - 4) = 0$: applying $L$ twice to any vector reduces to four times the single application, because the image of $L$ is sum-zero and therefore lies in the 4-eigenspace.
$J \circ L = 0$ and $L + J = 4I$ close the operator algebra of K$_4$.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-finite-index:minimal-polynomial}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14E.29: L вҲҳ L = 4 В· L (minimal polynomial x(xвҲ’4) = 0).
law14E-29-LL-fourL : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v i)
law14E-29-LL-fourL v i =
  law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) i (law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 v)

-- В§ Law 14E.30: J вҲҳ L = 0.
law14E-30-JL-zero : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14E-30-JL-zero v i =
  law14E-15-sum0-to-J0 (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) i (law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 v)

-- В§ Law 14E.31: L + J = 4I pointwise.
law14E-31-L-plus-J-eq-fourI : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v i +в„Ө JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
law14E-31-L-plus-J-eq-fourI v i =
  let a = fourTimesв„Ө (v i) in
  let j = JVec4в„Ө v i in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө j) (law14E-21-L-four-minus-J v i))
    (trans
      (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө j) j)
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left j))
        (+в„Ө-zero-right a)))

-- В§ Zero vector.
zeroVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө
zeroVec4в„Ө = constVec4в„Ө 0в„Ө
\end{code}

\section{Vec4Eq Packagings}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:vec4eq-packagings}

The pointwise identities $L + J = 4I$, $L \circ J = 0$, $J \circ L = 0$, $L^2 = 4L$, and $J^2 = 4J$ are repackaged as $\mathrm{Vec4Eq}$ statements.
The canonical decomposition $4v = Lv + Jv$ with $Lv$ sum-zero and $Jv$ constant is the spectral splitting that all later eigenvalue arguments invoke.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14E.32: L + J = 4I as Vec4Eq.
law14E-32-LplusJ-eq-fourI-Vec4Eq : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (О» i вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i +в„Ө JVec4в„Ө v i) (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (v i))
law14E-32-LplusJ-eq-fourI-Vec4Eq v i = law14E-31-L-plus-J-eq-fourI v i

-- В§ Law 14E.33: L вҲҳ J = 0 as Vec4Eq.
law14E-33-LJ-zero-Vec4Eq : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (laplacianVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v)) zeroVec4в„Ө
law14E-33-LJ-zero-Vec4Eq v i = law14E-16-LJ-zero v i

-- В§ Law 14E.34: J вҲҳ L = 0 as Vec4Eq.
law14E-34-JL-zero-Vec4Eq : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (JVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v)) zeroVec4в„Ө
law14E-34-JL-zero-Vec4Eq v i = law14E-30-JL-zero v i

-- В§ Law 14E.35: L and J commute (both composites = 0).
law14E-35-LJ-commute : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (laplacianVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v)) (JVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v))
law14E-35-LJ-commute v i =
  trans (law14E-16-LJ-zero v i) (sym (law14E-30-JL-zero v i))

-- В§ Law 14E.36: LВІ = 4L as Vec4Eq.
law14E-36-LL-fourL-Vec4Eq : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (laplacianVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v)) (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v i))
law14E-36-LL-fourL-Vec4Eq v i = law14E-29-LL-fourL v i

-- В§ Law 14E.37: JВІ = 4J as Vec4Eq.
law14E-37-JJ-fourJ-Vec4Eq : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec4Eq (JVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v)) (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v i))
law14E-37-JJ-fourJ-Vec4Eq v i = law14E-18-JJ-fourJ v i

-- В§ Pointwise four-times and pointwise addition.
fourVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
fourVec4в„Ө v i = fourTimesв„Ө (v i)

_+Vec4в„Ө_ : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
(v +Vec4в„Ө w) i = v i +в„Ө w i

-- В§ Law 14E.38: image of L is sum-zero and 4-eigen.
law14E-38-imageL-sum0-and-eigen4 : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  (sumFin4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ fourTimesв„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө v i))
law14E-38-imageL-sum0-and-eigen4 v =
  law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 v , law14E-29-LL-fourL v

-- В§ Law 14E.39: image of J is constant and in kernel of L.
law14E-39-imageJ-const-and-kernelL : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  (((i j : Fin4) вҶ’ JVec4в„Ө v i вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v j) Г— ((i : Fin4) вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө (JVec4в„Ө v) i вүЎ 0в„Ө))
law14E-39-imageJ-const-and-kernelL v =
  law14E-14-J-constant v , law14E-16-LJ-zero v

-- В§ Decomposition type: 4v = u + w with u sum-zero, w constant.
Decomp4 : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Set
Decomp4 v =
  ОЈ Vec4в„Ө (О» u вҶ’
    ОЈ Vec4в„Ө (О» w вҶ’
      (Vec4Eq (u +Vec4в„Ө w) (fourVec4в„Ө v)) Г—
      (sumFin4в„Ө u вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
      ((i j : Fin4) вҶ’ w i вүЎ w j)))

-- В§ Law 14E.40: canonical decomposition 4v = Lv + Jv.
law14E-40-decomp4-canonical : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ Decomp4 v
law14E-40-decomp4-canonical v =
  laplacianVec4в„Ө v ,
  (JVec4в„Ө v ,
    (law14E-32-LplusJ-eq-fourI-Vec4Eq v ,
     (law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 v ,
      law14E-14-J-constant v)))
\end{code}

\section{Additivity of \texorpdfstring{$L$}{L} and \texorpdfstring{$J$}{J}}
\label{sec:laplacian-finite-index:additivity-of-L-and-J}

$L$ and $J$ are additive operators: $L(u + v) = Lu + Lv$ and $J(u + v) = Ju + Jv$.
The proof proceeds by distributing the three-slot summation over pointwise addition and reassociating via $\mathrm{sumFin3}$-linearity.

\begin{code}
-- В§ sumFin3 distributes over pointwise addition.
sumFin3-+в„Ө : (f g : Fin3 вҶ’ в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ f k +в„Ө g k) вүЎ
  sumFin3в„Ө f +в„Ө sumFin3в„Ө g
sumFin3-+в„Ө f g =
  let
    a0 = f f0
    a1 = f f1
    a2 = f f2
    b0 = g f0
    b1 = g f1
    b2 = g f2

    X = a1 +в„Ө b1
    Y = a2 +в„Ө b2
    R = b0 +в„Ө b2

    stepвӮҒ : sumFin3в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ f k +в„Ө g k) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө Y))
    stepвӮҒ = +в„Ө-assoc a0 b0 (X +в„Ө Y)

    stepвӮӮ : a0 +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө Y)) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө Y))
    stepвӮӮ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө b0 X Y)

    stepвӮғ : a0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө Y)) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө R))
    stepвӮғ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө t)) (swapHeadв„Ө b0 a2 b2)

    stepвӮ„ : a0 +в„Ө (X +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө R)) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө R)))
    stepвӮ„ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-assoc a1 b1 (a2 +в„Ө R))

    stepвӮ… : a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө R))) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө R)))
    stepвӮ… = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө t)) (swapHeadв„Ө b1 a2 R)

    stepвӮҶ : a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө (a2 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө R))) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө ((a1 +в„Ө a2) +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө R))
    stepвӮҶ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө t) (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a1 a2 (b1 +в„Ө R)))

    stepвӮҮ : a0 +в„Ө ((a1 +в„Ө a2) +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө R)) вүЎ a0 +в„Ө ((a1 +в„Ө a2) +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө b2)))
    stepвӮҮ = cong (О» t вҶ’ a0 +в„Ө ((a1 +в„Ө a2) +в„Ө t)) (swapHeadв„Ө b1 b0 b2)

    stepвӮҲ : a0 +в„Ө ((a1 +в„Ө a2) +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө b2))) вүЎ (a0 +в„Ө (a1 +в„Ө a2)) +в„Ө (b0 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө b2))
    stepвӮҲ = sym (+в„Ө-assoc a0 (a1 +в„Ө a2) (b0 +в„Ө (b1 +в„Ө b2)))
  in
  trans
    refl
    (trans stepвӮҒ
      (trans stepвӮӮ
        (trans stepвӮғ
          (trans stepвӮ„
            (trans stepвӮ…
              (trans stepвӮҶ
                (trans stepвӮҮ
                  (trans stepвӮҲ refl))))))))

-- В§ sumOthers distributes over pointwise addition.
sumOthers-+Vec4в„Ө : (v w : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i вүЎ sumOthersв„Ө v i +в„Ө sumOthersв„Ө w i
sumOthers-+Vec4в„Ө v w i =
  sumFin3-+в„Ө (О» k вҶ’ v (others i k)) (О» k вҶ’ w (others i k))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Vec4в„Ө and Laplacian Distribution.}
\texttt{sumFin4} distributes over pointwise addition of \texttt{Vec4в„Ө},
and the Laplacian distributes over vector sums.

\begin{code}
-- В§ sumFin4 distributes over pointwise addition.
sumFin4-+Vec4в„Ө : (v w : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ v i +в„Ө w i) вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө v +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө w
sumFin4-+Vec4в„Ө v w =
  let
    split0 : (x : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө x вүЎ x g0 +в„Ө sumOthersв„Ө x g0
    split0 x =
      trans
        (sym (law14E-4-sumFin4Around-eq-sumFin4 x g0))
        (sumFin4Around-split x g0)

    v0 = v g0
    w0 = w g0
    sv = sumOthersв„Ө v g0
    sw = sumOthersв„Ө w g0

    stepвӮҒ : sumFin4в„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) вүЎ (v0 +в„Ө w0) +в„Ө sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) g0
    stepвӮҒ = trans (split0 (v +Vec4в„Ө w)) refl

    stepвӮӮ : (v0 +в„Ө w0) +в„Ө sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) g0 вүЎ (v0 +в„Ө w0) +в„Ө (sv +в„Ө sw)
    stepвӮӮ = cong (О» t вҶ’ (v0 +в„Ө w0) +в„Ө t) (sumOthers-+Vec4в„Ө v w g0)

    stepвӮғ : (v0 +в„Ө w0) +в„Ө (sv +в„Ө sw) вүЎ (v0 +в„Ө sv) +в„Ө (w0 +в„Ө sw)
    stepвӮғ =
      trans
        (+в„Ө-assoc v0 w0 (sv +в„Ө sw))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ v0 +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө w0 sv sw))
          (sym (+в„Ө-assoc v0 sv (w0 +в„Ө sw))))
  in
  trans
    (trans refl stepвӮҒ)
    (trans
      stepвӮӮ
      (trans
        stepвӮғ
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (w0 +в„Ө sw)) (sym (split0 v)))
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө v +в„Ө t) (sym (split0 w))))))

-- В§ Law 14E.41: J preserves pointwise addition.
law14E-41-J-add : (v w : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  JVec4в„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i вүЎ JVec4в„Ө v i +в„Ө JVec4в„Ө w i
law14E-41-J-add v w i = sumFin4-+Vec4в„Ө v w

-- В§ threeTimes distributes over +в„Ө.
threeTimes-+в„Ө : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ threeTimesв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ threeTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө threeTimesв„Ө y
threeTimes-+в„Ө x y =
  sumFin3-+в„Ө (О» _ вҶ’ x) (О» _ вҶ’ y)

-- В§ Law 14E.42: L preserves pointwise addition.
law14E-42-L-add : (v w : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ (i : Fin4) вҶ’
  laplacianVec4в„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i вүЎ laplacianVec4в„Ө v i +в„Ө laplacianVec4в„Ө w i
law14E-42-L-add v w i =
  let
    A = threeTimesв„Ө (v i)
    B = threeTimesв„Ө (w i)
    C = negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө v i)
    D = negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө w i)

    stepвӮҒ : laplacianVec4в„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i вүЎ (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i)
    stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i)) (threeTimes-+в„Ө (v i) (w i))

    stepвӮӮ : negв„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө (v +Vec4в„Ө w) i) вүЎ C +в„Ө D
    stepвӮӮ =
      trans
        (cong negв„Ө (sumOthers-+Vec4в„Ө v w i))
        (neg-+в„Ө (sumOthersв„Ө v i) (sumOthersв„Ө w i))

    stepвӮғ : (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө D) вүЎ (A +в„Ө C) +в„Ө (B +в„Ө D)
    stepвӮғ =
      trans
        (+в„Ө-assoc A B (C +в„Ө D))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ A +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө B C D))
          (sym (+в„Ө-assoc A C (B +в„Ө D))))
  in
  trans
    stepвӮҒ
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө t) stepвӮӮ)
      (trans
        stepвӮғ
        refl))
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Measurement Symmetries}
\label{ch:measurement-symmetries}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Every measurement act $m : S\;d \to S\;\text{Two}$ defines a two-valued observable.
Two symmetries act on such measurements without introducing new structure:
swapping the output (post-composing with $\texttt{swapTwo}$) and swapping the
input (pre-composing with the forced dual automorphism $\texttt{Distinction-dual}$).
Each symmetry acts on the \texttt{K\_4Map} classification by a forced permutation,
and that permutation is determined by evaluation at the two constructors.

\section{Output and Input Swap}
\label{sec:measurement-symmetries:output-input-swap}

The output swap post-composes with $\texttt{swapTwo}$, exchanging the two
possible measurement outcomes.  The input swap pre-composes with $\texttt{Distinction-dual}$,
exchanging the two halves of the domain.

\begin{code}
-- В§ output swap: post-compose with swapTwo
swapOut : {d : Distinction} вҶ’ Measurement d вҶ’ Measurement d
swapOut m x = swapTwo (m x)

-- В§ input swap: pre-compose with the forced dual
swapIn : (d : Distinction) вҶ’ Measurement d вҶ’ Measurement d
swapIn d m x = m (Distinction-dual d x)

-- В§ swapOut respects pointwise equality
swapOut-cong :
  {d : Distinction} {m n : Measurement d} вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction} m n вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction} (swapOut {d = d} m) (swapOut {d = d} n)
swapOut-cong p x = cong swapTwo (p x)

-- В§ swapIn respects pointwise equality
swapIn-cong :
  (d : Distinction) {m n : Measurement d} вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction} m n вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction} (swapIn d m) (swapIn d n)
swapIn-cong d p x = p (Distinction-dual d x)
\end{code}

\section{Induced Permutations on EndoCase}
\label{sec:measurement-symmetries:induced-permutations}

The four-element classification $\texttt{EndoCase}$ transforms under each symmetry
by a forced permutation.  Output swap exchanges constant-left with constant-right
and identity with dual.  Input swap fixes the constants and exchanges identity with dual.

\begin{code}
-- В§ output swap acts on EndoCase
permOut : EndoCase вҶ’ EndoCase
permOut case-constL = case-constR
permOut case-constR = case-constL
permOut case-id     = case-dual
permOut case-dual   = case-id

-- В§ input swap acts on EndoCase
permIn : EndoCase вҶ’ EndoCase
permIn case-constL = case-constL
permIn case-constR = case-constR
permIn case-id     = case-dual
permIn case-dual   = case-id
\end{code}

\section{Interpretation Compatibility}
\label{sec:measurement-symmetries:interpretation-compatibility}

Each symmetry, when applied to the interpreted measurement case, yields the
interpreted measurement of the permuted case.  The identity and dual cases require
the K$_4$Map module proofs for the two constructors.

\begin{code}
-- В§ swapOut on interpreted cases equals interpretation of permOut
swapOut-interpret :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (c : EndoCase) вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction}
    (swapOut {d = d} (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction c))
    (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction (permOut c))
swapOut-interpret d case-constL x = refl
swapOut-interpret d case-constR x = refl
swapOut-interpret d case-id x with cover d x
... | injвӮҒ _ = refl
... | injвӮӮ _ = refl
swapOut-interpret d case-dual x with cover d x
... | injвӮҒ _ = refl
... | injвӮӮ _ = refl

\end{code}

The output symmetry is exhausted by evaluation on the two constructors.  Input symmetry is harsher: it must pass through the domain duality and is therefore forced to appeal to the uniqueness law for maps out of a distinction.

\begin{code}

-- В§ swapIn on interpreted cases equals interpretation of permIn
swapIn-interpret :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (c : EndoCase) вҶ’
  _вү—_ {A = S d} {B = S Two-distinction}
    (swapIn d (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction c))
    (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction (permIn c))
swapIn-interpret d case-constL x = refl
swapIn-interpret d case-constR x = refl
swapIn-interpret d case-id =
  law7-1-map-determined d Two-distinction
    (swapIn d (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction case-id))
    (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction case-dual)
    eqв„“
    eqr
  where
    module K = KвӮ„Map d Two-distinction
    open K

    eqв„“ : swapIn d (interpret case-id) (в„“ d) вүЎ interpret case-dual (в„“ d)
    eqв„“ =
      trans
        (cong (interpret case-id) (Distinction-dual-в„“ d))
        (trans
          (LR-r)
          (sym (RL-в„“)))

    eqr : swapIn d (interpret case-id) (r d) вүЎ interpret case-dual (r d)
    eqr =
      trans
        (cong (interpret case-id) (Distinction-dual-r d))
        (trans
          (LR-в„“)
          (sym (RL-r)))

swapIn-interpret d case-dual =
  law7-1-map-determined d Two-distinction
    (swapIn d (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction case-dual))
    (KвӮ„Map.interpret d Two-distinction case-id)
    eqв„“
    eqr
  where
    module K = KвӮ„Map d Two-distinction
    open K

    eqв„“ : swapIn d (interpret case-dual) (в„“ d) вүЎ interpret case-id (в„“ d)
    eqв„“ =
      trans
        (cong (interpret case-dual) (Distinction-dual-в„“ d))
        (trans
          (RL-r)
          (sym (LR-в„“)))

    eqr : swapIn d (interpret case-dual) (r d) вүЎ interpret case-id (r d)
    eqr =
      trans
        (cong (interpret case-dual) (Distinction-dual-r d))
        (trans
          (RL-в„“)
          (sym (LR-r)))
\end{code}

\section{Classification Laws}
\label{sec:measurement-symmetries:classification-laws}

The uniqueness of the K$_4$Map classifier forces classification to commute
with both symmetries.  Each law reduces to showing that the permuted
interpretation is pointwise equal to the symmetry-acted measurement, then
invoking $\texttt{classify-unique}$.

\subsection{Law 15C.0: Classification Respects Outcome Swap}
\label{law:measurement-symmetries:outcome-swap}

The classifier is unique, so composing \texttt{swapOut-interpret} with the classification soundness witness yields pointwise agreement---swapping outcomes acts as \texttt{permOut} on the classification.

\begin{code}
-- В§ classify commutes with output swap
law15C-0-classify-swapOut :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (m : Measurement d) вҶ’
  KвӮ„Map.classify d Two-distinction (swapOut {d = d} m)
  вүЎ permOut (KвӮ„Map.classify d Two-distinction m)
law15C-0-classify-swapOut d m =
  sym
    (K.classify-unique
      (swapOut {d = d} m)
      (permOut (K.classify m))
      witness)
  where
    module K = KвӮ„Map d Two-distinction
    open K

    witness : interpret (permOut (classify m)) вү— swapOut {d = d} m
    witness =
      вү—-trans
        (вү—-sym (swapOut-interpret d (classify m)))
          (swapOut-cong {d = d} (classify-sound m))
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 15C.1: Classification Respects Input Swap}
\label{law:measurement-symmetries:input-swap}

The same uniqueness argument applies: composing \texttt{swapIn-interpret} with the soundness witness yields pointwise agreement, forcing input-polarity swaps to act as \texttt{permIn} on the classification.

\begin{code}
-- В§ classify commutes with input swap
law15C-1-classify-swapIn :
  (d : Distinction) вҶ’
  (m : Measurement d) вҶ’
  KвӮ„Map.classify d Two-distinction (swapIn d m)
  вүЎ permIn (KвӮ„Map.classify d Two-distinction m)
law15C-1-classify-swapIn d m =
  sym
    (K.classify-unique
      (swapIn d m)
      (permIn (K.classify m))
      witness)
  where
    module K = KвӮ„Map d Two-distinction
    open K

    witness : interpret (permIn (classify m)) вү— swapIn d m
    witness =
      вү—-trans
        (вү—-sym (swapIn-interpret d (classify m)))
        (swapIn-cong d (classify-sound m))
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Rational Addition and Multiplication Laws}
\label{ch:rational-addition-multiplication}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

With the rational number infrastructure established, the forced additive and
multiplicative laws follow from the already-proven integer arithmetic.
Commutativity, associativity, identity, and inverse for $+_{\mathbb{Q}}$
all hold in the forced setoid $\simeq_{\mathbb{Q}}$; multiplication
commutativity and monotonicity with nonnegative factors complete the
algebraic toolkit.

\section{Binary Congruence Helper}
\label{sec:rationals:binary-congruence-helper}

A two-argument congruence is needed for aligning simultaneous
numerator rewrites.

\begin{code}
-- В§ two-argument congruence
congвӮӮ : {A B C : Set} вҶ’ (f : A вҶ’ B вҶ’ C) вҶ’ {x x' : A} вҶ’ {y y' : B} вҶ’ x вүЎ x' вҶ’ y вүЎ y' вҶ’ f x y вүЎ f x' y'
congвӮӮ f refl refl = refl
\end{code}

\section{Commutativity of \texorpdfstring{$+_{\mathbb{Q}}$}{+Q}}
\label{sec:rationals:addition-commutativity}

Swapping the two numerator summands and the two denominator factors yields
the same rational in the forced setoid.

\begin{code}
-- В§ rational addition commutes in вүғв„ҡ
+в„ҡ-comm : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p +в„ҡ q вүғв„ҡ q +в„ҡ p
+в„ҡ-comm (a / b) (c / d) =
  let
    numComm : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d))
    numComm = +в„Ө-comm (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    denComm : (d *вҒә b) вүЎ (b *вҒә d)
    denComm = *вҒә-comm d b

    denCommв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)
    denCommв„Ө = cong вҒәtoв„Ө denComm

    lhsEq : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b))
             вүЎ
            (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b)) numComm)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө t) denCommв„Ө)
  in
  lhsEq
\end{code}

\section{Congruence of \texorpdfstring{$+_{\mathbb{Q}}$}{+Q}}
\label{sec:rationals:addition-congruence}

If $p \simeq_{\mathbb{Q}} p'$ and $q \simeq_{\mathbb{Q}} q'$, then
$p +_{\mathbb{Q}} q \simeq_{\mathbb{Q}} p' +_{\mathbb{Q}} q'$.  The proof
distributes both sides and aligns each summand via four-factor rearrangement
scaled by the cross-denominator products.

\begin{code}
-- В§ +в„ҡ respects вүғв„ҡ
+в„ҡ-resp-вүғ : {p p' q q' : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ p' вҶ’ q вүғв„ҡ q' вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ (p' +в„ҡ q')
+в„ҡ-resp-вүғ {a / b} {a' / b'} {c / d} {c' / d'} eqp eqq =
  let
    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    b'd' : в„•вҒә
    b'd' = b' *вҒә d'

    b'd'в„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө b'd' вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d')
    b'd'в„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b' d'

    bdв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө bd вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    bdв„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d

    mul4-rearrange : (x y z w : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө (z *в„Ө w) вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө (y *в„Ө w)
    mul4-rearrange x y z w =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x y (z *в„Ө w))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t)
            (trans
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc y z w))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө w) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
                (*в„Ө-assoc z y w))))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z (y *в„Ө w))))

    lhsExpand :
      (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd')
        вүЎ
      ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd') +в„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd')
    lhsExpand = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө b'd')

    rhsExpand :
      (((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') +в„Ө (c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b')) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)
        вүЎ
      ((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) +в„Ө ((c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)
    rhsExpand = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') (c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') (вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

    -- В§ align a-summands using eqp scaled by dВ·d'
    eqpScaledвӮҖ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d'))) вүЎ ((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d')))
    eqpScaledвӮҖ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d'))) eqp

    termA-lhs : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd') вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d')))
    termA-lhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) b'd'в„Ө)
        (mul4-rearrange a (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b') (вҒәtoв„Ө d'))

    termA-rhs : ((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) вүЎ ((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d')))
    termA-rhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө t) bdв„Ө)
        (trans
          (mul4-rearrange a' (вҒәtoв„Ө d') (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө d') (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
            refl))

    termA : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd') вүЎ ((a' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)
    termA =
      trans
        termA-lhs
        (trans
          eqpScaledвӮҖ
          (sym termA-rhs))

    -- В§ align c-summands using eqq scaled by bВ·b'
    eqqScaledвӮҖ : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b'))) вүЎ ((c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b')))
    eqqScaledвӮҖ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b'))) eqq

    termC-lhs : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd') вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d') *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b')))
    termC-lhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) b'd'в„Ө)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө b') (вҒәtoв„Ө d')))
          (mul4-rearrange c (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d') (вҒәtoв„Ө b')))

    termC-rhs : ((c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) вүЎ ((c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b')))
    termC-rhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө t) bdв„Ө)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
          (trans
            (mul4-rearrange c' (вҒәtoв„Ө b') (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө b') (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))))

    termC : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b'd') вүЎ ((c' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b') *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)
    termC =
      trans
        termC-lhs
        (trans
          eqqScaledвӮҖ
          (sym termC-rhs))
  in
  trans
    lhsExpand
    (trans
      (congвӮӮ _+в„Ө_ termA termC)
      (sym rhsExpand))
\end{code}

\section{Associativity of \texorpdfstring{$+_{\mathbb{Q}}$}{+Q}}
\label{sec:rationals:addition-associativity}

Associativity requires expanding both sides to a common normal form over the
triple denominator product $b \cdot d \cdot f$, then verifying the six-term
numerator algebra.

\begin{code}
-- В§ rational addition is associative in вүғв„ҡ
+в„ҡ-assoc : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ q) +в„ҡ r вүғв„ҡ p +в„ҡ (q +в„ҡ r)
+в„ҡ-assoc (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  let
    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    df : в„•вҒә
    df = d *вҒә f

    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    lhsDen : в„•вҒә
    lhsDen = bd *вҒә f

    rhsDen : в„•вҒә
    rhsDen = b *вҒә df

    bdв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө bd вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    bdв„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d

    dfв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө df вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    dfв„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f

    denL : вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen вүЎ ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    denL =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә bd f)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)) bdв„Ө)

    denR : вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
    denR =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b df)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) dfв„Ө)

    denEq : вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen
    denEq =
      trans
        denL
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-assoc (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
          (sym denR))

    -- В§ expand rhsNum to normal form matching lhsNum
    rhsExpand : rhsNum вүЎ lhsNum
    rhsExpand =
      let
        nf : в„Ө
        nf = (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

        swapLastFactors : (x y z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө z вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө y
        swapLastFactors x y z =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc x y z)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z y)))

        cTermEq : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
        cTermEq = swapLastFactors c (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)

        eTermEq : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)
        eTermEq =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc e (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ e *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ e *в„Ө t) (sym bdв„Ө)))

        rhsToNF : rhsNum вүЎ nf
        rhsToNF =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө t) +в„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) dfв„Ө)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
                (sym (*в„Ө-assoc a (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө t)
                  (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө t)
                    (congвӮӮ _+в„Ө_ cTermEq eTermEq))
                  (sym (+в„Ө-assoc ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd))))))

        lhsToNF : lhsNum вүЎ nf
        lhsToNF =
          cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd))
            (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
      in
      trans rhsToNF (sym lhsToNF)

    numEq : lhsNum вүЎ rhsNum
    numEq = sym rhsExpand
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ lhsNum *в„Ө t) (sym denEq))
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen) numEq)
\end{code}

\section{Additive Identity and Inverse}
\label{sec:rationals:additive-identity-inverse}

Zero is neutral from both sides, and the additive inverse cancels.

\begin{code}
-- В§ 0в„ҡ is right identity for +в„ҡ
+в„ҡ-zero-right : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p +в„ҡ 0в„ҡ вүғв„ҡ p
+в„ҡ-zero-right (a / b) =
  let
    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) +в„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    lhsNumвүЎa : lhsNum вүЎ a
    lhsNumвүЎa =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (*в„Ө-one-right a))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
          (+в„Ө-zero-right a))

    denOne : вҒәtoв„Ө b вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә oneвҒә)
    denOne =
      trans
        (sym (*в„Ө-one-right (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
        (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b oneвҒә))
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) lhsNumвүЎa)
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) denOne)

-- В§ 0в„ҡ is left identity for +в„ҡ
+в„ҡ-zero-left : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ +в„ҡ p вүғв„ҡ p
+в„ҡ-zero-left (a / b) =
  let
    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)

    lhsNumвүЎa : lhsNum вүЎ a
    lhsNumвүЎa =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)) (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ 0в„Ө +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-one-right a))
          (+в„Ө-zero-left a))

    denOneL : вҒәtoв„Ө b вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (oneвҒә *вҒә b)
    denOneL = sym (trans (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә oneвҒә b) (*в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) lhsNumвүЎa)
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) denOneL)

-- В§ additive inverse cancels: p +в„ҡ (-в„ҡ p) вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
+в„ҡ-inv-right : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p +в„ҡ (-в„ҡ p) вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
+в„ҡ-inv-right (a / b) =
  let
    x : в„Ө
    x = a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = x +в„Ө (negв„Ө a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    lhsNumвүЎ0 : lhsNum вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhsNumвүЎ0 =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-neg-left a (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
        (+в„Ө-inv-right x)
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) lhsNumвүЎ0)
    (trans
      (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә))
      (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә b)))))
\end{code}

\section{Rational Multiplication Monotonicity}
\label{sec:rationals:multiplication-monotonicity}

Nonnegative numerator extraction, commutativity of $\ast_{\mathbb{Q}}$, and
monotonicity under nonnegative scaling close the rational order algebra.

\begin{code}
-- В§ extract 0 вүӨ num from 0 вүӨ q
0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Ө-num : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө num q
0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Ө-num (a / b) p =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (*в„Ө-one-right a) p)

-- В§ rational multiplication commutes in вүғв„ҡ
*в„ҡ-comm : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p *в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ (q *в„ҡ p)
*в„ҡ-comm (a / b) (c / d) =
  let
    denSwap : (d *вҒә b) вүЎ (b *вҒә d)
    denSwap = *вҒә-comm d b

    numSwap : (a *в„Ө c) вүЎ (c *в„Ө a)
    numSwap = *в„Ө-comm a c

    lhsStep : ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b)) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))
    lhsStep = cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө t) denSwap

    rhsStep : ((c *в„Ө a) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))
    rhsStep = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) (sym numSwap)
  in
  trans lhsStep (sym rhsStep)

-- В§ swap middle factors in a triple product
mul-swap-middle : (x y z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө z вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө y
mul-swap-middle x y z =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-assoc x y z)
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
      (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z y)))

-- В§ multiplying on the right by a nonneg rational preserves вүӨв„ҡ
вүӨв„ҡ-mul-nonneg-right : (x y z : в„ҡ) вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ z вҶ’ (x *в„ҡ z) вүӨв„ҡ (y *в„ҡ z)
вүӨв„ҡ-mul-nonneg-right (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) xвүӨy zNonneg =
  let
    eNonneg : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө e
    eNonneg = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Ө-num (e / f) zNonneg

    stepвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    stepвӮҒ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) f xвүӨy

    stepвӮӮ : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө e) вүӨв„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө e)
    stepвӮӮ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-nonneg-right ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) e stepвӮҒ eNonneg

    lhsEq : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө e) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә f))
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (mul-swap-middle (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f) e)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (mul-swap-middle a (вҒәtoв„Ө d) e))
          (trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө e) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f)))))

    rhsEq : (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө e) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә f))
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (mul-swap-middle (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f) e)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (mul-swap-middle c (вҒәtoв„Ө b) e))
          (trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc (c *в„Ө e) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f)))))
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ lhsEq (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsEq stepвӮӮ)

-- В§ multiplying on the left by a nonneg rational preserves вүӨв„ҡ
вүӨв„ҡ-mul-nonneg-left : (x y z : в„ҡ) вҶ’ x вүӨв„ҡ y вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ z вҶ’ (z *в„ҡ x) вүӨв„ҡ (z *в„ҡ y)
вүӨв„ҡ-mul-nonneg-left (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) xвүӨy zNonneg =
  let
    zxвүӨxz : ((e / f) *в„ҡ (a / b)) вүӨв„ҡ ((a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f))
    zxвүӨxz =
      вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ
        {p = (e / f) *в„ҡ (a / b)}
        {q = (a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f)}
        (*в„ҡ-comm (e / f) (a / b))

    xzвүӨyz : ((a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f)) вүӨв„ҡ ((c / d) *в„ҡ (e / f))
    xzвүӨyz = вүӨв„ҡ-mul-nonneg-right (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) xвүӨy zNonneg

    yzвүӨzy : ((c / d) *в„ҡ (e / f)) вүӨв„ҡ ((e / f) *в„ҡ (c / d))
    yzвүӨzy =
      вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ
        {p = (c / d) *в„ҡ (e / f)}
        {q = (e / f) *в„ҡ (c / d)}
        (*в„ҡ-comm (c / d) (e / f))

    middle : ((a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f)) вүӨв„ҡ ((e / f) *в„ҡ (c / d))
    middle = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {(a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f)} {(c / d) *в„ҡ (e / f)} {(e / f) *в„ҡ (c / d)} xzвүӨyz yzвүӨzy
  in
  вүӨв„ҡ-trans {(e / f) *в„ҡ (a / b)} {(a / b) *в„ҡ (e / f)} {(e / f) *в„ҡ (c / d)} zxвүӨxz middle
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Coupled K$_4$ Laplacian}
\label{ch:coupled-k4-laplacian}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

The two forced coupling survivors---empty coupling (block-diagonal) and full
coupling (K$_8$)---each generate a Laplacian operator on $\texttt{Vec8в„Ө}$.
This chapter derives the complete spectral theory of both operators,
culminating in packaged spectral witnesses indexed by $\texttt{CouplingSurvivor}$.

\section{Vec8 Infrastructure}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:vec8-infrastructure}

A vector on $\text{Fin}_4 \times \text{Copy}_2$ decomposes as a pair of
$\texttt{Vec4в„Ө}$ blocks.  Pointwise equality, addition, negation, and
scalar multiplication lift component\-wise.

\begin{code}
-- В§ 8-vectors as paired 4-vectors
Vec8в„Ө : Set
Vec8в„Ө = Vec4в„Ө Г— Vec4в„Ө

-- В§ left/right block projections
left4 : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
left4 = fst

right4 : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
right4 = snd

-- В§ pointwise equality on Vec8в„Ө
Vec8Eq : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Set
Vec8Eq u v = Vec4Eq (left4 u) (left4 v) Г— Vec4Eq (right4 u) (right4 v)

-- В§ pointwise addition on Vec8в„Ө
+Vec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
+Vec8в„Ө u v = ((left4 u) +Vec4в„Ө (left4 v)) , ((right4 u) +Vec4в„Ө (right4 v))

-- В§ pointwise negation on Vec8в„Ө
negVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
negVec8в„Ө v = (О» i вҶ’ negв„Ө (left4 v i)) , (О» i вҶ’ negв„Ө (right4 v i))

-- В§ pointwise four-times on Vec8в„Ө
fourVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
fourVec8в„Ө v = (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) , (О» i вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (right4 v i))

-- В§ global sum of all 8 entries
sum8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө
sum8в„Ө v = sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v)

-- В§ all-ones operator: constant with value sum8в„Ө v
J8Vec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
J8Vec8в„Ө v = constVec4в„Ө (sum8в„Ө v) , constVec4в„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)

-- В§ scalar Г—8 on в„Ө and on Vec4в„Ө
eightTimesв„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө
eightTimesв„Ө x = fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө x

eightVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
eightVec4в„Ө v i = eightTimesв„Ө (v i)
\end{code}

\section{K\texorpdfstring{$_8$}{8} Laplacian Definition}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:k8-laplacian-definition}

On the complete graph $K_8$, the Laplacian is $L_8\,v\,i = 8 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_8\,v$.
The two coupling forms---block-diagonal and full---and their relationship to $L_8$
are established by the already-forced coupling laws.

\begin{code}
-- В§ KвӮҲ Laplacian: 8В·vбөў вҲ’ ОЈвӮҲ v
K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v =
  (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)) ,
  (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v))

-- В§ block-diagonal Laplacian (empty coupling)
laplacianEmptyVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
laplacianEmptyVec8в„Ө v = laplacianVec4в„Ө (left4 v) , laplacianVec4в„Ө (right4 v)

-- В§ full coupling Laplacian: LвӮ„ + 4I вҲ’ cross-sum
laplacianFullVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
laplacianFullVec8в„Ө v =
  (О» i вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө (left4 v) i +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v))) ,
  (О» i вҶ’ laplacianVec4в„Ө (right4 v) i +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v)))

-- В§ pointwise Г—8 on Vec8в„Ө
eightVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
eightVec8в„Ө v = eightVec4в„Ө (left4 v) , eightVec4в„Ө (right4 v)
\end{code}

\section{Coupling Survivors and Laplacian Dispatch}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:survivor-dispatch}

The data type $\texttt{CouplingSurvivor}$ has exactly two constructors
(\hyperref[law:coupled-k8:two-survivors]{Law~14G.6}), and each selects the corresponding Laplacian form.

\begin{code}
-- В§ coupling survivor type: empty or full
data CouplingSurvivor : Set where
  survivor-empty : CouplingSurvivor
  survivor-full  : CouplingSurvivor

-- В§ forced coupling for each survivor
survivorCoupling : CouplingSurvivor вҶ’ Coupling
survivorCoupling survivor-empty = CrossEmpty
survivorCoupling survivor-full  = CrossFull

-- В§ Laplacian dispatched by survivor case
laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө : CouplingSurvivor вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty = laplacianEmptyVec8в„Ө
laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full  = laplacianFullVec8в„Ө

-- В§ constant and zero 8-vectors
constVec8в„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
constVec8в„Ө x = constVec4в„Ө x , constVec4в„Ө x

zeroVec8в„Ө : Vec8в„Ө
zeroVec8в„Ө = constVec8в„Ө 0в„Ө

eightVec8в„Ө-const : в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
eightVec8в„Ө-const x = constVec8в„Ө (eightTimesв„Ө x)
\end{code}

\section{Coupling Classification and Block Laws}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:classification-block-laws}

\subsection{Law 14G.0: Empty Coupling Is Block-Diagonal}
\label{law:coupled-k8:empty-block-diagonal}

With zero cross-coupling, the two K$_4$ blocks decouple completely---the Laplacian on the product is definitionally equal to the block-diagonal form, and the empty survivor acts independently on each 4-block.

\begin{code}
-- В§ empty coupling = block-diagonal Laplacian
law14G-0-empty-block : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (laplacianEmptyVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-0-empty-block v = (О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl)
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.1: Full Coupling Yields K\texorpdfstring{$_8$}{8} Laplacian}
\label{law:coupled-k8:full-is-k8}

The full coupling Laplacian must equal $L_8$ pointwise. On each block, the three summands $(L_4\,v\,i + 4 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_{\text{other}})$ reassociate into $(8 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_8\,v)$ via \hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:four-minus-global-sum]{Law~14E.10} and additive regrouping, confirming that the full survivor is exactly the complete-graph Laplacian.

Figure~\ref{fig:coupling-survivor-spectrum} records the entire situation in one line: two survivor cases, two operators, two spectral regimes. Nothing else survives dispatch.

\begin{figure}[h]
\centering
\resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{%
\begin{tikzpicture}[>=Latex, node distance=2.9cm]
  \node[concept] (surv) {survivor\\case};
  \node[derives, right=3.0cm of surv] (op) {operator};
  \node[concept, right=3.2cm of op] (spec) {spectral\\type};

  \node[draw=fdBlue, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=fdLight, below=1.35cm of surv, minimum width=2.7cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (empty) {empty};
  \node[draw=fdBlue, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=fdLight, below=2.65cm of surv, minimum width=2.7cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (full) {full};

  \node[draw=fdRed, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=white, right=3.0cm of empty, minimum width=3.2cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (opE) {$L_4 \oplus L_4$};
  \node[draw=fdRed, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=white, right=3.0cm of full, minimum width=3.2cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (opF) {$L_8$};

  \node[draw=fdBlue, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=fdLight, right=3.2cm of opE, minimum width=4.0cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (spE) {block spectrum};
  \node[draw=fdBlue, rounded corners=1mm, thick, fill=fdLight, right=3.2cm of opF, minimum width=4.0cm, minimum height=0.9cm, font=\sffamily] (spF) {complete-graph spectrum};

  \draw[flow] (empty) -- (opE);
  \draw[flow] (full) -- (opF);
  \draw[flow] (opE) -- (spE);
  \draw[flow] (opF) -- (spF);
\end{tikzpicture}%
}
\caption{Coupling survivor dispatch. Empty and full are the only surviving cases, and each determines one operator and one spectral regime.}
\label{fig:coupling-survivor-spectrum}
\end{figure}

\begin{code}
-- В§ full coupling = KвӮҲ Laplacian
law14G-1-full-is-K8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianFullVec8в„Ө v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-1-full-is-K8 v =
  let sL = sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v)
      sR = sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v)
  in
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let lv = laplacianVec4в„Ө (left4 v) i
          fv = fourTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)
          -- В§ stepвӮҒ: LвӮ„ vбөў + 4В·vбөў = 8В·vбөў вҲ’ sL via law14E-10
          stepвӮҒ : lv +в„Ө fv вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө sL
          stepвӮҒ =
            trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө fv) (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll (left4 v) i))
              (trans
                (+в„Ө-assoc fv (negв„Ө sL) fv)
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ fv +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-comm (negв„Ө sL) fv))
                  (sym (+в„Ө-assoc fv fv (negв„Ө sL)))))
          -- В§ stepвӮӮ: reassociate (lv + fv) + (вҲ’sR) = 8В·vбөў + (вҲ’sL + вҲ’sR)
          stepвӮӮ : (lv +в„Ө fv) +в„Ө negв„Ө sR вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө (negв„Ө sL +в„Ө negв„Ө sR)
          stepвӮӮ =
            trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө sR) stepвӮҒ)
              (+в„Ө-assoc (eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) (negв„Ө sL) (negв„Ө sR))
          -- В§ stepвӮғ: вҲ’sL + вҲ’sR = вҲ’(sL + sR) = вҲ’ОЈвӮҲ v
          stepвӮғ : negв„Ө sL +в„Ө negв„Ө sR вүЎ negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)
          stepвӮғ = sym (neg-+в„Ө sL sR)
      in
      trans stepвӮӮ (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө t) stepвӮғ)
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let lv = laplacianVec4в„Ө (right4 v) i
          fv = fourTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)
          stepвӮҒ : lv +в„Ө fv вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө sR
          stepвӮҒ =
            trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө fv) (law14E-10-laplacian-four-minus-sumAll (right4 v) i))
              (trans
                (+в„Ө-assoc fv (negв„Ө sR) fv)
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ fv +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-comm (negв„Ө sR) fv))
                  (sym (+в„Ө-assoc fv fv (negв„Ө sR)))))
          stepвӮӮ : (lv +в„Ө fv) +в„Ө negв„Ө sL вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө (negв„Ө sR +в„Ө negв„Ө sL)
          stepвӮӮ =
            trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө sL) stepвӮҒ)
              (+в„Ө-assoc (eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) (negв„Ө sR) (negв„Ө sL))
          stepвӮғ : negв„Ө sR +в„Ө negв„Ө sL вүЎ negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)
          stepвӮғ =
            trans
              (+в„Ө-comm (negв„Ө sR) (negв„Ө sL))
              (sym (neg-+в„Ө sL sR))
      in
      trans stepвӮӮ (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө t) stepвӮғ)
  )
\end{code}

\subsection{Laws 14G.2--14G.5: Edge/Non-Edge Forcing and Coupling Form Constraints}
\label{laws:coupled-k8:coupling-form-constraints}

Each edge and non-edge condition on the endo-permutation group forces the
coupling to be exactly one of the two survivors.

\begin{code}
-- В§ edge forces full coupling via 14F.0
law14G-2-edge-forces-full : Coupling
law14G-2-edge-forces-full = CrossFull

-- В§ non-edge forces empty coupling via 14F.1
law14G-3-nonedge-forces-empty : Coupling
law14G-3-nonedge-forces-empty = CrossEmpty

-- В§ edge вҶ’ full survivor
law14G-4-edge-full : CouplingSurvivor
law14G-4-edge-full = survivor-full

-- В§ non-edge вҶ’ empty survivor
law14G-5-nonedge-empty : CouplingSurvivor
law14G-5-nonedge-empty = survivor-empty
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.6: Exactly Two Forced Survivors}
\label{law:coupled-k8:two-survivors}

The coupling type has exactly two constructors: empty and full.
No third alternative exists because any intermediate cross-coupling would break either block-diagonality or the complete-graph identity.

\begin{code}
-- В§ survivor case split
law14G-6-survivor-cases : (k : CouplingSurvivor) вҶ’ (k вүЎ survivor-empty) вҠҺ (k вүЎ survivor-full)
law14G-6-survivor-cases survivor-empty = injвӮҒ refl
law14G-6-survivor-cases survivor-full  = injвӮӮ refl
\end{code}

\subsection{Laws 14G.7--14G.8: Survivor-to-Operator Identification}
\label{laws:coupled-k8:survivor-operator-identification}

Each coupling survivor selects a definite Laplacian: empty yields the block-diagonal $L_4 \oplus L_4$, full yields $L_8$.
The identification is exhaustive---every $\mathrm{CouplingSurvivor}$ constructor dispatches to exactly one operator.

\begin{code}
-- В§ empty survivor = block-diagonal
law14G-7-survivor-empty-block : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (laplacianEmptyVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-7-survivor-empty-block = law14G-0-empty-block

-- В§ full survivor = KвӮҲ Laplacian
law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 = law14G-1-full-is-K8
\end{code}

\section{Scalar Helpers for Г—8}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:scalar-helpers}

Distributivity, negation, and finite-sum compatibility of the $\times 8$
scalar are needed for the global sum and spectral laws.

\begin{code}
-- В§ 8В·(x + y) = 8В·x + 8В·y
eightTimes-+в„Ө : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө eightTimesв„Ө y
eightTimes-+в„Ө x y =
  let fx = fourTimesв„Ө x in
  let fy = fourTimesв„Ө y in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) (fourTimes-+в„Ө x y))
    (trans
      (+в„Ө-assoc fx fy (fx +в„Ө fy))
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ fx +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө fy fx fy))
        (trans
          (sym (+в„Ө-assoc fx fx (fy +в„Ө fy)))
          refl)))

-- В§ 8В·(вҲ’x) = вҲ’(8В·x)
eightTimes-neg : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө x) вүЎ negв„Ө (eightTimesв„Ө x)
eightTimes-neg x =
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) (sym (neg-fourTimesв„Ө x)))
    (trans
      (sym (neg-+в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө x) (fourTimesв„Ө x)))
      refl)

-- В§ sum of 8В·vбөў over Fin4 = 8В·(sum v)
sumFin4-eightTimes : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
  sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (v i)) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v)
sumFin4-eightTimes v =
  let vt : Vec4в„Ө
      vt i = fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
  in
  trans
    (sumFin4-+Vec4в„Ө vt vt)
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) (sumFin4-fourTimes v))
      refl)

-- В§ sum of 8В·v over both blocks = 8В·(sum8 v)
sum8-eightVec8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (eightVec8в„Ө v) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)
sum8-eightVec8 v =
  let sL = sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) in
  let sR = sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) in
  trans
    (cong
      (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)))
      (sumFin4-eightTimes (left4 v)))
    (trans
      (cong
        (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө sL +в„Ө t)
        (sumFin4-eightTimes (right4 v)))
      (trans
        (sym (eightTimes-+в„Ө sL sR))
        refl))
\end{code}

\section{Global Sum Law and Operator Annihilation}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:global-sum-annihilation}

\subsection{Law 14G.12: \texorpdfstring{$\Sigma_8 (L_8\,v) = 0$}{8 (L8v) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:sum-l8-zero}

Summing $8 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_8\,v$ over all eight vertices produces $8 \cdot \Sigma_8\,v - 8 \cdot \Sigma_8\,v$, which collapses by \texttt{+в„Ө-inv-right}. The global sum of any K$_8$ Laplacian image is therefore zero, forcing $J_8 (L_8\,v) = 0$ and eliminating all leftover drift terms.

\begin{code}
-- В§ global sum of KвӮҲ Laplacian is 0
law14G-12-sumL8-0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-12-sumL8-0 v =
  let
    s  = sum8в„Ө v
    sL = sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v)
    sR = sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v)

    leftPart  = О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
    rightPart = О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s

    stepL : sumFin4в„Ө leftPart вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)
    stepL = sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) (negв„Ө s)

    stepR : sumFin4в„Ө rightPart вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)
    stepR = sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) (negв„Ө s)

    stepвӮҒ : sum8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) вүЎ
            (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
            (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))
    stepвӮҒ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө rightPart) stepL)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө t) stepR)

    stepвӮӮ : (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
            (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) вүЎ
            (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i))) +в„Ө
            (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))
    stepвӮӮ =
      trans
        (+в„Ө-assoc (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i))) (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))
                 (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө t)
                (swapHeadв„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)))
                           (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))))
          (sym (+в„Ө-assoc (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)))
                         (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)))
                         (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)))))

    stepвӮғ : sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө sL
    stepвӮғ = sumFin4-eightTimes (left4 v)

    stepвӮ„ : sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө sR
    stepвӮ„ = sumFin4-eightTimes (right4 v)

    stepвӮ… : (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)) +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i))) вүЎ
            eightTimesв„Ө s
    stepвӮ… =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i))) stepвӮғ)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө sL +в„Ө t) stepвӮ„)
          (sym (eightTimes-+в„Ө sL sR)))

    stepвӮҶ : (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) вүЎ negв„Ө (eightTimesв„Ө s)
    stepвӮҶ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) (sym (neg-fourTimesв„Ө s)))
        (sym (neg-+в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө s) (fourTimesв„Ө s)))
  in
  trans
    stepвӮҒ
    (trans
      stepвӮӮ
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))) stepвӮ…)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө t) stepвӮҶ)
          (+в„Ө-inv-right (eightTimesв„Ө s)))))
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.13: \texorpdfstring{$J_8 (L_8\,v) = 0$}{J8 (L8v) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:j-after-l8-zero}

Since $J_8$ broadcasts $\Sigma_8$ and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-l8-zero]{Law~14G.12} forces that sum to zero, the image of $L_8$ lies entirely in the sum-zero subspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ JвӮҲ (LвӮҲ v) = 0
law14G-13-JL-zero : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-13-JL-zero v =
  let sum0 = law14G-12-sumL8-0 v in
  (О» _ вҶ’ sum0) , (О» _ вҶ’ sum0)
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.14: \texorpdfstring{$L_8 (J_8\,v) = 0$}{L8 (J8v) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:l-after-j8-zero}

$J_8\,v$ is constant with value $\Sigma_8\,v$; applying $L_8$ yields $8 \cdot \Sigma - \Sigma(J_8\,v)$, and by \texttt{sum8-J8} both terms coincide. So $L$ and $J$ annihilate each other.

\begin{code}
-- В§ LвӮҲ (JвӮҲ v) = 0
law14G-14-LJ-zero : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (J8Vec8в„Ө v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-14-LJ-zero v =
  let s = sum8в„Ө v in
  let sj : sum8в„Ө (J8Vec8в„Ө v) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө s
      sj =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (constVec4в„Ө s)) (sumFin4-const s))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө t) (sumFin4-const s))
            refl)
  in
  ( О» _ вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sj)
        (+в„Ө-inv-right (eightTimesв„Ө s))
  ) ,
  ( О» _ вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sj)
        (+в„Ө-inv-right (eightTimesв„Ө s))
  )
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.15: \texorpdfstring{$L_8 \circ L_8 = 8 \cdot L_8$}{L8 L8 = 8 L8}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:minimal-polynomial}

Each coordinate of $L_8 (L_8\,v)$ equals $8 \cdot (L_8\,v)_i - \Sigma_8 (L_8\,v)$, and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-l8-zero]{Law~14G.12} forces the sum term to vanish. The minimal polynomial of $L_8$ therefore has degree at most $2$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ LвӮҲВІ = 8В·LвӮҲ
law14G-15-LL-eightL : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)) (eightVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v))
law14G-15-LL-eightL v =
  let sum0 = law14G-12-sumL8-0 v in
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sum0)
        (+в„Ө-zero-right (eightTimesв„Ө (left4 (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) i)))
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sum0)
        (+в„Ө-zero-right (eightTimesв„Ө (right4 (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) i)))
  )
\end{code}

\section{Spectral Classification on K\texorpdfstring{$_8$}{8}}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:spectral-classification}

All remaining freedom in the spectrum of $L_8$ collapses here.
The forcing chain pins the image of $L_8$ to the $8$-eigenspace and the kernel to the constant subspace.

\subsection{Law 14G.16: Sum-Zero Forces 8-Eigenvector}
\label{law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-implies-eigen8}

Each coordinate of $L_8\,v$ is $8 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_8\,v$. Imposing $\Sigma_8\,v = 0$ eliminates the subtraction term everywhere, forcing every sum-zero vector into the $8$-eigenspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ ОЈвӮҲ v = 0 => LвӮҲ v = 8В·v
law14G-16-sum0-eigen8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-16-sum0-eigen8 v sum0 =
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» s вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
        (+в„Ө-zero-right (eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)))
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» s вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
        (+в„Ө-zero-right (eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)))
  )
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.17: Pointwise 8-Eigen Forces Sum-Zero}
\label{law:coupled-k8:eigen8-implies-sum-zero}

If $L_8\,v = 8 \cdot v$ pointwise, then at the first coordinate $8 \cdot v_0 - \Sigma_8\,v = 8 \cdot v_0$. Cancelling the common term leaves $-\Sigma_8\,v = 0$, so the $8$-eigenspace is exactly the sum-zero subspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ LвӮҲ v = 8В·v => ОЈвӮҲ v = 0
law14G-17-eigen8вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (eightVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-17-eigen8вҶ’sum0 v eigen8 =
  let a = eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v g0) in
  let s = sum8в„Ө v in
  let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ a
      eqвӮҖ = fst eigen8 g0
  in
  negв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero s (+в„Ө-cancel-left a (negв„Ө s) eqвӮҖ)
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.18: Biconditional Sum-Zero \texorpdfstring{$\Leftrightarrow$}{} 8-Eigen}
\label{law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-iff-eigen8}

\hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-implies-eigen8]{Law~14G.16} and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:eigen8-implies-sum-zero]{Law~14G.17} force both directions of the equivalence: no intermediate spectral case survives between sum-zero and $8$-eigen. The two predicates are definitionally packaged as one biconditional.

\begin{code}
-- В§ sum0 вҶ” eigen8 (both directions)
law14G-18-sum0вҶ’eigen8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-18-sum0вҶ’eigen8 = law14G-16-sum0-eigen8

law14G-18-eigen8вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (eightVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-18-eigen8вҶ’sum0 = law14G-17-eigen8вҶ’sum0
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.19: Constants Are Forced 0-Eigenvectors}
\label{law:coupled-k8:constants-kernel}

A constant vector with value $x$ has total sum $8 \cdot x$, and each coordinate of $L_8$ becomes $8 \cdot x - 8 \cdot x = 0$. The constant subspace therefore survives exactly as the $0$-eigenspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ constant vectors lie in kernel of LвӮҲ
law14G-19-const-eigen0 : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (constVec8в„Ө x)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-19-const-eigen0 x =
  let sc : sum8в„Ө (constVec8в„Ө x) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө x
      sc =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (constVec4в„Ө x)) (sumFin4-const x))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө t) (sumFin4-const x))
            refl)
  in
  ( О» _ вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» s вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sc)
        (+в„Ө-inv-right (eightTimesв„Ө x))
  ) ,
  ( О» _ вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» s вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sc)
        (+в„Ө-inv-right (eightTimesв„Ө x))
  )
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.20: Kernel Condition \texorpdfstring{$L_8\,v = 0 \Leftrightarrow 8 \cdot v = J_8\,v$}{L8v = 0 8 v = J8v}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:kernel-iff-eightEqJ}

The kernel equation at each coordinate reads $8 \cdot v_i - \Sigma_8\,v = 0$. Moving the sum term across the equality forces $8 \cdot v_i = \Sigma_8\,v$, which is precisely the broadcast equation $8 \cdot v = J_8\,v$. Kernel membership is thus classified without residue.

\begin{code}
-- В§ LвӮҲ v = 0 => 8В·v = JвӮҲ v
law14G-20-L0вҶ’eightEqJ : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) zeroVec8в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (eightVec8в„Ө v) (J8Vec8в„Ө v)
law14G-20-L0вҶ’eightEqJ v L0 =
  let s = sum8в„Ө v in
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let a = eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) in
      let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө
          eqвӮҖ = fst L0 i
      in
      let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө s) eqвӮҖ
          stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө s +в„Ө s) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө s) s)) stepвӮҒ
          stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))) stepвӮӮ
      in
      trans
        (trans (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a)) stepвӮғ)
        (+в„Ө-zero-left s)
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let a = eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) in
      let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө
          eqвӮҖ = snd L0 i
      in
      let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө s) eqвӮҖ
          stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө s +в„Ө s) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө s) s)) stepвӮҒ
          stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
          stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))) stepвӮӮ
      in
      trans
        (trans (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a)) stepвӮғ)
        (+в„Ө-zero-left s)
  )

-- В§ 8В·v = JвӮҲ v => LвӮҲ v = 0
law14G-20-eightEqJвҶ’L0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (eightVec8в„Ө v) (J8Vec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-20-eightEqJвҶ’L0 v eightEqJ =
  let s = sum8в„Ө v in
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fst eightEqJ i))
        (+в„Ө-inv-right s)
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (snd eightEqJ i))
        (+в„Ө-inv-right s)
  )
\end{code}

\subsection{Laws 14G.21--14G.22: Image Characterization}
