\label{laws:coupled-k8:image-characterization}

The image of $L_8$ is obtained by applying $L_8$ once, so \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:minimal-polynomial]{Law~14G.15} applies immediately and pins every image vector to the $8$-eigenspace. \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-implies-eigen8]{Law~14G.16} then confirms that every sum-zero vector supplies an explicit preimage after $8$-scaling---the image and the $8$-eigenspace coincide.

\begin{code}
-- В§ image vectors are 8-eigenvectors
law14G-21-imageвҠҶeigen8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)) (eightVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v))
law14G-21-imageвҠҶeigen8 = law14G-15-LL-eightL

-- В§ sum-zero vectors become image vectors after 8-scaling
law14G-22-sum0вҶ’eightInImage : (w : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө w вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ ОЈ Vec8в„Ө (О» v вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (eightVec8в„Ө w))
law14G-22-sum0вҶ’eightInImage w sum0 = w , law14G-16-sum0-eigen8 w sum0
\end{code}

\section{Transport Lemmas}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:transport-lemmas}

Pointwise equality must propagate through sums, scaling, and the K$_8$ Laplacian without bookkeeping ambiguity. Each lemma below fixes exactly one transport path.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Vec8Eq reflexivity
Vec8Eq-refl : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq v v
Vec8Eq-refl v = (О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl)

-- В§ Vec8Eq symmetry
Vec8Eq-sym : {u v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’ Vec8Eq u v вҶ’ Vec8Eq v u
Vec8Eq-sym eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ sym (fst eq i)) ,
  (О» i вҶ’ sym (snd eq i))

-- В§ Vec8Eq transitivity
Vec8Eq-trans : {u v w : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’ Vec8Eq u v вҶ’ Vec8Eq v w вҶ’ Vec8Eq u w
Vec8Eq-trans eqвӮҒ eqвӮӮ =
  (О» i вҶ’ trans (fst eqвӮҒ i) (fst eqвӮӮ i)) ,
  (О» i вҶ’ trans (snd eqвӮҒ i) (snd eqвӮӮ i))

-- В§ sumFin4 respects pointwise equality
sumFin4-cong : (f g : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec4Eq f g вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө f вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө g
sumFin4-cong f g eq =
  trans
    (cong (О» a вҶ’ sum4в„Ө a (f g1) (f g2) (f g3)) (eq g0))
    (trans
      (cong (О» b вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (g g0) b (f g2) (f g3)) (eq g1))
      (trans
        (cong (О» c вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (g g0) (g g1) c (f g3)) (eq g2))
        (cong (О» d вҶ’ sum4в„Ө (g g0) (g g1) (g g2) d) (eq g3))))

-- В§ sum8 respects Vec8Eq
sum8-cong : (u v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq u v вҶ’ sum8в„Ө u вүЎ sum8в„Ө v
sum8-cong u v eq =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (right4 u)) (sumFin4-cong (left4 u) (left4 v) (fst eq))
  в–ё О» pL вҶ’
  trans pL
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) +в„Ө t) (sumFin4-cong (right4 u) (right4 v) (snd eq)))
  where
    infixl 1 _в–ё_
    _в–ё_ : {A B : Set} вҶ’ A вҶ’ (A вҶ’ B) вҶ’ B
    x в–ё k = k x

-- В§ eightVec8 respects Vec8Eq
eightVec8-cong : (u v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq u v вҶ’ Vec8Eq (eightVec8в„Ө u) (eightVec8в„Ө v)
eightVec8-cong u v eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ cong eightTimesв„Ө (fst eq i)) ,
  (О» i вҶ’ cong eightTimesв„Ө (snd eq i))

-- В§ KвӮҲ Laplacian respects Vec8Eq
K8Laplacian-cong : (u v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq u v вҶ’ Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө u) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)
K8Laplacian-cong u v eq =
  let sEq : sum8в„Ө u вүЎ sum8в„Ө v
      sEq = sum8-cong u v eq
      nsEq : negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө u) вүЎ negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө v)
      nsEq = cong negв„Ө sEq
  in
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let aEq : eightTimesв„Ө (left4 u i) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i)
          aEq = cong eightTimesв„Ө (fst eq i)
      in
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө u)) aEq)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (left4 v i) +в„Ө t) nsEq)
  ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’
      let aEq : eightTimesв„Ө (right4 u i) вүЎ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i)
          aEq = cong eightTimesв„Ө (snd eq i)
      in
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum8в„Ө u)) aEq)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ eightTimesв„Ө (right4 v i) +в„Ө t) nsEq)
  )
\end{code}

\section{Full Survivor: Forced Spectral Consequences}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:full-survivor-consequences}

The already-forced K$_8$ spectral laws transfer directly to the full survivor.
\hyperref[laws:coupled-k8:survivor-operator-identification]{Law~14G.8} eliminates any distinction between the full survivor Laplacian and $L_8$, so every remaining consequence is forced by transport.

\subsection{Law 14G.23: \texorpdfstring{$\Sigma_8 (L_{\mathrm{full}}\,v) = 0$}{8 (Lfullv) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:full-sum-zero}

The full survivor coincides pointwise with $L_8$ by \hyperref[laws:coupled-k8:survivor-operator-identification]{Law~14G.8}, so the sum computation reduces to \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-l8-zero]{Law~14G.12} directly---the full-survivor image is forced into the sum-zero subspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ global sum of the full-survivor Laplacian is 0
law14G-23-sumL-survivor-full-0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-23-sumL-survivor-full-0 v =
  trans
    (sum8-cong (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) (law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 v))
    (law14G-12-sumL8-0 v)
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.24: \texorpdfstring{$J_8 (L_{\mathrm{full}}\,v) = 0$}{J8 (Lfullv) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:full-jl-zero}

Because $J_8$ broadcasts the global sum of its input and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:full-sum-zero]{Law~14G.23} forces that sum to vanish, $J_8$ annihilates every vector in the full-survivor image.

\begin{code}
-- В§ JвӮҲ annihilates full-survivor image
law14G-24-JL-survivor-full-zero : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-24-JL-survivor-full-zero v =
  let sum0 = law14G-23-sumL-survivor-full-0 v in
  (О» _ вҶ’ sum0) , (О» _ вҶ’ sum0)
\end{code}

\subsection{Laws 14G.25--14G.26: Sum-Zero \texorpdfstring{$\Leftrightarrow$}{} 8-Eigen for Full Survivor}
\label{laws:coupled-k8:full-sum-zero-iff-eigen8}

Under \hyperref[laws:coupled-k8:survivor-operator-identification]{Law~14G.8} the full survivor is $L_8$, so \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-implies-eigen8]{Law~14G.16} and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:eigen8-implies-sum-zero]{Law~14G.17} transfer across that identification without adding new cases. Sum-zero and $8$-eigen remain the unique surviving conditions.

\begin{code}
-- В§ sum-zero вҶ’ 8-eigenvector for full survivor
law14G-25-survivor-full-sum0вҶ’eigen8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-25-survivor-full-sum0вҶ’eigen8 v sum0 =
  Vec8Eq-trans
    (law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 v)
    (law14G-16-sum0-eigen8 v sum0)

-- В§ 8-eigenvector вҶ’ sum-zero for full survivor
law14G-26-survivor-full-eigen8вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-26-survivor-full-eigen8вҶ’sum0 v eigen8 =
  law14G-17-eigen8вҶ’sum0 v
    (Vec8Eq-trans
      (Vec8Eq-sym (law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 v))
      eigen8)
\end{code}

\section{Empty Survivor: Forced Block Spectral Consequences}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:empty-survivor-consequences}

The empty survivor reduces to two independent K$_4$ blocks.
Block diagonality eliminates every cross-term, so the surviving spectral laws are forced blockwise from the earlier K$_4$ development.

\subsection{Law 14G.27: \texorpdfstring{$\Sigma_8 (L_{\mathrm{empty}}\,v) = 0$}{8 (Lemptyv) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:empty-sum-zero}

Block diagonality splits the total sum of the empty survivor into the left and right K$_4$ Laplacian sums. \hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:sum-laplacian-zero]{Law~14E.28} forces each block sum to vanish independently, so the empty-survivor image lies in the global sum-zero subspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ global sum of empty-survivor Laplacian is 0
law14G-27-sumL-survivor-empty-0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
law14G-27-sumL-survivor-empty-0 v =
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (laplacianVec4в„Ө (right4 v))) (law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 (left4 v)))
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ 0в„Ө +в„Ө t) (law14E-28-sumLaplacian0 (right4 v)))
      (+в„Ө-zero-left 0в„Ө))
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.28: \texorpdfstring{$J_8 (L_{\mathrm{empty}}\,v) = 0$}{J8 (Lemptyv) = 0}}
\label{law:coupled-k8:empty-jl-zero}

Since $J_8$ depends only on the global sum of its input and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:empty-sum-zero]{Law~14G.27} eliminates that sum, the empty-survivor image is annihilated by $J_8$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ JвӮҲ annihilates empty-survivor image
law14G-28-JL-survivor-empty-zero : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-28-JL-survivor-empty-zero v =
  let sum0 = law14G-27-sumL-survivor-empty-0 v in
  (О» _ вҶ’ sum0) , (О» _ вҶ’ sum0)
\end{code}

\subsection{Laws 14G.29--14G.30: Blockwise Sum-Zero \texorpdfstring{$\Leftrightarrow$}{} 4-Eigen for Empty Survivor}
\label{laws:coupled-k8:empty-blockwise-sum-zero-iff-eigen4}

The empty survivor acts as two independent K$_4$ Laplacians. \hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:sum-zero-implies-eigen4]{Law~14E.11} and \hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:eigen4-implies-sum-zero]{Law~14E.19} classify each block separately, leaving no mixed alternative---blockwise sum-zero and pointwise $4$-eigen are the unique surviving conditions.

\begin{code}
-- В§ blockwise sum-zero вҶ’ pointwise 4-eigenvector for empty survivor
law14G-29-survivor-empty-sum0вҶ’eigen4 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v)
law14G-29-survivor-empty-sum0вҶ’eigen4 v sum0L sum0R =
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 (left4 v) i sum0L ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-11-sum0-eigen4 (right4 v) i sum0R )

-- В§ pointwise 4-eigen вҶ’ blockwise sum-zero for empty survivor
law14G-30-survivor-empty-eigen4вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’
  (sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— (sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө)
law14G-30-survivor-empty-eigen4вҶ’sum0 v eigen4 =
  law14E-19-eigen4вҶ’sum0 (left4 v) (fst eigen4) ,
  law14E-19-eigen4вҶ’sum0 (right4 v) (snd eigen4)
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.31: Split Constants Are 0-Eigenvectors of the Empty Survivor}
\label{law:coupled-k8:split-constants-kernel-empty}

On each block, a constant vector is already a forced $0$-eigenvector of the K$_4$ Laplacian. Block diagonality prevents the two constants from interacting across blocks, so split constants survive exactly as kernel witnesses for the empty survivor.

\begin{code}
-- В§ split constant vector
constVec8Splitв„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө
constVec8Splitв„Ө x y = constVec4в„Ө x , constVec4в„Ө y

-- В§ split constants lie in kernel of empty survivor
law14G-31-splitConst-eigen0-empty : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (constVec8Splitв„Ө x y)) zeroVec8в„Ө
law14G-31-splitConst-eigen0-empty x y =
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-13-const-eigen0 x i ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-13-const-eigen0 y i )
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.32: Empty Survivor Image is 4-Eigen}
\label{law:coupled-k8:empty-image-eigen4}

Applying the empty survivor twice applies each K$_4$ Laplacian twice on its own block. \hyperref[law:laplacian-finite-index:minimal-polynomial]{Law~14E.29} collapses each repeated block action to $4$ times the first image, forcing every vector in the empty-survivor image into the $4$-eigenspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ image of empty survivor вҠҶ 4-eigenspace
law14G-32-imageEmptyвҠҶeigen4 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))
        (fourVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))
law14G-32-imageEmptyвҠҶeigen4 v =
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-29-LL-fourL (left4 v) i ) ,
  ( О» i вҶ’ law14E-29-LL-fourL (right4 v) i )
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.33: Sum-Zero \texorpdfstring{$\Rightarrow$}{} Image Witness After 4-Scaling}
\label{law:coupled-k8:sum-zero-image-witness-empty}

\hyperref[laws:coupled-k8:empty-blockwise-sum-zero-iff-eigen4]{Law~14G.29} already forces a blockwise sum-zero vector to satisfy the empty-survivor eigenvalue equation. Choosing the vector itself as preimage eliminates any search for an additional witness---every blockwise sum-zero vector has an explicit image witness after $4$-scaling.

\begin{code}
-- В§ blockwise sum-zero вҶ’ 4В·v is in the image
law14G-33-sum0вҶ’fourInImage-empty : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’
  ОЈ Vec8в„Ө (О» w вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty w) (fourVec8в„Ө v))
law14G-33-sum0вҶ’fourInImage-empty v sum0L sum0R = v , law14G-29-survivor-empty-sum0вҶ’eigen4 v sum0L sum0R
\end{code}

\section{Full Survivor Image Law}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:full-survivor-image}

The image law for the full survivor is a direct transport consequence.
No new spectral case appears here; \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:minimal-polynomial]{Law~14G.15} is merely re-expressed through the survivor identification.

\subsection{Law 14G.34: Full Survivor Image \texorpdfstring{$\subseteq$}{} 8-Eigenspace}
\label{law:coupled-k8:full-image-eigen8}

The full survivor is identified with $L_8$ both before and after one further application, so the claim reduces to \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:minimal-polynomial]{Law~14G.15} by transport on both sides. Scaling congruence carries the codomain back, forcing the full-survivor image into the $8$-eigenspace.

\begin{code}
-- В§ full survivor image vectors are 8-eigenvectors
law14G-34-survivor-full-imageвҠҶeigen8 : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
        (eightVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
law14G-34-survivor-full-imageвҠҶeigen8 v =
  let eqV : Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)
      eqV = law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 v
      eqLL : Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
                   (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
      eqLL = law14G-8-survivor-full-K8 (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)
      stepвӮҒ : Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
                     (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v))
      stepвӮҒ =
        Vec8Eq-trans
          eqLL
          (K8Laplacian-cong (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) eqV)
      stepвӮӮ : Vec8Eq (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)) (eightVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v))
      stepвӮӮ = law14G-15-LL-eightL v
      stepвӮғ : Vec8Eq (eightVec8в„Ө (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v)) (eightVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
      stepвӮғ = Vec8Eq-sym (eightVec8-cong (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (K8LaplacianVec8в„Ө v) eqV)
  in
  Vec8Eq-trans stepвӮҒ (Vec8Eq-trans stepвӮӮ stepвӮғ)
\end{code}

\section{Survivor Spectral Packages}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:survivor-spectral-packages}

Packaging the already-forced survivor consequences into reusable witnesses
adds no new ontology---it only collects the eliminated cases into a single typed interface.

\subsection{Law 14G.35: Full Survivor Spectral Package}
\label{law:coupled-k8:full-spectral-package}

\hyperref[law:coupled-k8:full-sum-zero]{Law~14G.23}, \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:full-jl-zero]{Law~14G.24}, \hyperref[laws:coupled-k8:full-sum-zero-iff-eigen8]{Laws~14G.25--14G.26}, and \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:full-image-eigen8]{Law~14G.34} already force all full-survivor spectral data. Product formation collects those forced components without introducing any new branch, yielding a single composite spectral witness.

\begin{code}
-- В§ full survivor spectral package
law14G-35-survivor-full-spectral-package : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’
  (sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  ((sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)) Г—
   (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө)) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
         (eightVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)))
law14G-35-survivor-full-spectral-package v =
  law14G-23-sumL-survivor-full-0 v ,
  (law14G-24-JL-survivor-full-zero v ,
   ((law14G-25-survivor-full-sum0вҶ’eigen8 v , law14G-26-survivor-full-eigen8вҶ’sum0 v) ,
    law14G-34-survivor-full-imageвҠҶeigen8 v))
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.36: Empty Survivor Spectral Package}
\label{law:coupled-k8:empty-spectral-package}

\hyperref[law:coupled-k8:empty-sum-zero]{Law~14G.27} through \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:empty-image-eigen4]{Law~14G.32} already force the empty-survivor spectral data. The blockwise consequences and kernel witnesses are collected as one product---a single composite spectral witness for the empty survivor.

\begin{code}
-- В§ empty survivor spectral package
law14G-36-survivor-empty-spectral-package : (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’
  (sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  ((sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v)) Г—
   (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ (sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— (sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө))) Г—
  ((x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (constVec8Splitв„Ө x y)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))
         (fourVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v)))
law14G-36-survivor-empty-spectral-package v =
  law14G-27-sumL-survivor-empty-0 v ,
  (law14G-28-JL-survivor-empty-zero v ,
   ((law14G-29-survivor-empty-sum0вҶ’eigen4 v , law14G-30-survivor-empty-eigen4вҶ’sum0 v) ,
    (law14G-31-splitConst-eigen0-empty ,
     law14G-32-imageEmptyвҠҶeigen4 v)))
\end{code}

\subsection{Law 14G.37: Spectral Package by Forced Case Split}
\label{law:coupled-k8:spectral-package-case-split}

The survivor type has exactly two constructors by \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:two-survivors]{Law~14G.6}. Exhaustive case split eliminates every index except \texttt{survivor-empty} and \texttt{survivor-full}, forcing a uniform survivor-indexed spectral package for every case.

\begin{code}
-- В§ type-level spectral package indexed by survivor
SurvivorSpectralPackage : CouplingSurvivor вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Set
SurvivorSpectralPackage survivor-full v =
  (sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  ((sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)) Г—
   (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө)) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
         (eightVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v)))
SurvivorSpectralPackage survivor-empty v =
  (sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  ((sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v)) Г—
   (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v) вҶ’ (sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— (sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө))) Г—
  ((x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (constVec8Splitв„Ө x y)) zeroVec8в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))
         (fourVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v)))

-- В§ forced case-split over survivor constructors
law14G-37-survivor-spectral-package-byCases : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ SurvivorSpectralPackage k v
law14G-37-survivor-spectral-package-byCases k v with law14G-6-survivor-cases k
... | injвӮҒ refl = law14G-36-survivor-empty-spectral-package v
... | injвӮӮ refl = law14G-35-survivor-full-spectral-package v
\end{code}

\section{Spectral Package Projections}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:spectral-package-projections}

Each forced component of the survivor package is projected directly from the already-fixed product witness, without reopening the classification.

\begin{code}
-- В§ project drift-zero from package
survivorPkg-sumL0 : {k : CouplingSurvivor} {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage k v вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө k v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
survivorPkg-sumL0 {survivor-full} pkg = fst pkg
survivorPkg-sumL0 {survivor-empty} pkg = fst pkg

-- В§ project JL=0 from package
survivorPkg-JL0 : {k : CouplingSurvivor} {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage k v вҶ’ Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө k v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
survivorPkg-JL0 {survivor-full} pkg = fst (snd pkg)
survivorPkg-JL0 {survivor-empty} pkg = fst (snd pkg)

-- В§ sum-zero predicate indexed by survivor
SurvivorSum0 : CouplingSurvivor вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Set
SurvivorSum0 survivor-full v = sum8в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
SurvivorSum0 survivor-empty v = (sumFin4в„Ө (left4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— (sumFin4в„Ө (right4 v) вүЎ 0в„Ө)

-- В§ eigen predicate indexed by survivor
SurvivorEigen : (k : CouplingSurvivor) вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Set
SurvivorEigen survivor-full v =
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v) (eightVec8в„Ө v)
SurvivorEigen survivor-empty v =
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v) (fourVec8в„Ө v)

-- В§ project sum0вҶ’eigen direction
survivorPkg-sum0вҶ’eigen : {k : CouplingSurvivor} {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage k v вҶ’ SurvivorSum0 k v вҶ’ SurvivorEigen k v
survivorPkg-sum0вҶ’eigen {survivor-full} (_ , (_ , ((sum0вҶ’eigen , _) , _))) sum0 = sum0вҶ’eigen sum0
survivorPkg-sum0вҶ’eigen {survivor-empty} (_ , (_ , ((sum0вҶ’eigen , _) , _))) (sum0L , sum0R) = sum0вҶ’eigen sum0L sum0R

-- В§ project eigenвҶ’sum0 direction
survivorPkg-eigenвҶ’sum0 : {k : CouplingSurvivor} {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage k v вҶ’ SurvivorEigen k v вҶ’ SurvivorSum0 k v
survivorPkg-eigenвҶ’sum0 {survivor-full} (_ , (_ , ((_ , eigenвҶ’sum0) , _))) eigen = eigenвҶ’sum0 eigen
survivorPkg-eigenвҶ’sum0 {survivor-empty} (_ , (_ , ((_ , eigenвҶ’sum0) , _))) eigen = eigenвҶ’sum0 eigen

-- В§ image-eigen predicate indexed by survivor
SurvivorImageEigen : (k : CouplingSurvivor) вҶ’ Vec8в„Ө вҶ’ Set
SurvivorImageEigen survivor-full v =
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
        (eightVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-full v))
SurvivorImageEigen survivor-empty v =
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))
        (fourVec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty v))

-- В§ project imageвҠҶeigen from package
survivorPkg-imageвҠҶeigen : {k : CouplingSurvivor} {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage k v вҶ’ SurvivorImageEigen k v
survivorPkg-imageвҠҶeigen {survivor-full} (_ , (_ , (_ , imageвҠҶ))) = imageвҠҶ
survivorPkg-imageвҠҶeigen {survivor-empty} (_ , (_ , (_ , (_ , imageвҠҶ)))) = imageвҠҶ

-- В§ project split-constant kernel from empty package
survivorPkg-splitConstKernel : {v : Vec8в„Ө} вҶ’
  SurvivorSpectralPackage survivor-empty v вҶ’ (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (constVec8Splitв„Ө x y)) zeroVec8в„Ө
survivorPkg-splitConstKernel (_ , (_ , (_ , (splitConstKer , _)))) = splitConstKer
\end{code}

\section{Convenience Layer}
\label{sec:coupled-k8:convenience-layer}

Once the survivor index and vector are fixed, \hyperref[law:coupled-k8:spectral-package-case-split]{Law~14G.37} forces the package witness and every convenience projection follows without further case analysis.

\begin{code}
-- В§ construct package from (k, v)
survivorPkg : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ SurvivorSpectralPackage k v
survivorPkg = law14G-37-survivor-spectral-package-byCases

-- В§ convenience: sumL0
survivor-sumL0 : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ sum8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө k v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
survivor-sumL0 k v = survivorPkg-sumL0 (survivorPkg k v)

-- В§ convenience: JL=0
survivor-JL0 : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec8Eq (J8Vec8в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө k v)) zeroVec8в„Ө
survivor-JL0 k v = survivorPkg-JL0 (survivorPkg k v)

-- В§ convenience: sum0вҶ’eigen
survivor-sum0вҶ’eigen : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ SurvivorSum0 k v вҶ’ SurvivorEigen k v
survivor-sum0вҶ’eigen k v sum0 = survivorPkg-sum0вҶ’eigen (survivorPkg k v) sum0

-- В§ convenience: eigenвҶ’sum0
survivor-eigenвҶ’sum0 : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ SurvivorEigen k v вҶ’ SurvivorSum0 k v
survivor-eigenвҶ’sum0 k v eigen = survivorPkg-eigenвҶ’sum0 (survivorPkg k v) eigen

-- В§ convenience: imageвҠҶeigen
survivor-imageвҠҶeigen : (k : CouplingSurvivor) (v : Vec8в„Ө) вҶ’ SurvivorImageEigen k v
survivor-imageвҠҶeigen k v = survivorPkg-imageвҠҶeigen (survivorPkg k v)

-- В§ convenience: split-constant kernel
survivor-splitConstKernel : (v : Vec8в„Ө) (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec8Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec8в„Ө survivor-empty (constVec8Splitв„Ө x y)) zeroVec8в„Ө
survivor-splitConstKernel v x y = survivorPkg-splitConstKernel {v} (survivorPkg survivor-empty v) x y
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Triple K\texorpdfstring{$_4$}{4} Laplacian}
\label{ch:triple-laplacian}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

The two-copy coupled Laplacian of the previous chapter forced a binary
classification: full join or disjoint union, with eigenvalue $8$ governing the
spectral theory.  Three copies force the same elimination again, now under the
copy symmetry of $S_3$ and the endomorphism symmetries on each K$_4$ factor.
These constraints eliminate every intermediate coupling, force the same binary
survivors, and then force the $12$-vertex operator algebra and its spectral
packages.

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Copy\texorpdfstring{$_3$}{3} Infrastructure}
\label{sec:triple-k4:copy3-infrastructure}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Three copies, decidable equality for each pair, and the full symmetric group
$S_3$ are forced as the minimal copy infrastructure.  Representation freedom
collapses once the copy type, its equality test, and the six
explicit bijections that exhaust the copy symmetries are fixed.

\begin{code}
-- В§ three indistinguishable copies
data Copy3 : Set where
  CвӮҖ : Copy3
  CвӮҒ : Copy3
  CвӮӮ : Copy3

-- В§ copy-inequality predicate
Copy3вү  : (i j : Copy3) вҶ’ Set
Copy3вү  i j = i вүЎ j вҶ’ вҠҘ

CвӮҖвү CвӮҒ : Copy3вү  CвӮҖ CвӮҒ
CвӮҖвү CвӮҒ ()

CвӮҖвү CвӮӮ : Copy3вү  CвӮҖ CвӮӮ
CвӮҖвү CвӮӮ ()

CвӮҒвү CвӮӮ : Copy3вү  CвӮҒ CвӮӮ
CвӮҒвү CвӮӮ ()

-- В§ decidable equality on Copy3 (9 cases)
Copy3-decEq : (i j : Copy3) вҶ’ (i вүЎ j) вҠҺ (Copy3вү  i j)
Copy3-decEq CвӮҖ CвӮҖ = injвӮҒ refl
Copy3-decEq CвӮҒ CвӮҒ = injвӮҒ refl
Copy3-decEq CвӮӮ CвӮӮ = injвӮҒ refl
Copy3-decEq CвӮҖ CвӮҒ = injвӮӮ CвӮҖвү CвӮҒ
Copy3-decEq CвӮҒ CвӮҖ = injвӮӮ (О» e вҶ’ CвӮҖвү CвӮҒ (sym e))
Copy3-decEq CвӮҖ CвӮӮ = injвӮӮ CвӮҖвү CвӮӮ
Copy3-decEq CвӮӮ CвӮҖ = injвӮӮ (О» e вҶ’ CвӮҖвү CвӮӮ (sym e))
Copy3-decEq CвӮҒ CвӮӮ = injвӮӮ CвӮҒвү CвӮӮ
Copy3-decEq CвӮӮ CвӮҒ = injвӮӮ (О» e вҶ’ CвӮҒвү CвӮӮ (sym e))

-- В§ copy permutations (SвӮғ as explicit bijections)
record CopyPerm : Set where
  field
    to       : Copy3 вҶ’ Copy3
    from     : Copy3 вҶ’ Copy3
    to-from  : (y : Copy3) вҶ’ to (from y) вүЎ y
    from-to  : (x : Copy3) вҶ’ from (to x) вүЎ x

open CopyPerm public

-- В§ identity permutation
permIdвӮғ : CopyPerm
permIdвӮғ = record
  { to = О» x вҶ’ x
  ; from = О» x вҶ’ x
  ; to-from = О» _ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» _ вҶ’ refl
  }

-- В§ swap CвӮҖ вҶ” CвӮҒ
permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ : CopyPerm
permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ = record
  { to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
  ; from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
  ; to-from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  }
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Remaining Permutations.}
The swap $C_0 \leftrightarrow C_2$ and $C_1 \leftrightarrow C_2$
complete the symmetric group $S_3$ on three copies.

\begin{code}
-- В§ swap CвӮҖ вҶ” CвӮӮ
permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ : CopyPerm
permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ = record
  { to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
  ; from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
  ; to-from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  }

-- В§ swap CвӮҒ вҶ” CвӮӮ
permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ : CopyPerm
permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ = record
  { to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
  ; from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
  ; to-from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  }

-- В§ 3-cycle CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ : CopyPerm
permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ = record
  { to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
  ; from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
  ; to-from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  }

-- В§ 3-cycle CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ : CopyPerm
permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ = record
  { to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
  ; from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ CвӮҒ
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ CвӮӮ
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ CвӮҖ
  ; to-from = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  ; from-to = О» where
      CвӮҖ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮҒ вҶ’ refl
      CвӮӮ вҶ’ refl
  }
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Copy Transport and Cross-Coupling}
\label{sec:triple-k4:copy-transport-cross-coupling}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The transport laws for three-copy couplings are fixed here.
The four-argument transport and the exhaustive $6 \times 6$ pair table eliminate
all freedom in moving witnesses between ordered distinct copy pairs.

\begin{code}
-- В§ transport across four arguments (copies + endpoints)
transport4 : {C : Copy3 вҶ’ Copy3 вҶ’ EndoCase вҶ’ EndoCase вҶ’ Set}
  {c c' d d' : Copy3} {a a' b b' : EndoCase} вҶ’
  c вүЎ c' вҶ’ d вүЎ d' вҶ’ a вүЎ a' вҶ’ b вүЎ b' вҶ’ C c d a b вҶ’ C c' d' a' b'
transport4 {C = C} {c = c} {c' = c'} {d = d} {d' = d'} {a = a} {a' = a'} {b = b} {b' = b'} ec ed ea eb cab =
  subst (О» c0 вҶ’ C c0 d' a' b') ec
    (subst (О» d0 вҶ’ C c d0 a' b') ed
      (subst (О» a0 вҶ’ C c d a0 b') ea
        (subst (О» b0 вҶ’ C c d a b0) eb cab)))

-- В§ cross-coupling predicate among three copies
Coupling3 : Set1
Coupling3 = Copy3 вҶ’ Copy3 вҶ’ EndoCase вҶ’ EndoCase вҶ’ Set

EndoInv3 : Coupling3 вҶ’ Set
EndoInv3 C = (c d : Copy3) вҶ’ CrossInv (О» a b вҶ’ C c d a b)

CopyInv3 : Coupling3 вҶ’ Set
CopyInv3 C = (ПҖ : CopyPerm) вҶ’ (c d : Copy3) вҶ’ (a b : EndoCase) вҶ’ C c d a b вҶ’ C (to ПҖ c) (to ПҖ d) a b

-- В§ copy-pair transitivity: any ordered distinct pair maps to any other
sendPairвӮғ : (c0 d0 c d : Copy3) вҶ’ Copy3вү  c0 d0 вҶ’ Copy3вү  c d вҶ’
  ОЈ CopyPerm (О» ПҖ вҶ’ (to ПҖ c0 вүЎ c) Г— (to ПҖ d0 вүЎ d))
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ c d neq0 _ = вҠҘ-elim (neq0 refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ c d neq0 _ = вҠҘ-elim (neq0 refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ c d neq0 _ = вҠҘ-elim (neq0 refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ _ neq = вҠҘ-elim (neq refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)

sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮҒ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ CвӮӮ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮҖ _ _ = permCycleвӮҖвӮӮвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ _ _ = permSwapвӮҒвӮӮ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҖ _ _ = permSwapвӮҖвӮҒ , (refl , refl)
sendPairвӮғ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ CвӮӮ CвӮҒ _ _ = permIdвӮғ , (refl , refl)
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Coupling Classification}
\label{sec:triple-k4:coupling-classification}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The binary coupling dichotomy for three copies is forced here.
One cross-edge witness forces the complete join, one cross-non-edge witness
forces total separation, and no intermediate coupling survives the copy and
endomorphism symmetries.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14H.0: one cross-edge forces complete join across all copies
law14H-0-edge-forces-all-cross3 : (C : Coupling3) вҶ’ EndoInv3 C вҶ’ CopyInv3 C вҶ’
  ОЈ Copy3 (О» k0 вҶ’ ОЈ Copy3 (О» k1 вҶ’ (Copy3вү  k0 k1) Г— ОЈ EndoCase (О» a0 вҶ’ ОЈ EndoCase (О» b0 вҶ’ C k0 k1 a0 b0)))) вҶ’
  (c d : Copy3) вҶ’ Copy3вү  c d вҶ’ (a b : EndoCase) вҶ’ C c d a b
law14H-0-edge-forces-all-cross3 C endoInv copyInv (k0 , (k1 , (k0вү k1 , (a0 , (b0 , e0))))) c d cвү d a b =
  let
    pair = sendPairвӮғ k0 k1 c d k0вү k1 cвү d
  in
  let
    ПҖ = fst pair
    eqs = snd pair
    ec = fst eqs
    ed = snd eqs
    movedEdge : C c d a0 b0
    movedEdge = transport4 {C = C} ec ed refl refl (copyInv ПҖ k0 k1 a0 b0 e0)
  in
  law14F-0-edge-forces-all (О» x y вҶ’ C c d x y) (endoInv c d) (a0 , (b0 , movedEdge)) a b

-- В§ Law 14H.1: one cross-non-edge forces disjoint union across all copies
law14H-1-nonedge-forces-none-cross3 : (C : Coupling3) вҶ’ EndoInv3 C вҶ’ CopyInv3 C вҶ’
  ОЈ Copy3 (О» k0 вҶ’ ОЈ Copy3 (О» k1 вҶ’ (Copy3вү  k0 k1) Г— ОЈ EndoCase (О» a0 вҶ’ ОЈ EndoCase (О» b0 вҶ’ В¬ (C k0 k1 a0 b0))))) вҶ’
  (c d : Copy3) вҶ’ Copy3вү  c d вҶ’ (a b : EndoCase) вҶ’ В¬ (C c d a b)
law14H-1-nonedge-forces-none-cross3 C endoInv copyInv (k0 , (k1 , (k0вү k1 , (a0 , (b0 , n0))))) c d cвү d a b cab =
  let
    pair = sendPairвӮғ c d k0 k1 cвү d k0вү k1
  in
  let
    ПҖ = fst pair
    eqs = snd pair
    ec = fst eqs
    ed = snd eqs
    moved : C k0 k1 a b
    moved = transport4 {C = C} ec ed refl refl (copyInv ПҖ c d a b cab)
  in
  law14F-1-nonedge-forces-none (О» x y вҶ’ C k0 k1 x y) (endoInv k0 k1) (a0 , (b0 , n0)) a b moved

-- В§ canonical survivor couplings
CrossEmpty3 : Coupling3
CrossEmpty3 _ _ _ _ = вҠҘ

CrossFull3 : Coupling3
CrossFull3 _ _ _ _ = вҠӨ
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Vec\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Infrastructure}
\label{sec:triple-k4:vec12-infrastructure}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

A~12-vertex vector is three blocks of four, with block projections,
pointwise equality, and the global-sum and all-ones operators. Representation
freedom is eliminated by fixing the unique block decomposition on
which all later $K_{12}$ laws are forced.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Vec12в„Ө = three blocks of Vec4в„Ө
Vec12в„Ө : Set
Vec12в„Ө = Vec4в„Ө Г— (Vec4в„Ө Г— Vec4в„Ө)

-- В§ block projections
blockвӮҖ : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
blockвӮҖ = fst

blockвӮҒ : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
blockвӮҒ v = fst (snd v)

blockвӮӮ : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
blockвӮӮ v = snd (snd v)

-- В§ pointwise equality on Vec12в„Ө
Vec12Eq : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Set
Vec12Eq u v = Vec4Eq (blockвӮҖ u) (blockвӮҖ v) Г— Vec4Eq (blockвӮҒ u) (blockвӮҒ v) Г— Vec4Eq (blockвӮӮ u) (blockвӮӮ v)

-- В§ global sum: ОЈвӮҒвӮӮ v = ОЈвӮ„(blockвӮҖ) + ОЈвӮ„(blockвӮҒ) + ОЈвӮ„(blockвӮӮ)
sum12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө
sum12в„Ө v = sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v) +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v) +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v))

-- В§ global-sum operator JвӮҒвӮӮ: broadcast ОЈвӮҒвӮӮ to all 12 entries
J12Vec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
J12Vec12в„Ө v = (О» _ вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v) , ((О» _ вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v) , (О» _ вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v))

-- В§ 12В·x = 4В·x + 8В·x (forced decomposition)
twelveTimesв„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ в„Ө
twelveTimesв„Ө x = fourTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө eightTimesв„Ө x

-- В§ KвӮҒвӮӮ Laplacian (opaque)
opaque
  K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
  K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v =
    (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)) ,
    ((О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)) ,
     (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)))

-- В§ block-diagonal Laplacian (empty coupling)
laplacianEmptyVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
laplacianEmptyVec12в„Ө v = laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v) , (laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v) , laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v))

-- В§ full coupling = KвӮҒвӮӮ Laplacian
laplacianFullVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
laplacianFullVec12в„Ө = K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Survivor Dispatch and Vec\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Operations}
\label{sec:triple-k4:survivor-dispatch-vec12-operations}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The two survivor actions on Vec$_{12}$ and the operations
required to compare them are fixed here. The block-diagonal form, the full K$_{12}$ form,
and the binary survivor dispatch eliminate every remaining implementation
choice before the spectral laws begin.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14H.2: empty coupling is block-diagonal
law14H-2-empty-block : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (laplacianEmptyVec12в„Ө v)
         (laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v) , (laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v) , laplacianVec4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v)))
law14H-2-empty-block v = (О» _ вҶ’ refl) , ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl))

-- В§ Law 14H.3: full coupling collapses to KвӮҒвӮӮ spectral form
law14H-3-full-is-K12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (laplacianFullVec12в„Ө v) (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
law14H-3-full-is-K12 v = (О» _ вҶ’ refl) , ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl))

-- В§ two survivor kinds for the triple coupling
data Coupling3Survivor : Set where
  survivor3-empty : Coupling3Survivor
  survivor3-full  : Coupling3Survivor

-- В§ Law 14H.4: binary case split
law14H-4-survivor3-cases : (k : Coupling3Survivor) вҶ’ (k вүЎ survivor3-empty) вҠҺ (k вүЎ survivor3-full)
law14H-4-survivor3-cases survivor3-empty = injвӮҒ refl
law14H-4-survivor3-cases survivor3-full  = injвӮӮ refl

-- В§ survivor dispatch
laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө : Coupling3Survivor вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-empty = laplacianEmptyVec12в„Ө
laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full  = laplacianFullVec12в„Ө

-- В§ Vec12в„Ө arithmetic operations
_+Vec12в„Ө_ : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
(u +Vec12в„Ө v) =
  (blockвӮҖ u +Vec4в„Ө blockвӮҖ v) ,
  ((blockвӮҒ u +Vec4в„Ө blockвӮҒ v) ,
   (blockвӮӮ u +Vec4в„Ө blockвӮӮ v))

negVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
negVec12в„Ө v =
  (О» i вҶ’ negв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ negв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ negв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)))

twelveVec4в„Ө : Vec4в„Ө вҶ’ Vec4в„Ө
twelveVec4в„Ө v i = twelveTimesв„Ө (v i)

twelveVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
twelveVec12в„Ө v = twelveVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v) , (twelveVec4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v) , twelveVec4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v))

constVec12в„Ө : в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12в„Ө
constVec12в„Ө x = constVec4в„Ө x , (constVec4в„Ө x , constVec4в„Ө x)

zeroVec12в„Ө : Vec12в„Ө
zeroVec12в„Ө = constVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө

-- В§ sum of a constant vector
sum12-const : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө (constVec12в„Ө x) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө x
sum12-const x = refl

-- В§ sum of JвӮҒвӮӮ v
sum12-J12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)
sum12-J12 v = refl
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{K\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Operator Algebra}
\label{sec:triple-k4:k12-operator-algebra}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Once $L_{12}$ is fixed as $12I - J_{12}$, the operator algebra is forced.
The identities $J^2 = 12J$,
$L + J = 12I$, and the remaining operator equalities follow without further
branching.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14H.5: JвӮҒвӮӮВІ = 12В·JвӮҒвӮӮ
law14H-5-JJ-twelveJ : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v)) (twelveVec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v))
law14H-5-JJ-twelveJ v =
  (О» _ вҶ’ sum12-J12 v) ,
  ((О» _ вҶ’ sum12-J12 v) ,
   (О» _ вҶ’ sum12-J12 v))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Laplacian Operator Identities.}
With $J^2 = 12J$ established, the remaining operator identities require
unfolding the opaque Laplacian definition. The decomposition
$12v = Lv + Jv$, scalar distributivity of $12{\times}$, and the
sum--Laplacian commutation all follow inside a single opaque scope.

\begin{code}
opaque
  unfolding K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө

  -- В§ Law 14H.6: LвӮҒвӮӮ = 12В·I вҲ’ JвӮҒвӮӮ
  law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
    Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v +Vec12в„Ө negVec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v))
  law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v =
    (О» _ вҶ’ refl) ,
    ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) ,
     (О» _ вҶ’ refl))

  -- В§ Law 14H.7: 12В·v = LвӮҒвӮӮ v + JвӮҒвӮӮ v
  law14H-7-twelve-decomposes : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
    Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v +Vec12в„Ө J12Vec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
  law14H-7-twelve-decomposes v =
    let
      s = sum12в„Ө v

      cancel-twelve : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ x
      cancel-twelve x =
        trans
          (+в„Ө-assoc x (negв„Ө s) s)
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))
            (+в„Ө-zero-right x))
    in
    ( О» i вҶ’
        cancel-twelve (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i))
    ) ,
    (( О» i вҶ’
          cancel-twelve (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i))
      ) ,
     ( О» i вҶ’
          cancel-twelve (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i))
      ))

  -- В§ scalar helpers: twelveTimes distributes over addition and negation
  twelveTimes-+в„Ө : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө y
  twelveTimes-+в„Ө x y =
    let fx = fourTimesв„Ө x in
    let fy = fourTimesв„Ө y in
    let ex = eightTimesв„Ө x in
    let ey = eightTimesв„Ө y in
    trans
      refl
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө eightTimesв„Ө (x +в„Ө y)) (fourTimes-+в„Ө x y))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (fx +в„Ө fy) +в„Ө t) (eightTimes-+в„Ө x y))
          (trans
            (+в„Ө-assoc fx fy (ex +в„Ө ey))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ fx +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө fy ex ey))
              (trans
                (sym (+в„Ө-assoc fx ex (fy +в„Ө ey)))
                refl)))))

  twelveTimes-neg : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө x) вүЎ negв„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө x)
  twelveTimes-neg x =
    trans
      refl
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө eightTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө x)) (sym (neg-fourTimesв„Ө x)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ negв„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө x) +в„Ө t) (eightTimes-neg x))
          (trans
            (sym (neg-+в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө x) (eightTimesв„Ө x)))
            refl)))

  -- В§ sumFin4 commutes with twelveTimes
  sumFin4-twelveTimes : (v : Vec4в„Ө) вҶ’
    sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (v i)) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v)
  sumFin4-twelveTimes v =
    let fv : Vec4в„Ө
        fv i = fourTimesв„Ө (v i)
    in
    let ev : Vec4в„Ө
        ev i = eightTimesв„Ө (v i)
    in
    trans
      (sumFin4-+Vec4в„Ө fv ev)
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө ev) (sumFin4-fourTimes v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fourTimesв„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө v) +в„Ө t) (sumFin4-eightTimes v))
          refl))

  -- В§ reassociation helper for triple-block sum
  reassoc3-addConst : (A B C k : в„Ө) вҶ’
    (A +в„Ө k) +в„Ө ((B +в„Ө k) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө k)) вүЎ (A +в„Ө (B +в„Ө C)) +в„Ө (k +в„Ө (k +в„Ө k))
  reassoc3-addConst A B C k =
    let
      x = A +в„Ө k
      y = B +в„Ө k
      z = C +в„Ө k

      step1 : x +в„Ө (y +в„Ө z) вүЎ (x +в„Ө y) +в„Ө z
      step1 = sym (+в„Ө-assoc x y z)

      step2 : x +в„Ө y вүЎ (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө (k +в„Ө k)
      step2 =
        trans
          (+в„Ө-assoc A k (B +в„Ө k))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ A +в„Ө t) (swapHeadв„Ө k B k))
            (sym (+в„Ө-assoc A B (k +в„Ө k))))

      step3 : (x +в„Ө y) +в„Ө z вүЎ ((A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө (k +в„Ө k)) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө k)
      step3 = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө z) step2

      step4 : ((A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө (k +в„Ө k)) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө k) вүЎ (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө ((k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө k))
      step4 = +в„Ө-assoc (A +в„Ө B) (k +в„Ө k) (C +в„Ө k)

      step5 : (k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө (C +в„Ө k) вүЎ C +в„Ө ((k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө k)
      step5 = swapHeadв„Ө (k +в„Ө k) C k

      step6 : ((A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө C) вүЎ A +в„Ө (B +в„Ө C)
      step6 = +в„Ө-assoc A B C

      step7 : ((k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө k) вүЎ k +в„Ө (k +в„Ө k)
      step7 = +в„Ө-assoc k k k
    in
      trans
        step1
        (trans
          step3
          (trans
            step4
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (A +в„Ө B) +в„Ө t) step5)
              (trans
                (sym (+в„Ө-assoc (A +в„Ө B) C ((k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө k)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө ((k +в„Ө k) +в„Ө k)) step6)
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ (A +в„Ө (B +в„Ө C)) +в„Ө t) step7))))))

  -- В§ Law 14H.8: global sum of KвӮҒвӮӮ Laplacian = 0
  law14H-8-sumL12-0 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
  law14H-8-sumL12-0 v =
    let
      s  = sum12в„Ө v
      s0 = sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v)
      s1 = sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v)
      s2 = sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v)

      part0 = О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
      part1 = О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
      part2 = О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s

      step0 :
        sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө part0 +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө part1 +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө part2)
      step0 = refl

      step1 :
        sumFin4в„Ө part0 вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)
      step1 = sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) (negв„Ө s)

      step2 :
        sumFin4в„Ө part1 вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)
      step2 = sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) (negв„Ө s)

      step3 :
        sumFin4в„Ө part2 вүЎ sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)
      step3 = sumFin4-addConst (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) (negв„Ө s)

      step4 :
        sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ
          (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
          ((sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
           (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)))
      step4 =
        trans
          step0
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө part1 +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө part2)) step1)
            (trans
              (cong
                (О» t вҶ’ (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө t)
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө part2) step2))
              (cong
                (О» t вҶ’
                  (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
                  ((sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө t))
                step3)))

      step5 :
        sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө s0
      step5 = sumFin4-twelveTimes (blockвӮҖ v)

      step6 :
        sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө s1
      step6 = sumFin4-twelveTimes (blockвӮҒ v)

      step7 :
        sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө s2
      step7 = sumFin4-twelveTimes (blockвӮӮ v)

      step8 :
        sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ
          (twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
          ((twelveTimesв„Ө s1 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө s2 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)))
      step8 =
        trans
          step4
          (trans
            (cong
              (О» t вҶ’ (t +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө ((sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))))
              step5)
            (trans
              (cong
                (О» t вҶ’ (twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө ((t +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (О» i вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))))
                step6)
              (cong
                (О» t вҶ’ (twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө ((twelveTimesв„Ө s1 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө (t +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))))
                step7)))

      step9 :
        (twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө
        ((twelveTimesв„Ө s1 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) +в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө s2 +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))) вүЎ
          (twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө s1 +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө s2)) +в„Ө
          (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)))
      step9 = reassoc3-addConst (twelveTimesв„Ө s0) (twelveTimesв„Ө s1) (twelveTimesв„Ө s2) (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))

      step10 : twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө s1 +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө s2) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө s
      step10 =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө s0 +в„Ө t) (sym (twelveTimes-+в„Ө s1 s2)))
          (sym (twelveTimes-+в„Ө s0 (s1 +в„Ө s2)))

      step11 : fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s)) вүЎ negв„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө s)
      step11 = trans refl (twelveTimes-neg s)
      step12 = +в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө s)
    in
    trans
      step8
      (trans
        step9
        (trans
          (cong
            (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө (fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s) +в„Ө fourTimesв„Ө (negв„Ө s))))
            step10)
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө t) step11)
            step12)))
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{K\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Operator Annihilation}
\label{sec:triple-k4:k12-operator-annihilation}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The annihilation relations between $J_{12}$ and $L_{12}$ are forced here.
Once \hyperref[sec:triple-k4:k12-operator-annihilation]{Law~14H.8} eliminates the total sum of $L_{12} v$, both mixed composites
collapse to zero and the double Laplacian collapses to $12 \cdot L_{12}$.

\begin{code}
  -- В§ Law 14H.9: JвӮҒвӮӮ(LвӮҒвӮӮ v) = 0
  law14H-9-JL-zero : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) zeroVec12в„Ө
  law14H-9-JL-zero v =
    let sum0 = law14H-8-sumL12-0 v in
    (О» _ вҶ’ sum0) ,
    ((О» _ вҶ’ sum0) ,
     (О» _ вҶ’ sum0))

  -- В§ Law 14H.10: LвӮҒвӮӮ(JвӮҒвӮӮ v) = 0
  law14H-10-LJ-zero : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v)) zeroVec12в„Ө
  law14H-10-LJ-zero v =
    let s = sum12в„Ө v in
    let sj = sum12-J12 v in
    ( О» _ вҶ’
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sj)
          (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө s))
    ) ,
    (( О» _ вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sj)
            (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө s))
      ) ,
     ( О» _ вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө s +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sj)
            (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө s))
      ))

  -- В§ Law 14H.11: LвӮҒвӮӮВІ = 12В·LвӮҒвӮӮ
  law14H-11-LL-twelveL : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
  law14H-11-LL-twelveL v =
    let sum0 = law14H-8-sumL12-0 v in
    ( О» i вҶ’
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sum0)
          (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i)))
    ) ,
    (( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sum0)
            (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i)))
      ) ,
     ( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) sum0)
            (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i)))
      ))
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{K\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Spectral Classification}
\label{sec:triple-k4:k12-spectral-classification}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The spectrum of $L_{12}$ is classified without residue.
Sum-zero forces the $12$-eigenspace, constants force the kernel, and the image
is forced into the same eigen-constraint by the operator laws.

\begin{code}
  -- В§ Law 14H.12: sum-zero вҮ’ 12-eigenvector
  law14H-12-sum0-eigen12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
  law14H-12-sum0-eigen12 v sum0 =
    ( О» i вҶ’
        trans
          (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
          (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i)))
    ) ,
    (( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
            (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i)))
      ) ,
     ( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s) sum0)
            (+в„Ө-zero-right (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i)))
      ))

  -- В§ Law 14H.13: 12-eigenvector вҮ’ sum-zero
  law14H-13-eigen12вҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
  law14H-13-eigen12вҶ’sum0 v eigen12 =
    let a = twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v g0) in
    let s = sum12в„Ө v in
    let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ a
        eqвӮҖ = fst eigen12 g0
    in
    negв„Ө-zeroвҶ’zero s (+в„Ө-cancel-left a (negв„Ө s) eqвӮҖ)

  -- В§ Law 14H.14: constant vectors lie in the kernel
  law14H-14-const-eigen0 : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (constVec12в„Ө x)) zeroVec12в„Ө
  law14H-14-const-eigen0 x =
    ( О» _ вҶ’
        trans
          (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (sum12-const x))
          (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө x))
    ) ,
    (( О» _ вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (sum12-const x))
            (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө x))
      ) ,
     ( О» _ вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» s вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (sum12-const x))
            (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveTimesв„Ө x))
      ))

  -- В§ Law 14H.15: kernel condition вҖ” LвӮҒвӮӮ v = 0 вҮ” 12В·v = JвӮҒвӮӮ v
  law14H-15-L0вҶ’twelveEqJ : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
  law14H-15-L0вҶ’twelveEqJ v L0 =
    let s = sum12в„Ө v in
    ( О» i вҶ’
        let a = twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) in
        let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө
            eqвӮҖ = fst L0 i
        in
        let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
            stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө s) eqвӮҖ
            stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө s +в„Ө s) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
            stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө s) s)) stepвӮҒ
            stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
            stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))) stepвӮӮ
        in
        trans
          (trans (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a)) stepвӮғ)
          (+в„Ө-zero-left s)
    ) ,
    (( О» i вҶ’
          let a = twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) in
          let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө
              eqвӮҖ = fst (snd L0) i
          in
          let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө s) eqвӮҖ
              stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө s +в„Ө s) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө s) s)) stepвӮҒ
              stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))) stepвӮӮ
          in
          trans
            (trans (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a)) stepвӮғ)
            (+в„Ө-zero-left s)
      ) ,
     ( О» i вҶ’
          let a = twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) in
          let eqвӮҖ : a +в„Ө negв„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө
              eqвӮҖ = snd (snd L0) i
          in
          let stepвӮҒ : (a +в„Ө negв„Ө s) +в„Ө s вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө s) eqвӮҖ
              stepвӮӮ : a +в„Ө (negв„Ө s +в„Ө s) вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮӮ = trans (sym (+в„Ө-assoc a (negв„Ө s) s)) stepвӮҒ
              stepвӮғ : a +в„Ө 0в„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө s
              stepвӮғ = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left s))) stepвӮӮ
          in
          trans
            (trans (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right a)) stepвӮғ)
            (+в„Ө-zero-left s)
      ))

  law14H-15-twelveEqJвҶ’L0 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) zeroVec12в„Ө
  law14H-15-twelveEqJвҶ’L0 v twelveEqJ =
    let s = sum12в„Ө v in
    ( О» i вҶ’
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fst twelveEqJ i))
          (+в„Ө-inv-right s)
    ) ,
    (( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (fst (snd twelveEqJ) i))
            (+в„Ө-inv-right s)
      ) ,
     ( О» i вҶ’
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө s) (snd (snd twelveEqJ) i))
            (+в„Ө-inv-right s)
      ))

  -- В§ Law 14H.16: image vectors are 12-eigenvectors
  law14H-16-imageвҠҶeigen12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
  law14H-16-imageвҠҶeigen12 = law14H-11-LL-twelveL

  -- В§ Law 14H.17: sum-zero вҮ’ twelve-scaled image witness
  law14H-17-sum0вҶ’twelveInImage : (w : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө w вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ ОЈ Vec12в„Ө (О» v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө w))
  law14H-17-sum0вҶ’twelveInImage w sum0 = w , law14H-12-sum0-eigen12 w sum0
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Full Survivor Spectral Package}
\label{sec:triple-k4:full-survivor-spectral-package}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The forced spectral consequences of the full three-copy survivor are packaged here.
The package introduces no new structure; it only collects the already-eliminated
cases into a single witness type for downstream transport.

\begin{code}
  -- В§ full-survivor spectral package type
  Survivor3FullSpectralPackage : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Set
  Survivor3FullSpectralPackage v =
    (sum12в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
    (Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v)) zeroVec12в„Ө) Г—
    ((sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)) Г—
     (Vec12Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө)) Г—
    (Vec12Eq (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v))
             (twelveVec12в„Ө (laplacianSurvivorVec12в„Ө survivor3-full v)))

  -- В§ Law 14H.18: full survivor spectral package
  law14H-18-survivor3-full-spectral-package : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Survivor3FullSpectralPackage v
  law14H-18-survivor3-full-spectral-package v =
    law14H-8-sumL12-0 v ,
    (law14H-9-JL-zero v ,
     ((law14H-12-sum0-eigen12 v , law14H-13-eigen12вҶ’sum0 v) ,
      law14H-16-imageвҠҶeigen12 v))
\end{code}

The spectral theory of the coupled and triple $K_4$ Laplacians is complete. Every iterated operator word collapses to one of four normal formsвҖ”identity, pure $L$-power, pure $J$-power, or zeroвҖ”and the eigenvalue spectrum is exhausted by $\{0, 4, 12\}$. The survivor structure of $K_4$ is fully extracted into operator algebra, and no spectral degree of freedom remains.

The spectral data is exact. The arithmetic on which it restsвҖ”$\mathbb{Z}$ and $\mathbb{Q}$вҖ”requires order and distance infrastructure for convergence arguments: additive order monotonicity, rational multiplication, $\varepsilon$-splitting, and distance laws. These are forced algebraic consequences of the integer and rational definitions already established. With those laws in place, the spectral data has a metric home and the passage to the reals is forced by the Cauchy gaps rational arithmetic cannot close internally.

The graph has 4 vertices and an eigenvalue ratio $3{:}1$ (three copies of eigenvalue 4, one copy of eigenvalue 0). The spectral fingerprint underlying the forced graph evaluation is fully determined.


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Additive Order Laws for \texorpdfstring{$\leq_{\mathbb{Q}}$}{вүӨв„ҡ}}
\label{ch:additive-order-laws}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Cauchy convergence arguments require combining two distance bounds into one:
if $|x_m - x_n| < \varepsilon/2$ and $|x_n - x_k| < \varepsilon/2$,
then $|x_m - x_k| < \varepsilon$.  This chapter establishes the additive
monotonicity and sum-doubling laws for the rational order.  Nonnegative
rationals must remain closed under addition, and each order comparison must be
stable under adding the same quantity on either side.  These constraints force
the additive order toolkit used later in the Cauchy arguments.

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Nonnegativity Extraction and Closure}
\label{sec:additive-order-laws:nonnegativity-extraction-closure}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Nonnegativity must survive passage from rationals to
numerators and back through addition. The reduction always collapses to
integer nonnegativity after clearing denominators.

\begin{code}
-- В§ nonneg integer from natural
0вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө : (n : в„•) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө n
0вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө zero = tt
0вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө (suc n) = tt

-- В§ nonneg rational вҮ’ nonneg numerator
0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө num q
0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (a / b) qnonneg =
  let
    lhs0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhs0 = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә вүЎ oneв„Ө
    oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө = refl

    rhs1 : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ a
    rhs1 = trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө) (*в„Ө-one-right a)
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhs1 (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ lhs0 qnonneg)

-- В§ nonnegativity closed under rational addition
0вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ p вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ (p +в„ҡ q)
0вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ (a / b) (c / d) pвүҘ0 qвүҘ0 =
  let
    aвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө a
    aвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (a / b) pвүҘ0

    cвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө c
    cвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (c / d) qвүҘ0

    nonnegScale : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (s : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    nonnegScale z s zвүҘ0 =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө s))
        (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө z s zвүҘ0)

    adвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    adвүҘ0 = nonnegScale a d aвүҘ0

    cbвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    cbвүҘ0 = nonnegScale c b cвүҘ0

    sumвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    sumвүҘ0 =
      let
        adNat : ОЈ в„• (О» k вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө k)
        adNat = 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) adвүҘ0

        cbNat : ОЈ в„• (О» k вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө k)
        cbNat = 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) cbвүҘ0

        kвӮҒ : в„•
        kвӮҒ = fst adNat

        kвӮӮ : в„•
        kвӮӮ = fst cbNat

        adвүЎ : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө kвӮҒ
        adвүЎ = snd adNat

        cbвүЎ : (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө kвӮӮ
        cbвүЎ = snd cbNat

        sumForm : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (kвӮҒ +в„• kвӮӮ)
        sumForm =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) adвүЎ)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө kвӮҒ +в„Ө t) cbвүЎ)
              (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө kвӮҒ kвӮӮ))
      in
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym sumForm) (0вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө (kвӮҒ +в„• kвӮӮ))

    lhs0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhs0 = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))

    rhs1 : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    rhs1 = *в„Ө-one-right ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhs0) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhs1) sumвүҘ0)
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Sum-Doubling Bounds}
\label{sec:additive-order-laws:sum-doubling-bounds}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

If $0 \le x, y, z$ with $x \le z$ and $y \le z$, then
$x + y \le z + z$.  The integer version lifts through the natural-number
representation, and the rational version is forced by the same bound after
scaling to a common denominator.

\begin{code}
-- В§ integer sum-doubling: xвүӨz, yвүӨz вҮ’ x+y вүӨ z+z (nonneg)
вүӨв„Ө-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg : {x y z : в„Ө} вҶ’
  0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө x вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ y вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ (x +в„Ө y) вүӨв„Ө (z +в„Ө z)
вүӨв„Ө-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg {x} {y} {z} xnonneg ynonneg znonneg xвүӨz yвүӨz =
  let
    xm : ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ x вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө n)
    xm = 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө x xnonneg

    ym : ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ y вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө n)
    ym = 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө y ynonneg

    zm : ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ z вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө n)
    zm = 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө z znonneg

    m : в„•
    m = fst xm

    n : в„•
    n = fst ym

    k : в„•
    k = fst zm

    xвүЎ : x вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө m
    xвүЎ = snd xm

    yвүЎ : y вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө n
    yвүЎ = snd ym

    zвүЎ : z вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө k
    zвүЎ = snd zm

    xвүӨzNat : m вүӨ k
    xвүӨzNat = вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ xвүЎ (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі zвүЎ xвүӨz))

    yвүӨzNat : n вүӨ k
    yвүӨzNat = вүӨв„Ө-fromв„•в„Ө-reflect (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ yвүЎ (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі zвүЎ yвүӨz))

    stepвӮҒ : (m +в„• n) вүӨ (k +в„• n)
    stepвӮҒ =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (k +в„• n))
        (sym (+в„•-comm m n))
        (subst (О» t вҶ’ (n +в„• m) вүӨ t)
          (+в„•-comm n k)
          (вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ xвүӨzNat n))

    stepвӮӮ : (k +в„• n) вүӨ (k +в„• k)
    stepвӮӮ = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ yвүӨzNat k

    sumNat : (m +в„• n) вүӨ (k +в„• k)
    sumNat = вүӨ-trans stepвӮҒ stepвӮӮ

    sumв„Ө : fromв„•в„Ө (m +в„• n) вүӨв„Ө fromв„•в„Ө (k +в„• k)
    sumв„Ө = fromв„•в„Ө-mono sumNat

    lhsEq : (x +в„Ө y) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (m +в„• n)
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө y) xвүЎ)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө m +в„Ө t) yвүЎ)
          (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө m n))

    rhsEq : (z +в„Ө z) вүЎ fromв„•в„Ө (k +в„• k)
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө z) zвүЎ)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ fromв„•в„Ө k +в„Ө t) zвүЎ)
          (fromв„•в„Ө-+в„Ө k k))
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) sumв„Ө)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Rational Sum-Doubling.}
The rational counterpart lifts integer sum-doubling
through the cross-multiplication bridge.

\begin{code}
-- В§ rational sum-doubling: pвүӨr, qвүӨr вҮ’ p+q вүӨ r+r (nonneg)
вүӨв„ҡ-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ p вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ r вҶ’ p вүӨв„ҡ r вҶ’ q вүӨв„ҡ r вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ q) вүӨв„ҡ (r +в„ҡ r)
вүӨв„ҡ-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) pnonneg qnonneg rnonneg pвүӨr qвүӨr =
  let
    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    ff : в„•вҒә
    ff = f *вҒә f

    bdf : в„•вҒә
    bdf = bd *вҒә f

    aвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө a
    aвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (a / b) pnonneg

    cвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө c
    cвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (c / d) qnonneg

    eвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө e
    eвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (e / f) rnonneg

    nonnegScale : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (s : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    nonnegScale z s zвүҘ0 =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө s))
        (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө z s zвүҘ0)

    X : в„Ө
    X = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө ff

    Y : в„Ө
    Y = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө ff

    Z : в„Ө
    Z = ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)

    XвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө X
    XвүҘ0 = nonnegScale (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) ff (nonnegScale a d aвүҘ0)

    YвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө Y
    YвүҘ0 = nonnegScale (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) ff (nonnegScale c b cвүҘ0)

    ZвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө Z
    ZвүҘ0 = nonnegScale (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) f (nonnegScale e bd eвүҘ0)

    -- scale pвүӨr to common base
    pScaledвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
    pScaledвӮҒ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) d pвүӨr

    pScaledвӮӮ : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    pScaledвӮӮ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) f pScaledвӮҒ

    qScaledвӮҒ : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    qScaledвӮҒ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) b qвүӨr

    qScaledвӮӮ : (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    qScaledвӮӮ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) f qScaledвӮҒ

    -- rewrite both sides into X вүӨ Z, Y вүӨ Z
    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    scaleSplit : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
    scaleSplit x u v =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

    Xeq : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ X
    Xeq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale a f d))
        (sym (scaleSplit (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) f f))

    ZeqвӮҒ : (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ Z
    ZeqвӮҒ =
      cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (sym (scaleSplit e b d))

    ZeqвӮӮ : (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ Z
    ZeqвӮӮ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale e d b))
        ZeqвӮҒ

    XвүӨZ : X вүӨв„Ө Z
    XвүӨZ =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ X вүӨв„Ө t) ZeqвӮҒ
        (subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨв„Ө (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f))
          Xeq
          pScaledвӮӮ)

    Yeq : (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүЎ Y
    Yeq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale c f b))
        (sym (scaleSplit (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) f f))

    YвүӨZ : Y вүӨв„Ө Z
    YвүӨZ =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ Y вүӨв„Ө t) ZeqвӮӮ
        (subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨв„Ө (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f))
          Yeq
          qScaledвӮӮ)

    sumLe : (X +в„Ө Y) вүӨв„Ө (Z +в„Ө Z)
    sumLe = вүӨв„Ө-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg XвүҘ0 YвүҘ0 ZвүҘ0 XвүӨZ YвүӨZ

    lhsEq : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө ff) вүЎ (X +в„Ө Y)
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө ff))
        refl

    rhsEq : (((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) вүЎ (Z +в„Ө Z)
    rhsEq =
      let
        ef : в„Ө
        ef = e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f

        efbdвүЎZ : (ef *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) вүЎ Z
        efbdвүЎZ =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc e (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө bd))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ e *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө bd)))
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc e (вҒәtoв„Ө bd) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))))
      in
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө ef ef (вҒәtoв„Ө bd))
