        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) efbdвүЎZ)

  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) sumLe)
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Nonneg-Right Addition and Monotonicity}
\label{sec:additive-order-laws:nonneg-right-addition-monotonicity}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Adding a nonnegative term on the right preserves the order; this extends
to full left and right monotonicity of rational addition. Directional ambiguity
is eliminated by forcing right-monotonicity first and then
transporting left-monotonicity through commutativity.

\begin{code}
-- В§ negative normalisation step
negвүӨnormalize : (n m : в„•) вҶ’ (-suc m) вүӨв„Ө normalizeв„Ө n m
negвүӨnormalize zero zero = tt
negвүӨnormalize zero (suc m) = вүӨ-step (suc m)
negвүӨnormalize (suc n) zero = tt
negвүӨnormalize (suc n) (suc m) =
  вүӨв„Ө-trans negStep (negвүӨnormalize n m)
  where
    negStep : (-suc (suc m)) вүӨв„Ө (-suc m)
    negStep = sвүӨs (вүӨ-step m)

-- В§ adding a positive integer on the right
вүӨв„Ө-add-pos-right : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (n : в„•) вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө (x +в„Ө (+suc n))
вүӨв„Ө-add-pos-right 0в„Ө n = tt
вүӨв„Ө-add-pos-right (+suc m) n = sвүӨs mвүӨm+n
  where
    mвүӨm+n : m вүӨ (m +в„• suc n)
    mвүӨm+n =
      subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (m +в„• suc n))
        (+в„•-zero-right m)
        (вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = suc n} zвүӨn m)
вүӨв„Ө-add-pos-right (-suc m) n =
  let
    rhsEq : ((-suc m) +в„Ө (+suc n)) вүЎ normalizeв„Ө n m
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ normalizeв„Ө (suc n) t) (+в„•-zero-right (suc m)))
        refl
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) (negвүӨnormalize n m)

-- В§ adding a nonneg integer on the right
вүӨв„Ө-add-nonneg-right : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө y вҶ’ x вүӨв„Ө (x +в„Ө y)
вүӨв„Ө-add-nonneg-right x y yвүҘ0 with 0вүӨв„ӨвҶ’fromв„•в„Ө y yвүҘ0
... | (zero , yвүЎ) =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) yвүЎ)) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (+в„Ө-zero-right x)) (вүӨв„Ө-refl x))
... | (suc n , yвүЎ) =
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) yвүЎ)) (вүӨв„Ө-add-pos-right x n)

-- В§ adding a nonneg rational on the right preserves вүӨ
вүӨв„ҡ-add-nonneg-right : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ p вүӨв„ҡ (p +в„ҡ q)
вүӨв„ҡ-add-nonneg-right (a / b) (c / d) qnonneg =
  let
    cвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө c
    cвүҘ0 = 0вүӨв„ҡвҶ’0вүӨв„Өnum (c / d) qnonneg

    nonnegScale : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (s : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө z вҶ’ 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    nonnegScale z s zвүҘ0 =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө s))
        (вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right 0в„Ө z s zвүҘ0)

    x : в„Ө
    x = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    y : в„Ө
    y = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    yвүҘ0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө y
    yвүҘ0 = nonnegScale (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) b (nonnegScale c b cвүҘ0)

    xвүӨx+y : x вүӨв„Ө (x +в„Ө y)
    xвүӨx+y = вүӨв„Ө-add-nonneg-right x y yвүҘ0

    lhsEq : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) вүЎ x
    lhsEq =
      let
        scaleSplit : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
        scaleSplit z u v =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ z *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
            (sym (*в„Ө-assoc z (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

        swapScale : (z : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
        swapScale z u v =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc z (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ z *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc z (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))
      in
      trans
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc a (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d))))
        (swapScale a b d)

    rhsEq : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ (x +в„Ө y)
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
        refl
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) xвүӨx+y)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Rational Order Monotonicity.}
Right and left monotonicity for $\leq_{\mathbb{Q}}$ under addition
follow from the cross-multiplication bridge.

\begin{code}
-- В§ right monotonicity: p вүӨ q вҮ’ (p + r) вүӨ (q + r)
вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-right : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p вүӨв„ҡ q вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ r) вүӨв„ҡ (q +в„ҡ r)
вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-right (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) pвүӨq =
  let
    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    bf : в„•вҒә
    bf = b *вҒә f

    df : в„•вҒә
    df = d *вҒә f

    pвүӨq-scaledвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    pвүӨq-scaledвӮҒ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) f pвүӨq

    pвүӨq-scaledвӮӮ : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) вүӨв„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    pвүӨq-scaledвӮӮ = вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) f pвүӨq-scaledвӮҒ

    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    scaleSplit : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
    scaleSplit x u v =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

    ff : в„•вҒә
    ff = f *вҒә f

    lhsTermвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүЎ (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    lhsTermвӮҒ =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) d f)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale a f d))

    rhsTermвӮҒ : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
    rhsTermвӮҒ =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) b f)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale c f b))

    rTerm : (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df вүЎ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf
    rTerm =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) d f)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale e b d))
          (sym (scaleSplit (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) b f)))

    lhsSum : в„Ө
    lhsSum = ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df

    rhsSum : в„Ө
    rhsSum = ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf

    lhsExpand : lhsSum вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df)
    lhsExpand = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө df)

    rhsExpand : rhsSum вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
    rhsExpand = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө bf)

    lhsTвӮҒвүӨrhsTвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүӨв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
    lhsTвӮҒвүӨrhsTвӮҒ =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsTermвӮҒ) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsTermвӮҒ) pвүӨq-scaledвӮӮ)

    eTermвүЎ : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
    eTermвүЎ = rTerm

    eTermвүӨ : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүӨв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
    eTermвүӨ = вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі eTermвүЎ (вүӨв„Ө-refl ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df))

    sumLe : (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df)) вүӨв„Ө (((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf))
    sumLe = вүӨв„Ө-+в„Ө-mono lhsTвӮҒвүӨrhsTвӮҒ eTermвүӨ
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsExpand) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsExpand) sumLe)

-- В§ left monotonicity: q вүӨ r вҮ’ (p + q) вүӨ (p + r)
вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-left : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ q вүӨв„ҡ r вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ q) вүӨв„ҡ (p +в„ҡ r)
вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-left p q r qвүӨr =
  let
    stepвӮҒ : (q +в„ҡ p) вүӨв„ҡ (r +в„ҡ p)
    stepвӮҒ = вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-right q r p qвүӨr

    stepвӮӮ : (p +в„ҡ q) вүӨв„ҡ (q +в„ҡ p)
    stepвӮӮ = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {p = p +в„ҡ q} {q = q +в„ҡ p} (+в„ҡ-comm p q)

    stepвӮғ : (r +в„ҡ p) вүӨв„ҡ (p +в„ҡ r)
    stepвӮғ = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {p = r +в„ҡ p} {q = p +в„ҡ r} (+в„ҡ-comm r p)
  in
  вүӨв„ҡ-trans {x = p +в„ҡ q} {y = q +в„ҡ p} {z = p +в„ҡ r} stepвӮӮ
    (вүӨв„ҡ-trans {x = q +в„ҡ p} {y = r +в„ҡ p} {z = p +в„ҡ r} stepвӮҒ stepвӮғ)
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{K\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Iteration and Word Algebra}
\label{ch:k12-iteration-words}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Every iterated application of the K$_{12}$ Laplacian or global-sum operator
collapses to a scaled first application.  Combined with the annihilation
laws $JL = LJ = 0$, this forces every word in the free monoid on
$\{L_{12}, J_{12}\}$ to reduce to one of exactly four normal forms: identity,
pure $L$-power, pure $J$-power, or zero.
These relations force all iterated behaviour from the quadratic identities of
\hyperref[ch:triple-laplacian]{the Triple K$_4$ and K$_{12}$ spectral chapter}.  Induction then eliminates every mixed word
except the four surviving normal forms and fixes the complete word algebra.

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Vec\texorpdfstring{$_{12}$}{12} Transport}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:vec12-transport}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Reflexivity, symmetry, transitivity for pointwise equality, plus congruence
of the sum, scaling, and Laplacian operators. All
transport ambiguity is eliminated by fixing how Vec$_{12}$ equalities pass through the three
basic operators used in the iteration laws.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Vec12Eq is an equivalence
Vec12Eq-refl : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq v v
Vec12Eq-refl v = (О» _ вҶ’ refl) , ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl))

Vec12Eq-sym : {u v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq v u
Vec12Eq-sym eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ sym (fst eq i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ sym (fst (snd eq) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ sym (snd (snd eq) i)))

Vec12Eq-trans : {u v w : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq v w вҶ’ Vec12Eq u w
Vec12Eq-trans eqвӮҒ eqвӮӮ =
  (О» i вҶ’ trans (fst eqвӮҒ i) (fst eqвӮӮ i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ trans (fst (snd eqвӮҒ) i) (fst (snd eqвӮӮ) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ trans (snd (snd eqвӮҒ) i) (snd (snd eqвӮӮ) i)))

-- В§ sum congruence: blockwise
sum12-cong : (u v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ sum12в„Ө u вүЎ sum12в„Ө v
sum12-cong u v eq =
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ u) +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ u)))
         (sumFin4-cong (blockвӮҖ u) (blockвӮҖ v) (fst eq)))
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v) +в„Ө t)
      (trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮӮ u))
              (sumFin4-cong (blockвӮҒ u) (blockвӮҒ v) (fst (snd eq))))
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ sumFin4в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v) +в„Ө t)
              (sumFin4-cong (blockвӮӮ u) (blockвӮӮ v) (snd (snd eq))))))

-- В§ scaling congruence
twelveVec12-cong : (u v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө u) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
twelveVec12-cong u v eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ cong twelveTimesв„Ө (fst eq i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ cong twelveTimesв„Ө (fst (snd eq) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ cong twelveTimesв„Ө (snd (snd eq) i)))

opaque
  unfolding K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө

  -- В§ KвӮҒвӮӮ Laplacian congruence
  K12Laplacian-cong : (u v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө u) (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
  K12Laplacian-cong u v eq =
    (О» i вҶ’
      let pBlock = cong twelveTimesв„Ө (fst eq i) in
      let pSum   = cong negв„Ө (sum12-cong u v eq) in
      trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ u i) +в„Ө t) pSum)
            (trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)) pBlock) refl)) ,
    ((О» i вҶ’
      let pBlock = cong twelveTimesв„Ө (fst (snd eq) i) in
      let pSum   = cong negв„Ө (sum12-cong u v eq) in
      trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ u i) +в„Ө t) pSum)
            (trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)) pBlock) refl)) ,
     (О» i вҶ’
      let pBlock = cong twelveTimesв„Ө (snd (snd eq) i) in
      let pSum   = cong negв„Ө (sum12-cong u v eq) in
      trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ u i) +в„Ө t) pSum)
            (trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө v)) pBlock) refl)))
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Iterated Operator Collapse}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:iterated-operator-collapse}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

\hyperref[law:k12-iteration:ll-step]{Laws~14K.0--14K.2}: every iterate of $L_{12}$ or $J_{12}$ beyond the first
is a 12-scaled copy of its predecessor.  The quadratic identities from the
previous chapter force every longer pure iterate to collapse immediately to a
scaled first action.

\phantomsection\label{law:k12-iteration:ll-step}
\phantomsection\label{law:k12-iteration:lpow-scaling}
\phantomsection\label{law:k12-iteration:jpow-scaling}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14K.0: two-step recurrence LвӮҒвӮӮ^(n+2) = 12В·LвӮҒвӮӮ^(n+1)
law14K-0-LL-step : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (powEndo (suc (suc n)) K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
         (twelveVec12в„Ө (powEndo (suc n) K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
law14K-0-LL-step n v = law14H-11-LL-twelveL (powEndo n K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)

-- В§ Law 14K.1: LвӮҒвӮӮ^(n+1) = 12^n В· LвӮҒвӮӮ
law14K-1-Lpow-scaling : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (powEndo (suc n) K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
         (powEndo n twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
law14K-1-Lpow-scaling zero v = Vec12Eq-refl (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
law14K-1-Lpow-scaling (suc n) v =
  Vec12Eq-trans
    (law14K-0-LL-step n v)
    (twelveVec12-cong
      (powEndo (suc n) K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)
      (powEndo n twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
      (law14K-1-Lpow-scaling n v))

-- В§ Law 14K.2: JвӮҒвӮӮ^(n+1) = 12^n В· JвӮҒвӮӮ
law14K-2-Jpow-scaling : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (powEndo (suc n) J12Vec12в„Ө v)
         (powEndo n twelveVec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v))
law14K-2-Jpow-scaling zero v = Vec12Eq-refl (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
law14K-2-Jpow-scaling (suc n) v =
  Vec12Eq-trans
    (law14H-5-JJ-twelveJ (powEndo n J12Vec12в„Ө v))
    (twelveVec12-cong
      (powEndo (suc n) J12Vec12в„Ө v)
      (powEndo n twelveVec12в„Ө (J12Vec12в„Ө v))
      (law14K-2-Jpow-scaling n v))
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Word Classification}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:word-classification}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The free monoid on two generators $\{L, J\}$ evaluates to operators on
Vec$_{12}\mathbb{Z}$.  Every word is classified into one of four cases:
empty (identity), pure $L$-power, pure $J$-power, or mixed (zero).
\hyperref[law:k12-words:classification-exhaustive-unique]{Law~14L.0} forces this list to be exhaustive and unique, eliminating every
additional operator word as a formal defect.

\phantomsection\label{law:k12-words:classification-exhaustive-unique}

\begin{code}
-- В§ generator and word types
data Gen : Set where
  Lg : Gen
  Jg : Gen

data List (A : Set) : Set where
  []  : List A
  _вҲ·_ : A вҶ’ List A вҶ’ List A

Word : Set
Word = List Gen

-- В§ operator type and equality
Op : Set
Op = GenEndo Vec12в„Ө

OpEq : Op вҶ’ Op вҶ’ Set
OpEq f g = (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f v) (g v)

idOp : Op
idOp = idGenEndo

zeroOp : Op
zeroOp _ = zeroVec12в„Ө

LOp : Op
LOp = K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө

JOp : Op
JOp = J12Vec12в„Ө

-- В§ word evaluation
evalGen : Gen вҶ’ Op
evalGen Lg = LOp
evalGen Jg = JOp

evalWord : Word вҶ’ Op
evalWord []       = idOp
evalWord (g вҲ· w)  = evalGen g вҲҳ evalWord w

-- В§ four classification cases
data WordCase : Set where
  empty : WordCase
  Lpow  : в„• вҶ’ WordCase
  Jpow  : в„• вҶ’ WordCase
  mixed : WordCase

caseOp : WordCase вҶ’ Op
caseOp empty     = idOp
caseOp (Lpow n)  = powEndo (suc n) LOp
caseOp (Jpow n)  = powEndo (suc n) JOp
caseOp mixed     = zeroOp

-- В§ step function: how appending a generator updates the case
stepCase : Gen вҶ’ WordCase вҶ’ WordCase
stepCase Lg empty     = Lpow zero
stepCase Jg empty     = Jpow zero
stepCase Lg (Lpow n)  = Lpow (suc n)
stepCase Jg (Jpow n)  = Jpow (suc n)
stepCase Lg (Jpow _)  = mixed
stepCase Jg (Lpow _)  = mixed
stepCase _  mixed     = mixed

-- В§ JвӮҒвӮӮ congruence (from sum congruence)
J12-cong : (u v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (JOp u) (JOp v)
J12-cong u v eq =
  let sEq = sum12-cong u v eq in
  (О» _ вҶ’ sEq) , ((О» _ вҶ’ sEq) , (О» _ вҶ’ sEq))

-- В§ mixed annihilation: L after J-powers and J after L-powers
LвҲҳJpow-zero : (n : в„•) вҶ’ OpEq (LOp вҲҳ powEndo (suc n) JOp) zeroOp
LвҲҳJpow-zero n v = law14H-10-LJ-zero (powEndo n JOp v)

JвҲҳLpow-zero : (n : в„•) вҶ’ OpEq (JOp вҲҳ powEndo (suc n) LOp) zeroOp
JвҲҳLpow-zero n v = law14H-9-JL-zero (powEndo n LOp v)

-- В§ composition respects case classification (8 cases)
composeGenCase : (g : Gen) вҶ’ (c : WordCase) вҶ’ OpEq (evalGen g вҲҳ caseOp c) (caseOp (stepCase g c))
composeGenCase Lg empty v = Vec12Eq-refl (LOp v)
composeGenCase Jg empty v = Vec12Eq-refl (JOp v)
composeGenCase Lg (Lpow n) v = Vec12Eq-refl (powEndo (suc (suc n)) LOp v)
composeGenCase Jg (Jpow n) v = Vec12Eq-refl (powEndo (suc (suc n)) JOp v)
composeGenCase Lg (Jpow n) v = LвҲҳJpow-zero n v
composeGenCase Jg (Lpow n) v = JвҲҳLpow-zero n v
composeGenCase Lg mixed v = law14H-14-const-eigen0 0в„Ө
composeGenCase Jg mixed v = Vec12Eq-refl zeroVec12в„Ө

-- В§ generator congruence
congGen : (g : Gen) вҶ’ (u v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (evalGen g u) (evalGen g v)
congGen Lg u v eq = K12Laplacian-cong u v eq
congGen Jg u v eq = J12-cong u v eq

-- В§ Law 14L.0: every word classifies uniquely
law14L-0-classify-word : (w : Word) вҶ’ ОЈ WordCase (О» c вҶ’ OpEq (evalWord w) (caseOp c))
law14L-0-classify-word [] = empty , (О» v вҶ’ Vec12Eq-refl v)
law14L-0-classify-word (g вҲ· w) =
  let rec = law14L-0-classify-word w in
  let c   = fst rec in
  let eq  = snd rec in
  stepCase g c ,
  (О» v вҶ’
    Vec12Eq-trans
      (congGen g (evalWord w v) (caseOp c v) (eq v))
      (composeGenCase g c v))
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Rational Multiplication and \texorpdfstring{$\varepsilon$}{Оө}-Splitting}
\label{ch:rat-mul-epsilon}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Rational multiplication must be associative, unital, and distribute over
addition; these properties are forced by the underlying integer arithmetic.
The second half of the chapter derives the $\varepsilon$-splitting lemma:
for any positive $\varepsilon$, a quarter-denominator rational $\delta$
satisfies $\delta + \delta < \varepsilon$, the key ingredient for combining
two Cauchy bounds.  Cross-multiplication coherence must survive triple
products and distributive expansion, and these same constraints force the
small-denominator witness used in the splitting laws.

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Rational Multiplication Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:multiplication-laws}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The multiplication algebra on $\mathbb{Q}$ is forced by reducing every
claim to integer associativity, commutativity, and distributivity. No extra
multiplicative freedom survives the cross-product setoid.

\begin{code}
-- В§ triple в„•вҒә-product helpers
вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocКі : (a b c : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ вҒәtoв„Ө ((a *вҒә b) *вҒә c) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө a) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө c))
вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocКі a b c =
  trans
    (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә (a *вҒә b) c)
    (trans
      (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө c) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә a b))
      (*в„Ө-assoc (вҒәtoв„Ө a) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө c)))

вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocЛЎ : (a b c : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ вҒәtoв„Ө (a *вҒә (b *вҒә c)) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө a) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө c))
вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocЛЎ a b c =
  trans
    (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә a (b *вҒә c))
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө a) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b c))

-- В§ *в„ҡ associativity
*в„ҡ-assoc : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p *в„ҡ q) *в„ҡ r вүғв„ҡ p *в„ҡ (q *в„ҡ r)
*в„ҡ-assoc (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  let
    numAssoc : ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө e) вүЎ (a *в„Ө (c *в„Ө e))
    numAssoc = *в„Ө-assoc a c e

    denL : вҒәtoв„Ө ((b *вҒә d) *вҒә f) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
    denL = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocКі b d f

    denR : вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә (d *вҒә f)) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
    denR = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocЛЎ b d f

    denEq : вҒәtoв„Ө ((b *вҒә d) *вҒә f) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә (d *вҒә f))
    denEq = trans denL (sym denR)

    cross : (((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә (d *вҒә f))) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө (c *в„Ө e)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө ((b *вҒә d) *вҒә f))
    cross =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) (sym denEq))
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө ((b *вҒә d) *вҒә f)) numAssoc)
  in
  cross

-- В§ *в„ҡ right identity
*в„ҡ-one-right : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p *в„ҡ 1в„ҡ) вүғв„ҡ p
*в„ҡ-one-right (a / b) =
  let
    numEq : (a *в„Ө oneв„Ө) вүЎ a
    numEq = *в„Ө-one-right a

    denOne : вҒәtoв„Ө b вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә oneвҒә)
    denOne =
      trans
        (sym (*в„Ө-one-right (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
        (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b oneвҒә))

    cross : ((a *в„Ө oneв„Ө) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә oneвҒә))
    cross =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) numEq)
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) denOne)
  in
  cross

-- В§ *в„ҡ left identity
*в„ҡ-one-left : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (1в„ҡ *в„ҡ p) вүғв„ҡ p
*в„ҡ-one-left (a / b) =
  let
    numEq : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө a) вүЎ a
    numEq = *в„Ө-one-left a

    denOneL : вҒәtoв„Ө b вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (oneвҒә *вҒә b)
    denOneL = sym (trans (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә oneвҒә b) (*в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) numEq)
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) denOneL)

-- В§ *в„ҡ zero annihilation (left)
*в„ҡ-zero-left : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (0в„ҡ *в„ҡ p) вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-zero-left (a / b) =
  let
    numEq : (0в„Ө *в„Ө a) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    numEq = *в„Ө-zero-left a

    cross : ((0в„Ө *в„Ө a) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (oneвҒә *вҒә b))
    cross =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) numEq)
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә))
          (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (oneвҒә *вҒә b)))))
  in
  cross

-- В§ *в„ҡ zero annihilation (right)
*в„ҡ-zero-right : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p *в„ҡ 0в„ҡ) вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-zero-right (a / b) =
  let
    numEq : (a *в„Ө 0в„Ө) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    numEq = *в„Ө-zero-right a
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) numEq)
    (trans
      (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә))
      (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә oneвҒә)))))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 1.5: Positive reciprocal infrastructure.}
The analytic unit-system block now has a precise target shape, so the next forced arithmetic step is an inversion law that does not overreach. The minimal viable layer is the strictly positive sector of $\mathbb{Q}$: positivity can be reflected to the numerator, the numerator can be exposed in successor form, and then denominator and numerator-magnitude can be swapped to produce a reciprocal whose product with the original rational collapses back to~$1$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Positive numerator forces positive rational.
0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„Ө <в„Ө num q вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q
0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ (a / b) apos =
  let
    stepвӮҒ : 0в„Ө <в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)
    stepвӮҒ = <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym (*в„Ө-one-right a)) apos
  in
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b))) stepвӮҒ

-- В§ A positive rational exposes its numerator as +suc n.
positive-num-witnessв„ҡ : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q вҶ’ ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ num q вүЎ +suc n)
positive-num-witnessв„ҡ q qpos =
  0<в„ӨвҶ’pos (num q) (0в„ҡ<вҶ’0в„Ө<num q qpos)

-- В§ Reciprocal on the strictly positive sector of в„ҡ.
reciprocalвҒә : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q вҶ’ в„ҡ
reciprocalвҒә (a / b) qpos with positive-num-witnessв„ҡ (a / b) qpos
... | n , _ = вҒәtoв„Ө b / mkв„•вҒә n

-- В§ The reciprocal of a positive rational is again positive.
reciprocalвҒә-pos : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (qpos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә q qpos
reciprocalвҒә-pos (a / b) qpos with positive-num-witnessв„ҡ (a / b) qpos
... | n , _ = 0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) / mkв„•вҒә n) (den-posв„Ө b)

-- В§ Positive rational times its reciprocal is 1.
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-right : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (qpos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q) вҶ’ (q *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә q qpos) вүғв„ҡ 1в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-right (a / b) qpos with positive-num-witnessв„ҡ (a / b) qpos
... | n , aвүЎ =
  let
    lhsOne : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    lhsOne = *в„Ө-one-right (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    core : (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә mkв„•вҒә n)
    core =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) aвүЎ)
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-comm (+suc n) (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
          (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b (mkв„•вҒә n))))

    rhsOne : вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә mkв„•вҒә n) вүЎ (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә mkв„•вҒә n))
    rhsOne = sym (*в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә mkв„•вҒә n)))
  in
  trans lhsOne (trans core rhsOne)

-- В§ The reciprocal also cancels on the left.
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-left : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (qpos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ q) вҶ’ (reciprocalвҒә q qpos *в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ 1в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-left q qpos =
  вүғв„ҡ-trans
    (*в„ҡ-comm (reciprocalвҒә q qpos) q)
    (*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-right q qpos)

-- В§ Negation commutes with rational multiplication on the left.
*в„ҡ-neg-left : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ ((-в„ҡ p) *в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ q))
*в„ҡ-neg-left (a / b) (c / d) =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) (*в„Ө-neg-left a c)

-- В§ Negation commutes with rational multiplication on the right.
*в„ҡ-neg-right : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p *в„ҡ (-в„ҡ q)) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ q))
*в„ҡ-neg-right (a / b) (c / d) =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) (*в„Ө-neg-right a c)

-- В§ Double negation is trivial on rational classes.
-в„ҡ-involutive : (p : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (-в„ҡ (-в„ҡ p)) вүғв„ҡ p
-в„ҡ-involutive (a / b) =
  cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (negв„Ө-involutive a)

-- В§ Local negation transport on rational equivalence.
negв„ҡ-resp-вүғ : {p q : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ (-в„ҡ p) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ q)
negв„ҡ-resp-вүғ {a / b} {c / d} eq =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-neg-left a (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
    (trans
      (cong negв„Ө eq)
      (sym (*в„Ө-neg-left c (вҒәtoв„Ө b))))

-- В§ Nonzero rational: numerator is not zero.
NonZeroв„ҡ : в„ҡ вҶ’ Set
NonZeroв„ҡ q = num q вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ вҠҘ

-- В§ Reciprocal on the full nonzero sector of в„ҡ.
reciprocalвү 0 : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ NonZeroв„ҡ q вҶ’ в„ҡ
reciprocalвү 0 (0в„Ө / b) qnz = вҠҘ-elim (qnz refl)
reciprocalвү 0 ((+suc n) / b) qnz =
  reciprocalвҒә ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„Ө-pos n))
reciprocalвү 0 ((-suc n) / b) qnz =
  -в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„Ө-pos n)))

-- В§ Any nonzero rational times its reciprocal is 1.
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-right : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (qnz : NonZeroв„ҡ q) вҶ’ (q *в„ҡ reciprocalвү 0 q qnz) вүғв„ҡ 1в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-right (0в„Ө / b) qnz = вҠҘ-elim (qnz refl)
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-right ((+suc n) / b) qnz =
  *в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-right ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ ((+suc n) / b) (0<в„Ө-pos n))
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-right ((-suc n) / b) qnz =
  let
    p : в„ҡ
    p = (+suc n) / b

    ppos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ p
    ppos = 0<в„ӨnumвҶ’0<в„ҡ p (0<в„Ө-pos n)

    stepвӮҒ : (((-в„ҡ p) *в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә p ppos)))) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә p ppos))))
    stepвӮҒ = *в„ҡ-neg-left p (-в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә p ppos))

    stepвӮӮ : (p *в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә p ppos))) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә p ppos))
    stepвӮӮ = *в„ҡ-neg-right p (reciprocalвҒә p ppos)

    stepвӮғ : (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (reciprocalвҒә p ppos)))) вүғв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә p ppos)))
    stepвӮғ = negв„ҡ-resp-вүғ stepвӮӮ

    stepвӮ„ : (-в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә p ppos))) вүғв„ҡ (p *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә p ppos)
    stepвӮ„ = -в„ҡ-involutive (p *в„ҡ reciprocalвҒә p ppos)
  in
  вүғв„ҡ-trans stepвӮҒ (вүғв„ҡ-trans stepвӮғ (вүғв„ҡ-trans stepвӮ„ (*в„ҡ-reciprocalвҒә-right p ppos)))

-- В§ The reciprocal also cancels on the left for any nonzero rational.
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-left : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (qnz : NonZeroв„ҡ q) вҶ’ (reciprocalвү 0 q qnz *в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ 1в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-left q qnz =
  вүғв„ҡ-trans
    (*в„ҡ-comm (reciprocalвү 0 q qnz) q)
    (*в„ҡ-reciprocalвү 0-right q qnz)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Rational Distributivity.}
With associativity, identity, and zero laws in place, the remaining
algebraic burden is distributivity. Both left and right distributivity
reduce to integer cross-multiplication identities via denominator
clearing.

\begin{code}
-- В§ *в„ҡ right-distributes over +в„ҡ
*в„ҡ-distrib-right-+в„ҡ : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ p *в„ҡ (q +в„ҡ r) вүғв„ҡ (p *в„ҡ q) +в„ҡ (p *в„ҡ r)
*в„ҡ-distrib-right-+в„ҡ (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  let
    B : в„Ө
    B = вҒәtoв„Ө b

    D : в„Ө
    D = вҒәtoв„Ө d

    F : в„Ө
    F = вҒәtoв„Ө f

    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    bf : в„•вҒә
    bf = b *вҒә f

    df : в„•вҒә
    df = d *вҒә f

    denR : в„Ө
    denR = (B *в„Ө D) *в„Ө (B *в„Ө F)

    denL : в„Ө
    denL = B *в„Ө (D *в„Ө F)

    denRвүЎ : вҒәtoв„Ө (bd *вҒә bf) вүЎ denR
    denRвүЎ =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә bd bf)
        (congвӮӮ _*в„Ө_ (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f))

    denLвүЎ : вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә df) вүЎ denL
    denLвүЎ = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә-assocЛЎ b d f

    cF : в„Ө
    cF = c *в„Ө F

    eD : в„Ө
    eD = e *в„Ө D

    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = a *в„Ө (cF +в„Ө eD)

    lhsExpandвӮҖ : (lhsNum *в„Ө denR) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө cF) *в„Ө denR) +в„Ө ((a *в„Ө eD) *в„Ө denR)
    lhsExpandвӮҖ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө denR) (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө a cF eD))
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө cF) (a *в„Ө eD) denR)

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

    rhsExpandвӮҖ : (rhsNum *в„Ө denL) вүЎ (((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) *в„Ө denL) +в„Ө (((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө denL)
    rhsExpandвӮҖ = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) denL

    -- term 1 alignment
    t1-lhs : ((a *в„Ө cF) *в„Ө denR) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө denR) *в„Ө F
    t1-lhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө denR) (sym (*в„Ө-assoc a c F)))
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө c) F denR)
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm F denR))
            (sym (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө c) denR F))))

    t1-rhs : (((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) *в„Ө denL) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө denR) *в„Ө F
    t1-rhs =
      let
        bfвҶ’ : вҒәtoв„Ө bf вүЎ B *в„Ө F
        bfвҶ’ = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f

        denLвҶ’ : denL вүЎ (B *в„Ө D) *в„Ө F
        denLвҶ’ = sym (*в„Ө-assoc B D F)
      in
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө t) *в„Ө denL) bfвҶ’)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө (B *в„Ө F)) *в„Ө t) denLвҶ’)
          (trans
            (sym (*в„Ө-assoc ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө (B *в„Ө F)) (B *в„Ө D) F))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө F) (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө c) (B *в„Ө F) (B *в„Ө D)))
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө t) *в„Ө F) (*в„Ө-comm (B *в„Ө F) (B *в„Ө D))))))

    t1 : ((a *в„Ө cF) *в„Ө denR) вүЎ (((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) *в„Ө denL)
    t1 = trans t1-lhs (sym t1-rhs)

    -- term 2 alignment
    t2-lhs : ((a *в„Ө eD) *в„Ө denR) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө denR) *в„Ө D
    t2-lhs =
      trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө denR) (sym (*в„Ө-assoc a e D)))
          (trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө e) D denR)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm D denR))
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө e) denR D))))

    t2-rhs : (((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө denL) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө denR) *в„Ө D
    t2-rhs =
      let
        bdвҶ’ : вҒәtoв„Ө bd вүЎ B *в„Ө D
        bdвҶ’ = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d

        denLвҶ’ : denL вүЎ (B *в„Ө F) *в„Ө D
        denLвҶ’ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ B *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm D F))
            (sym (*в„Ө-assoc B F D))
      in
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) *в„Ө denL) bdвҶ’)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө (B *в„Ө D)) *в„Ө t) denLвҶ’)
          (trans
            (sym (*в„Ө-assoc ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө (B *в„Ө D)) (B *в„Ө F) D))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө D) (*в„Ө-assoc (a *в„Ө e) (B *в„Ө D) (B *в„Ө F)))))

    t2 : ((a *в„Ө eD) *в„Ө denR) вүЎ (((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө denL)
    t2 = trans t2-lhs (sym t2-rhs)

    sumEq : (((a *в„Ө cF) *в„Ө denR) +в„Ө ((a *в„Ө eD) *в„Ө denR)) вүЎ ((((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) *в„Ө denL) +в„Ө (((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө denL))
    sumEq = congвӮӮ _+в„Ө_ t1 t2
  in
  trans
    (cong (О» t вҶ’ lhsNum *в„Ө t) denRвүЎ)
    (trans
      lhsExpandвӮҖ
      (trans
        sumEq
        (trans
          (sym rhsExpandвӮҖ)
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ rhsNum *в„Ө t) (sym denLвүЎ)))))

-- В§ *в„ҡ left-distributes over +в„ҡ (by commutativity reduction)
*в„ҡ-distrib-left-+в„ҡ : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (p +в„ҡ q) *в„ҡ r вүғв„ҡ (p *в„ҡ r) +в„ҡ (q *в„ҡ r)
*в„ҡ-distrib-left-+в„ҡ p q r =
  вүғв„ҡ-trans
    {p = (p +в„ҡ q) *в„ҡ r}
    {q = r *в„ҡ (p +в„ҡ q)}
    {r = (p *в„ҡ r) +в„ҡ (q *в„ҡ r)}
    (*в„ҡ-comm (p +в„ҡ q) r)
    (вүғв„ҡ-trans
      {p = r *в„ҡ (p +в„ҡ q)}
      {q = (r *в„ҡ p) +в„ҡ (r *в„ҡ q)}
      {r = (p *в„ҡ r) +в„ҡ (q *в„ҡ r)}
      (*в„ҡ-distrib-right-+в„ҡ r p q)
      (+в„ҡ-resp-вүғ
        {p = r *в„ҡ p}
        {p' = p *в„ҡ r}
        {q = r *в„ҡ q}
        {q' = q *в„ҡ r}
        (*в„ҡ-comm r p)
        (*в„ҡ-comm r q)))
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{\texorpdfstring{$\varepsilon$}{Оө}-Splitting Laws}
\label{sec:rationals:epsilon-splitting-laws}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

For any positive $\varepsilon = a/b$, define
$\delta = 1/(4b)$.  Then $0 < \delta$ and $\delta + \delta < \varepsilon$.
This makes it possible to combine two Cauchy-style bounds into one.  The
section forces a canonical small witness from the denominator of
$\varepsilon$, eliminating arbitrary threshold choices.

\begin{code}
-- В§ forced constant: 2 as в„•вҒә
twoвҒә : в„•вҒә
twoвҒә = sucвҒә oneвҒә

-- В§ denominator constructors for Оө-splitting
halfDen : в„•вҒә вҶ’ в„•вҒә
halfDen b = twoвҒә *вҒә b

quarterDen : в„•вҒә вҶ’ в„•вҒә
quarterDen b = twoвҒә *вҒә (twoвҒә *вҒә b)

ОөQuarter : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
ОөQuarter (a / b) = oneв„Ө / quarterDen b

ОөHalf : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„ҡ
ОөHalf (a / b) = oneв„Ө / halfDen b

-- В§ ОөQuarter is positive
ОөQuarter-pos : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө
ОөQuarter-pos (a / b) =
  let
    qd : в„•вҒә
    qd = quarterDen b

    lhs0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhs0 = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө qd)

    oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә вүЎ oneв„Ө
    oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө = refl

    rhs1 : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ oneв„Ө
    rhs1 = trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ oneв„Ө *в„Ө t) oneвҒәв„ӨвүЎoneв„Ө) (*в„Ө-one-right oneв„Ө)
  in
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ {x = 0в„Ө} {y = 0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd} {z = oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә} (sym lhs0)
    (<в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі {x = 0в„Ө} {y = oneв„Ө} {z = oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә} (sym rhs1) 0в„Ө<oneв„Ө)

-- В§ doubling ОөQuarter yields ОөHalf (up to вүғв„ҡ)
ОөQuarter+ОөQuarterвүғОөHalf : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө) вүғв„ҡ (ОөHalf Оө)
ОөQuarter+ОөQuarterвүғОөHalf (a / b) =
  let
    qd : в„•вҒә
    qd = quarterDen b

    hd : в„•вҒә
    hd = halfDen b

    lhsNum : в„Ө
    lhsNum = (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) +в„Ө (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd)

    lhsDen : в„•вҒә
    lhsDen = qd *вҒә qd

    qdSplit : вҒәtoв„Ө qd вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә) *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    qdSplit =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә twoвҒә (twoвҒә *вҒә b))
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә twoвҒә b))

    hdSplit : вҒәtoв„Ө hd вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    hdSplit = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә twoвҒә b

    lhsExpand : (lhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd) вүЎ (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd +в„Ө (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd
    lhsExpand =
      *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) (вҒәtoв„Ө hd)

    oneqd : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө qd
    oneqd = *в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө qd)

    term : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd
    term = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd) oneqd

    rhs : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө qd)
    rhs =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ oneв„Ө *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә qd qd))
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-one-left ((вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө qd)))
          refl)

    twoв„Ө : в„Ө
    twoв„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә

    twoв„ӨвүЎ : twoв„Ө вүЎ oneв„Ө +в„Ө oneв„Ө
    twoв„ӨвүЎ = refl

    qdвүЎtwohd : qd вүЎ twoвҒә *вҒә hd
    qdвүЎtwohd = refl

    qdAsTwoHd : вҒәtoв„Ө qd вүЎ twoв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd
    qdAsTwoHd = trans (cong вҒәtoв„Ө qdвүЎtwohd) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә twoвҒә hd)

    qdHd : в„Ө
    qdHd = (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd

    dupToMul2 : (qdHd +в„Ө qdHd) вүЎ qdHd *в„Ө twoв„Ө
    dupToMul2 =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө qdHd) (sym (*в„Ө-one-right qdHd)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (qdHd *в„Ө oneв„Ө) +в„Ө t) (sym (*в„Ө-one-right qdHd)))
          (trans
            (sym (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө qdHd oneв„Ө oneв„Ө))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ qdHd *в„Ө t) (sym twoв„ӨвүЎ))))

    squareToMul2 : ((вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө qd)) вүЎ qdHd *в„Ө twoв„Ө
    squareToMul2 =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө t) qdAsTwoHd)
        (trans
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) twoв„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө hd)))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) twoв„Ө))
            (trans
              (*в„Ө-assoc twoв„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө qd) (вҒәtoв„Ө hd))
              (*в„Ө-comm twoв„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө qd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd)))))

    goal : (lhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө hd) вүЎ (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen)
    goal =
      trans
        lhsExpand
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө t) term)
          (trans
            dupToMul2
            (trans (sym squareToMul2) (sym rhs))))
  in
  goal
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Epsilon Splitting (Оө/2 Infrastructure).}
\texttt{ОөHalf} is positive when $\varepsilon$ is, and satisfies
$\varepsilon/2 < \varepsilon$---the key lemma for Cauchy convergence.
\texttt{ОөQuarter} is used for product congruence arguments.

\begin{code}
-- В§ ОөHalf < Оө (when Оө > 0)
ОөHalf<Оө : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө вҶ’ ОөHalf Оө <в„ҡ Оө
ОөHalf<Оө (a / b) Оөpos =
  let
    aPos : 0в„Ө <в„Ө a
    aPos = 0в„ҡ<вҶ’0в„Ө<num (a / b) Оөpos

    one<2a-sum : oneв„Ө <в„Ө (a +в„Ө a)
    one<2a-sum = oneв„Ө<twoTimes-pos a aPos

    twoв„Ө : в„Ө
    twoв„Ө = вҒәtoв„Ө twoвҒә

    twoв„ӨвүЎ : twoв„Ө вүЎ oneв„Ө +в„Ө oneв„Ө
    twoв„ӨвүЎ = refl

    aTimesTwoвүЎ : (a *в„Ө twoв„Ө) вүЎ (a +в„Ө a)
    aTimesTwoвүЎ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) twoв„ӨвүЎ)
        (trans
          (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө a oneв„Ө oneв„Ө)
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (a *в„Ө oneв„Ө)) (*в„Ө-one-right a))
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-one-right a))))

    one<2a : oneв„Ө <в„Ө (a *в„Ө twoв„Ө)
    one<2a = <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym aTimesTwoвүЎ) one<2a-sum

    stepвӮҒ : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) <в„Ө ((a *в„Ө twoв„Ө) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
    stepвӮҒ = <в„Ө-mul-pos-right b one<2a

    lhsEq : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө b
    lhsEq = *в„Ө-one-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    rhsEq : ((a *в„Ө twoв„Ө) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (twoвҒә *вҒә b))
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc a twoв„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b))
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә twoвҒә b)))

    core : (oneв„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) <в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (twoвҒә *вҒә b))
    core = <в„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsEq stepвӮҒ
  in
  core

-- В§ ОөQuarter-double < Оө
ОөQuarter-double<Оө : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө вҶ’ (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө) <в„ҡ Оө
ОөQuarter-double<Оө Оө Оөpos =
  let
    eq : (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө) вүғв„ҡ (ОөHalf Оө)
    eq = ОөQuarter+ОөQuarterвүғОөHalf Оө

    le : (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө) вүӨв„ҡ (ОөHalf Оө)
    le = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {p = ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө} {q = ОөHalf Оө} eq

    halfLt : (ОөHalf Оө) <в„ҡ Оө
    halfLt = ОөHalf<Оө Оө Оөpos
  in
  вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {x = ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө} {y = ОөHalf Оө} {z = Оө} le halfLt

-- В§ ОөQuarter < Оө (from ОөQuarter вүӨ double < Оө)
ОөQuarter<Оө : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө вҶ’ ОөQuarter Оө <в„ҡ Оө
ОөQuarter<Оө Оө Оөpos =
  let
    eq : ОөQuarter Оө вүғв„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө
    eq = вүғв„ҡ-refl (ОөQuarter Оө)

    ОөqPos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө
    ОөqPos = ОөQuarter-pos Оө

    ОөqNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө
    ОөqNonneg = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {x = 0в„ҡ} {y = ОөQuarter Оө} ОөqPos

    ОөqвүӨОөq+Оөq : ОөQuarter Оө вүӨв„ҡ (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө)
    ОөqвүӨОөq+Оөq = вүӨв„ҡ-add-nonneg-right (ОөQuarter Оө) (ОөQuarter Оө) ОөqNonneg

    double<Оө : (ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө) <в„ҡ Оө
    double<Оө = ОөQuarter-double<Оө Оө Оөpos
  in
  вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {x = ОөQuarter Оө} {y = ОөQuarter Оө +в„ҡ ОөQuarter Оө} {z = Оө} ОөqвүӨОөq+Оөq double<Оө
\end{code}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Rational Distance Laws}
\label{ch:rat-dist}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Every metric space axiom for $d_{\mathbb{Q}}$ is forced by the
cross-multiplication setoid on $\mathbb{Q}$. Self-distance is zero
(reflexivity), $|x-y| = |y-x|$ (symmetry), the triangle inequality
$d(p,r) \le d(p,q) + d(q,r)$ is an integer-level
scaling argument, and translation/multiplicative invariance follow by
factoring out common denominator squares.
The absolute-value numerator and the cross-multiplication denominators must
remain coherent under addition, negation, and multiplication.  These
constraints force the full metric algebra of $\mathbb{Q}$, including the key
bounded-by-$\varepsilon$ laws used later in the Cauchy closure arguments.

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Metric Axioms}
\label{sec:rational-metric:metric-axioms}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The core metric axioms for $d_{\mathbb{Q}}$ are forced here. Each axiom
collapses to integer absolute-value identities together with denominator
coherence in the rational setoid.

\begin{code}
-- В§ absв„Ө respects propositional equality
absв„Ө-cong : {x y : в„Ө} вҶ’ x вүЎ y вҶ’ absв„Ө x вүЎ absв„Ө y
absв„Ө-cong = cong absв„Ө

-- В§ Law 14U.0: distв„ҡ q q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ (reflexivity)
distв„ҡ-refl : (q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ q q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
distв„ҡ-refl (a / b) =
  let x : в„Ө
      x = a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

      numDist : в„Ө
      numDist = absв„Ө (x +в„Ө negв„Ө x)

      numDistвүЎ0 : numDist вүЎ 0в„Ө
      numDistвүЎ0 =
        trans
          (absв„Ө-cong (+в„Ө-inv-right x))
          absв„Ө-zero

      denDist : в„•вҒә
      denDist = b *вҒә b

      lhs0 : (numDist *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ 0в„Ө
      lhs0 =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) numDistвүЎ0)
          (trans (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)) refl)

      rhs0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө denDist) вүЎ 0в„Ө
      rhs0 = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө denDist)

  in
  trans lhs0 (sym rhs0)

-- В§ distв„ҡ q q <в„ҡ Оө for any positive Оө
distв„ҡ-const<Оө : (q Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө вҶ’ distв„ҡ q q <в„ҡ Оө
distв„ҡ-const<Оө (a / b) (c / d) Оөpos =
  let x : в„Ө
      x = a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

      numDist : в„Ө
      numDist = absв„Ө (x +в„Ө negв„Ө x)

      numDistвүЎ0 : numDist вүЎ 0в„Ө
      numDistвүЎ0 =
        trans
          (absв„Ө-cong (+в„Ө-inv-right x))
          absв„Ө-zero

      lhs : в„Ө
      lhs = numDist *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d

      rhs : в„Ө
      rhs = c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә b)

      lhsвүЎ0 : lhs вүЎ 0в„Ө
      lhsвүЎ0 =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) numDistвүЎ0)
          (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө d))

      cpos : 0в„Ө <в„Ө c
      cpos = 0в„ҡ<вҶ’0в„Ө<num (c / d) Оөpos

      rhsPos : 0в„Ө <в„Ө rhs
      rhsPos = 0<в„Ө-mul-pos-right c (b *вҒә b) cpos

      base : 0в„Ө <в„Ө rhs
      base = rhsPos

  in
  <в„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsвүЎ0) base

-- В§ p вүғв„ҡ q implies distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
distв„ҡ-вүғ0 : {p q : в„ҡ} вҶ’ p вүғв„ҡ q вҶ’ distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
distв„ҡ-вүғ0 {a / b} {c / d} eq =
  let
    x : в„Ө
    x = a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d

    y : в„Ө
    y = c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    z : в„Ө
    z = x +в„Ө negв„Ө y

    zвүЎ0 : z вүЎ 0в„Ө
    zвүЎ0 =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө y) eq)
        (+в„Ө-inv-right y)

    absZвүЎ0 : absв„Ө z вүЎ 0в„Ө
    absZвүЎ0 = trans (absв„Ө-cong zвүЎ0) absв„Ө-zero

    lhs0 : (absв„Ө z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhs0 =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) absZвүЎ0)
        (trans (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә)) refl)

    rhs0 : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    rhs0 = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))
  in
  trans lhs0 (sym rhs0)
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Nonnegativity, Symmetry, and Negation Invariance.}
These standard distance properties follow from absolute-value laws
integrated through the cross-multiplication bridge.

\begin{code}
-- В§ distв„ҡ p q вүҘ 0 (nonnegativity)
distв„ҡ-nonneg : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q
distв„ҡ-nonneg (a / b) (c / d) =
  let
    z : в„Ө
    z = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    rhs0 : 0в„Ө вүӨв„Ө absв„Ө z
    rhs0 = absв„Ө-nonneg z

    lhsEq : (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    lhsEq = *в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d))

    rhsEq : (absв„Ө z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) вүЎ absв„Ө z
    rhsEq = *в„Ө-one-right (absв„Ө z)
  in
  вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ (sym lhsEq) (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі (sym rhsEq) rhs0)

-- В§ distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ q p (symmetry)
distв„ҡ-sym : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ q p
distв„ҡ-sym (a / b) (c / d) =
  let z : в„Ө
      z = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

      z' : в„Ө
      z' = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө negв„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)

      negzвүЎz' : negв„Ө z вүЎ z'
      negzвүЎz' =
        trans
          (neg-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ negв„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө t) (negв„Ө-involutive (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
            (+в„Ө-comm (negв„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)))

      absEq : absв„Ө z вүЎ absв„Ө z'
      absEq =
        trans
          (sym (absв„Ө-neg z))
          (trans
            (cong absв„Ө negzвүЎz')
            refl)

      denComm : b *вҒә d вүЎ d *вҒә b
      denComm = *вҒә-comm b d

      denCommв„Ө : вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)
      denCommв„Ө = cong вҒәtoв„Ө (sym denComm)

      lhs : absв„Ө z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b) вүЎ absв„Ө z' *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)
      lhs =
        trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә b)) absEq)
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (absв„Ө z') *в„Ө t) denCommв„Ө)

  in
  lhs

-- В§ distв„ҡ (-p) (-q) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q (negation invariance)
distв„ҡ-neg : (p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ (-в„ҡ p) (-в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q
distв„ҡ-neg (a / b) (c / d) =
  let
    den : в„•вҒә
    den = b *вҒә d

    z : в„Ө
    z = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    zNeg : в„Ө
    zNeg = (negв„Ө a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (negв„Ө c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    zNegвүЎnegz : zNeg вүЎ negв„Ө z
    zNegвүЎnegz =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (negв„Ө c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (*в„Ө-neg-left a (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ negв„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө t)
            (cong negв„Ө (*в„Ө-neg-left c (вҒәtoв„Ө b))))
          (sym (neg-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)))))

    absEq : absв„Ө zNeg вүЎ absв„Ө z
    absEq = trans (cong absв„Ө zNegвүЎnegz) (absв„Ө-neg z)
  in
  cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө den) absEq
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Triangle Inequality}
\label{sec:rational-metric:triangle-inequality}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The triangle inequality $d(p,r) \le d(p,q) + d(q,r)$ is forced by
multiplying the base scaled-numerator inequality through by a common
positive factor $s = (b \cdot d) \cdot f$, then regrouping the six
resulting terms.  No alternative estimate survives once all three distances are
expressed over the same positive scale.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14U.1: triangle inequality for distв„ҡ
distв„ҡ-triangle : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ p r вүӨв„ҡ (distв„ҡ p q +в„ҡ distв„ҡ q r)
distв„ҡ-triangle (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  goal
  where
    p q rQ : в„ҡ
    p = a / b
    q = c / d
    rQ = e / f

    nd-pr : в„Ө
    nd-pr = numDistв„ҡ p rQ

    nd-pq : в„Ө
    nd-pq = numDistв„ҡ p q

    nd-qr : в„Ө
    nd-qr = numDistв„ҡ q rQ

    bd df bf : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d
    df = d *вҒә f
    bf = b *вҒә f

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

    rhsDen : в„•вҒә
    rhsDen = bd *вҒә df

    -- В§ base scaled numerator inequality
    ineq0 : (nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) вүӨв„Ө ((nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
    ineq0 = numDistв„ҡ-triangle-scaled p q rQ

    -- В§ multiply by common positive scale s = (bВ·d)В·f
    s : в„•вҒә
    s = bd *вҒә f

    scaled : ((nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
              вүӨв„Ө
             (((nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    scaled =
      вүӨв„Ө-mul-pos-right
        (nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)
        ((nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b))
        s
        ineq0

    -- В§ swap two positive scaling factors
    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    -- В§ split scaling by a product u*вҒәv into sequential scaling
    scaleSplit : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
    scaleSplit x u v =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

    -- В§ LHS rewrite: ((nd-prВ·d)В·s) = nd-pr В· rhsDen
    lhsEq : ((nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) вүЎ (nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen)
    lhsEq =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) bd f)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale nd-pr d bd))
          (trans
            (sym (scaleSplit (nd-pr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) d f))
            (sym (scaleSplit nd-pr bd df))))

    -- В§ term-pq rewrite: (nd-pqВ·f)В·s = (nd-pqВ·df)В·bf
    term-pq : (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s вүЎ (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf
    term-pq =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) bd f)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale nd-pq f bd))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
              (trans
                (scaleSplit nd-pq b d)
                (swapScale nd-pq b d)))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)
                (swapScale (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) b f))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ (t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (sym (scaleSplit nd-pq d f)))
                (sym (scaleSplit (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) b f))))))

    -- В§ term-qr rewrite: (nd-qrВ·b)В·s = (nd-qrВ·bd)В·bf
    term-qr : (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s вүЎ (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf
    term-qr =
      trans
        (scaleSplit (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) bd f)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (swapScale nd-qr b bd))
          (sym (scaleSplit (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) b f)))

    rhsEq : (((nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) вүЎ (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
    rhsEq =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө s))
        (trans
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө ((nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)) term-pq)
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө t) term-qr))
          (sym (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (nd-pq *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) (nd-qr *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) (вҒәtoв„Ө bf))))

    goal : distв„ҡ p rQ вүӨв„ҡ (distв„ҡ p q +в„ҡ distв„ҡ q rQ)
    goal =
      вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎЛЎ lhsEq
        (вүӨв„Ө-resp-вүЎКі rhsEq scaled)
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Translation Invariance}
\label{sec:rational-metric:translation-invariance}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Adding the same rational to both endpoints cannot change distance: the
$r$-contributed terms cancel exactly, leaving the base difference
multiplied by a denominator square $f^2$. Translation
dependence is eliminated by forcing those added terms to cancel on the nose.

\begin{code}
-- В§ distв„ҡ (p+r) (q+r) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q (right translation)
distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-right : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ (p +в„ҡ r) (q +в„ҡ r) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q
distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-right (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  let
    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    scaleSplit : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
    scaleSplit x u v =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

    mul4-rearrange : (x y z w : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө (z *в„Ө w) вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө (y *в„Ө w)
    mul4-rearrange x y z w =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x y (z *в„Ө w))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t)
            (trans
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc y z w))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө w) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
                (*в„Ө-assoc z y w))))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z (y *в„Ө w))))

    bf : в„•вҒә
    bf = b *вҒә f

    df : в„•вҒә
    df = d *вҒә f

    s : в„•вҒә
    s = f *вҒә f

    base : в„Ө
    base = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    Pn : в„Ө
    Pn = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    Qn : в„Ө
    Qn = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) +в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d)

    Z : в„Ө
    Z = (Pn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)

    -- В§ denominator embedding factorization
    denFactor : вҒәtoв„Ө (bf *вҒә df) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    denFactor =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә bf df)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө df)) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f))
            (trans
              (mul4-rearrange (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f))) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d)))
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f)))))))

    -- В§ numerator cancellation and factoring
    cancelR : Z вүЎ base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    cancelR =
      let
        afdf : в„Ө
        afdf = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df

        ebdf : в„Ө
        ebdf = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df

        cfbf : в„Ө
        cfbf = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf

        edbf : в„Ө
        edbf = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf

        expandP : (Pn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df)
        expandP = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө df)

        expandQ : (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
        expandQ = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө bf)

        negExpandQ : negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ negв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
        negExpandQ = trans (cong negв„Ө expandQ) (neg-+в„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf))

        ZвӮҒ : Z вүЎ (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df))
                 +в„Ө (negв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf))
        ZвӮҒ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)) expandP)
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df)) +в„Ө t) negExpandQ)

        ebdfвүЎedbf : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүЎ ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)
        ebdfвүЎedbf =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f))
            (trans
              (mul4-rearrange e (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
              (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f))))

        cancelTerm : ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ 0в„Ө
        cancelTerm = trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)) ebdfвүЎedbf) (+в„Ө-inv-right ((e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf))

        afdfвүЎads : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө df) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
        afdfвүЎads =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f))
            (trans
              (mul4-rearrange a (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f))))

        cfbfвүЎcbs : ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
        cfbfвүЎcbs =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f))
            (trans
              (mul4-rearrange c (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f))))

        -- В§ cancel the r-contributed terms
        ZвӮӮ : Z вүЎ afdf +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf
        ZвӮӮ =
          let
            Zexp : Z вүЎ (afdf +в„Ө ebdf) +в„Ө (negв„Ө cfbf +в„Ө negв„Ө edbf)
            Zexp =
              trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf)) expandP)
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((afdf +в„Ө ebdf) +в„Ө t))
                    (trans (cong negв„Ө expandQ) (neg-+в„Ө cfbf edbf)))
                  refl)

            swapNeg : (negв„Ө cfbf +в„Ө negв„Ө edbf) вүЎ (negв„Ө edbf +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf)
            swapNeg = +в„Ө-comm (negв„Ө cfbf) (negв„Ө edbf)

            cancelPair : ebdf +в„Ө negв„Ө edbf вүЎ 0в„Ө
            cancelPair =
              trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө edbf) ebdfвүЎedbf)
                (+в„Ө-inv-right edbf)

          in
          trans
            (trans
              Zexp
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ (afdf +в„Ө ebdf) +в„Ө t) swapNeg)
                (trans
                  (+в„Ө-assoc afdf ebdf (negв„Ө edbf +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf))
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ afdf +в„Ө t) (sym (+в„Ө-assoc ebdf (negв„Ө edbf) (negв„Ө cfbf)))))))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ afdf +в„Ө (t +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf)) cancelPair)
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ afdf +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-zero-left (negв„Ө cfbf))))

        -- В§ factor out the common scale s = fВ·f
        factor : (afdf +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf) вүЎ base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
        factor =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө cfbf) afdfвүЎads)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) cfbfвүЎcbs)
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө t)
                  (sym (*в„Ө-neg-left (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө s))))
                (sym (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (вҒәtoв„Ө s)))))
      in
      trans ZвӮӮ factor

    absZEq : absв„Ө Z вүЎ absв„Ө base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    absZEq = trans (cong absв„Ө cancelR) (absв„Ө-mul-pos-right base s)

    rhsDen : в„•вҒә
    rhsDen = b *вҒә d

    lhsDen : в„•вҒә
    lhsDen = bf *вҒә df

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = absв„Ө base

    rhsRewrite : (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen) вүЎ (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    rhsRewrite =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ rhsNum *в„Ө t) denFactor)
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc rhsNum (вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) (вҒәtoв„Ө s)))

    cross : (absв„Ө Z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) вүЎ (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen)
    cross =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) absZEq)
        (trans
          (swapScale rhsNum s rhsDen)
          (sym rhsRewrite))
  in
  cross
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Left Translation.}
The left-translation variant $d(r+p,\,r+q) \simeq d(p,q)$
follows the same pattern with $r$-terms on the left:
expand, cancel the shared $e \cdot b \cdot d$-like terms, then
factor the residue through $(f \cdot f)$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ distв„ҡ (r+p) (r+q) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q (left translation)
distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-left : (r p q : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ (r +в„ҡ p) (r +в„ҡ q) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ p q
distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-left (e / f) (a / b) (c / d) =
  let
    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    mul4-rearrange : (x y z w : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө (z *в„Ө w) вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө (y *в„Ө w)
    mul4-rearrange x y z w =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x y (z *в„Ө w))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t)
            (trans
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc y z w))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө w) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
                (*в„Ө-assoc z y w))))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z (y *в„Ө w))))

    fb : в„•вҒә
    fb = f *вҒә b

    fd : в„•вҒә
    fd = f *вҒә d

    s : в„•вҒә
    s = f *вҒә f

    base : в„Ө
    base = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    Pn : в„Ө
    Pn = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) +в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)

    Qn : в„Ө
    Qn = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) +в„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f)

    Z : в„Ө
    Z = (Pn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fd) +в„Ө negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fb)

    denFactor : вҒәtoв„Ө (fb *вҒә fd) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө s)
    denFactor =
      trans
        (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә fb fd)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө fd)) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f b))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b)) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f d))
            (trans
              (mul4-rearrange (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
              (trans
                (*в„Ө-comm ((вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)) ((вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө ((вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f))) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d)))
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f))))))))

    cancelR : Z вүЎ base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    cancelR =
      let
        ebfd : в„Ө
        ebfd = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fd

        affd : в„Ө
        affd = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fd

        edfb : в„Ө
        edfb = (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fb

        cffb : в„Ө
        cffb = (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fb

        expandP : (Pn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fd) вүЎ ebfd +в„Ө affd
        expandP = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө fd)

        expandQ : (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fb) вүЎ edfb +в„Ө cffb
        expandQ = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө fb)

        Zexp : Z вүЎ (ebfd +в„Ө affd) +в„Ө (negв„Ө edfb +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb)
        Zexp =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (Qn *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө fb)) expandP)
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (ebfd +в„Ө affd) +в„Ө t) (trans (cong negв„Ө expandQ) (neg-+в„Ө edfb cffb)))
              refl)

        ebfdвүЎedfb : ebfd вүЎ edfb
        ebfdвүЎedfb =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f d))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
              (trans
                (mul4-rearrange e (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f)))
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ (e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f b))))))

        cancelPair : ebfd +в„Ө negв„Ө edfb вүЎ 0в„Ө
        cancelPair =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө edfb) ebfdвүЎedfb)
            (+в„Ө-inv-right edfb)

        affdвүЎads : affd вүЎ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
        affdвүЎads =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f d))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d)))
              (trans
                (mul4-rearrange a (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө d) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f)))))

        cffbвүЎcbs : cffb вүЎ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
        cffbвүЎcbs =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f b))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
              (trans
                (mul4-rearrange c (вҒәtoв„Ө f) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө t) (sym (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә f f)))))

        stepвӮҒ : Z вүЎ affd +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb
        stepвӮҒ =
          trans
            Zexp
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (negв„Ө edfb +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb)) (+в„Ө-comm ebfd affd))
              (trans
                (+в„Ө-assoc affd ebfd (negв„Ө edfb +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ affd +в„Ө t) (sym (+в„Ө-assoc ebfd (negв„Ө edfb) (negв„Ө cffb))))
                  (trans
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ affd +в„Ө (t +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb)) cancelPair)
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ affd +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-zero-left (negв„Ө cffb)))))))

        stepвӮӮ : (affd +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb) вүЎ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
        stepвӮӮ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө cffb) affdвүЎads)
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) cffbвүЎcbs)

        factor : ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s)
                  вүЎ
                 base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
        factor =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s) +в„Ө t)
              (sym (*в„Ө-neg-left (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө s))))
            (sym (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d) (negв„Ө (c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (вҒәtoв„Ө s)))
      in
      trans stepвӮҒ (trans stepвӮӮ factor)

    absZEq : absв„Ө Z вүЎ absв„Ө base *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    absZEq = trans (cong absв„Ө cancelR) (absв„Ө-mul-pos-right base s)

    rhsDen : в„•вҒә
    rhsDen = b *вҒә d

    lhsDen : в„•вҒә
    lhsDen = fb *вҒә fd

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = absв„Ө base

    rhsRewrite : (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen) вүЎ (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө s
    rhsRewrite =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ rhsNum *в„Ө t) denFactor)
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc rhsNum (вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) (вҒәtoв„Ө s)))

    cross : (absв„Ө Z *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) вүЎ (rhsNum *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen)
    cross =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) absZEq)
        (trans
          (swapScale rhsNum s rhsDen)
          (sym rhsRewrite))
  in
  cross
\end{code}

%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Multiplicative Scaling}
\label{sec:rational-metric:multiplicative-scaling}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Multiplying both endpoints by the same rational $p$ scales the distance
by $d(p,0)$. This follows from factoring $Z = ab \cdot \mathrm{baseQR}$,
then pulling $|ab|$ apart via the multiplicativity of $|\cdot|$.  The scaling
law is therefore forced by a single common factor rather than by any separate
metric assumption.

\begin{code}
-- В§ distв„ҡ (p*q) (p*r) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ q r * distв„ҡ p 0 (left scaling)
distв„ҡ-*в„ҡ-left : (p q r : в„ҡ) вҶ’ distв„ҡ (p *в„ҡ q) (p *в„ҡ r) вүғв„ҡ (distв„ҡ q r *в„ҡ distв„ҡ p 0в„ҡ)
distв„ҡ-*в„ҡ-left (a / b) (c / d) (e / f) =
  let
    swapScale : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u
    swapScale x u v =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө v) (вҒәtoв„Ө u))))

    scaleSplit : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (u v : в„•вҒә) вҶ’ x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө (u *вҒә v) вүЎ (x *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө u) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө v
    scaleSplit x u v =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә u v))
        (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x (вҒәtoв„Ө u) (вҒәtoв„Ө v)))

    mul4-rearrange : (x y z w : в„Ө) вҶ’ (x *в„Ө y) *в„Ө (z *в„Ө w) вүЎ (x *в„Ө z) *в„Ө (y *в„Ө w)
    mul4-rearrange x y z w =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-assoc x y (z *в„Ө w))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ x *в„Ө t)
            (trans
              (sym (*в„Ө-assoc y z w))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө w) (*в„Ө-comm y z))
                (*в„Ө-assoc z y w))))
          (sym (*в„Ө-assoc x z (y *в„Ө w))))

    -- В§ key cleared numerators
    cf : в„Ө
    cf = c *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө f

    ed : в„Ө
    ed = e *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө d

    baseQR : в„Ө
    baseQR = cf +в„Ө negв„Ө ed

    ab : в„Ө
    ab = a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b

    -- В§ distв„ҡ p 0в„ҡ numerator collapses to absв„Ө a
    p0Raw : в„Ө
    p0Raw = (a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө oneвҒә) +в„Ө negв„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)

    p0RawвүЎa : p0Raw вүЎ a
    p0RawвүЎa =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (0в„Ө *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (*в„Ө-one-right a))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө negв„Ө t) (*в„Ө-zero-left (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
          (trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ a +в„Ө t) (negв„Ө-zero))
            (+в„Ө-zero-right a)))

    absP0 : в„Ө
    absP0 = absв„Ө p0Raw

    absP0вүЎabsA : absP0 вүЎ absв„Ө a
    absP0вүЎabsA = trans (absв„Ө-cong p0RawвүЎa) refl

    -- В§ LHS cleared numerator for distв„ҡ (p*q) (p*r)
    bf : в„•вҒә
    bf = b *вҒә f

    bd : в„•вҒә
    bd = b *вҒә d

    Z : в„Ө
    Z = ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) +в„Ө negв„Ө ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)

    termвӮҒ : ((a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bf) вүЎ ab *в„Ө cf
    termвӮҒ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө c) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f))
        (trans
          (mul4-rearrange a c (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө f))
          refl)

    termвӮӮ : ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd) вүЎ ab *в„Ө ed
    termвӮӮ =
      trans
        (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө t) (вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d))
        (trans
          (mul4-rearrange a e (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (вҒәtoв„Ө d))
          refl)

    factorZ : Z вүЎ ab *в„Ө baseQR
    factorZ =
      let
        ZвӮҒ : Z вүЎ (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө negв„Ө (ab *в„Ө ed)
        ZвӮҒ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө ((a *в„Ө e) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө bd)) termвӮҒ)
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө negв„Ө t) termвӮӮ)

        negPull : negв„Ө (ab *в„Ө ed) вүЎ ab *в„Ө negв„Ө ed
        negPull = sym (*в„Ө-neg-right ab ed)

        ZвӮӮ : (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө negв„Ө (ab *в„Ө ed) вүЎ (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө (ab *в„Ө negв„Ө ed)
        ZвӮӮ = cong (О» t вҶ’ (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө t) negPull

        ZвӮғ : (ab *в„Ө cf) +в„Ө (ab *в„Ө negв„Ө ed) вүЎ ab *в„Ө (cf +в„Ө negв„Ө ed)
        ZвӮғ = sym (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө ab cf (negв„Ө ed))
      in
      trans ZвӮҒ (trans ZвӮӮ ZвӮғ)

    absZ : в„Ө
    absZ = absв„Ө Z

    absZвүЎscaled : absZ вүЎ (absв„Ө baseQR *в„Ө absв„Ө a) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b
    absZвүЎscaled =
      let
        absZвӮҒ : absZ вүЎ absв„Ө (ab *в„Ө baseQR)
        absZвӮҒ = cong absв„Ө factorZ

        absZвӮӮ : absв„Ө (ab *в„Ө baseQR) вүЎ (absв„Ө ab *в„Ө absв„Ө baseQR)
        absZвӮӮ = absв„Ө-mul ab baseQR

        absAB : absв„Ө ab вүЎ absв„Ө a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b
        absAB = absв„Ө-mul-pos-right a b

        absZвӮғ : (absв„Ө ab *в„Ө absв„Ө baseQR) вүЎ ((absв„Ө a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө absв„Ө baseQR)
        absZвӮғ = cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө absв„Ө baseQR) absAB

        absZвӮ„ : ((absв„Ө a *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө absв„Ө baseQR) вүЎ ((absв„Ө baseQR *в„Ө absв„Ө a) *в„Ө вҒәtoв„Ө b)
        absZвӮ„ =
          trans
            (*в„Ө-assoc (absв„Ө a) (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (absв„Ө baseQR))
            (trans
              (cong (О» t вҶ’ (absв„Ө a) *в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-comm (вҒәtoв„Ө b) (absв„Ө baseQR)))
              (trans
                (sym (*в„Ө-assoc (absв„Ө a) (absв„Ө baseQR) (вҒәtoв„Ө b)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b)) (*в„Ө-comm (absв„Ө a) (absв„Ө baseQR)))
                  refl)))
      in
      trans absZвӮҒ (trans absZвӮӮ (trans absZвӮғ absZвӮ„))

    lhsDen : в„•вҒә
    lhsDen = (b *вҒә d) *вҒә (b *вҒә f)

    rhsDen : в„•вҒә
    rhsDen = (d *вҒә f) *вҒә (b *вҒә oneвҒә)

    rhsNum : в„Ө
    rhsNum = (absв„Ө baseQR *в„Ө absP0)

    rhsNumвүЎ : rhsNum вүЎ (absв„Ө baseQR *в„Ө absв„Ө a)
    rhsNumвүЎ = cong (О» t вҶ’ (absв„Ө baseQR *в„Ө t)) absP0вүЎabsA

    -- В§ denominator embedding relation
    denRel : (вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө b) вүЎ вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen
    denRel =
      let
        lhsвӮҖ : вҒәtoв„Ө lhsDen вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d)) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә f))
        lhsвӮҖ = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә (b *вҒә d) (b *вҒә f)

        rhsвӮҖ : вҒәtoв„Ө rhsDen вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә f)) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә oneвҒә))
        rhsвӮҖ = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә (d *вҒә f) (b *вҒә oneвҒә)

        bdf : вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә d) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө d)
        bdf = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b d

        bff : вҒәtoв„Ө (b *вҒә f) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө b) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)
        bff = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә b f

        dff : вҒәtoв„Ө (d *вҒә f) вүЎ (вҒәtoв„Ө d) *в„Ө (вҒәtoв„Ө f)
        dff = вҒәtoв„Ө-*вҒә d f
