    eq2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮӮ (linIJ a b v) i вүЎ blockвӮӮ (constVec12в„Ө k) i
    eq2 i =
      let
        v2 : blockвӮӮ v i вүЎ c
        v2 = snd (snd vConst) i

        a2 : a *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i вүЎ a *в„Ө c
        a2 = cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) v2

        b2 : b *в„Ө sum12в„Ө v вүЎ b *в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө c
        b2 = cong (О» t вҶ’ b *в„Ө t) sEq

        stepвӮҒ : (a *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө (b *в„Ө sum12в„Ө v) вүЎ (a *в„Ө c) +в„Ө (b *в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө c)
        stepвӮҒ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (b *в„Ө sum12в„Ө v)) a2)
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ (a *в„Ө c) +в„Ө t) b2)
      in
      trans
        (blockвӮӮ-linIJ a b v i)
        (trans stepвӮҒ (trans (coord a b c) refl))
\end{code}


\section{Spectral Package for \texorpdfstring{$\texttt{linIJ}$}{linIJ}}
\label{sec:span-ij:spectral-package}

The four forced spectral facts---sum-zero invariance,
constant invariance, sum-zero eigenvalue $a$,
constant eigenvalue $a+12b$---are bundled into a single
witness type so that downstream consumers need only
one import.  Packaging adds no new freedom; it only collects the already-forced
facts into a single interface.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.10: linIJ spectral package (4 components)
LinIJSpectralPackage : (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ Set
LinIJSpectralPackage a b =
  (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
    (ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 (linIJ a b v)) Г—
    (ConstVec12 v вҶ’ ConstVec12 (linIJ a b v)) Г—
    (ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (linIJ a b v) (scaleVec12в„Ө a v)) Г—
    ((c : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (linIJ a b (constVec12в„Ө c))
                      (scaleVec12в„Ө (a +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө b) (constVec12в„Ө c)))

law14O-10-linIJ-spectral-package : (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage a b
law14O-10-linIJ-spectral-package a b v =
  law14O-8-linIJ-preserves-sum0 a b v ,
  (law14O-9-linIJ-preserves-const a b v ,
   (law14O-2-linIJ-sum0-eigen a b v ,
    law14O-3-linIJ-const-eigen a b))

-- В§ Projections for LinIJSpectralPackage
LinIJPkg-sum0-inv : {a b : в„Ө} вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage a b вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 (linIJ a b v)
LinIJPkg-sum0-inv pkg v = fst (pkg v)

LinIJPkg-const-inv : {a b : в„Ө} вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage a b вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 v вҶ’ ConstVec12 (linIJ a b v)
LinIJPkg-const-inv pkg v = fst (snd (pkg v))

LinIJPkg-sum0-eigen : {a b : в„Ө} вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage a b вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (linIJ a b v) (scaleVec12в„Ө a v)
LinIJPkg-sum0-eigen pkg v = fst (snd (snd (pkg v)))

LinIJPkg-const-eigen : {a b : в„Ө} вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage a b вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (c : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (linIJ a b (constVec12в„Ө c)) (scaleVec12в„Ө (a +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө b) (constVec12в„Ө c))
LinIJPkg-const-eigen pkg v = snd (snd (snd (pkg v)))
\end{code}


\section{Transport from Normal Form to Spectral Facts}
\label{sec:span-ij:transport-to-spectral-facts}

Any operator $f$ that possesses a span witness
$f = a\!\cdot\!\mathbf{I}+b\!\cdot\!\mathbf{J}$
inherits all four spectral facts by composing the pointwise
equality with the corresponding forced law for $\texttt{linIJ}\;a\;b$.  The
transport step eliminates any distinction between an abstract span witness and
its normal-form representative.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.11: any f with witness f=(aВ·I+bВ·J) inherits the spectral facts
SpanOpSpectralFacts : (f : Op) вҶ’ (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ Set
SpanOpSpectralFacts f a b =
  (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
    (ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 (f v)) Г—
    (ConstVec12 v вҶ’ ConstVec12 (f v)) Г—
    (ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f v) (scaleVec12в„Ө a v)) Г—
    ((c : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f (constVec12в„Ө c))
                      (scaleVec12в„Ө (a +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө b) (constVec12в„Ө c)))

law14O-11-spanIJ-transport : (f : Op) вҶ’ (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ OpEq f (linIJ a b) вҶ’ SpanOpSpectralFacts f a b
law14O-11-spanIJ-transport f a b fEq v =
  sum0Inv ,
  (constInv ,
   (sum0Eigen ,
    constEigen))
  where
    sum0Inv : ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 (f v)
    sum0Inv sum0 =
      trans
        (sum12-cong (f v) (linIJ a b v) (fEq v))
        (law14O-8-linIJ-preserves-sum0 a b v sum0)

    constInv : ConstVec12 v вҶ’ ConstVec12 (f v)
    constInv (c , vConst) =
      let
        kLin : ConstVec12 (linIJ a b v)
        kLin = law14O-9-linIJ-preserves-const a b v (c , vConst)
      in
      fst kLin , Vec12Eq-trans (fEq v) (snd kLin)

    sum0Eigen : ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f v) (scaleVec12в„Ө a v)
    sum0Eigen sum0 =
      Vec12Eq-trans
        (fEq v)
        (law14O-2-linIJ-sum0-eigen a b v sum0)

    constEigen : (c : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f (constVec12в„Ө c))
                           (scaleVec12в„Ө (a +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө b) (constVec12в„Ө c))
    constEigen c =
      Vec12Eq-trans
        (fEq (constVec12в„Ө c))
        (law14O-3-linIJ-const-eigen a b c)
\end{code}


\section{Span Witness Packages}
\label{sec:span-ij:witness-packages}

The coefficient pair $(a,b)$ witnessing $f = a\!\cdot\!\mathbf{I}+b\!\cdot\!\mathbf{J}$
is forced unique by \hyperref[law:span-ij:image-witness-unique]{Law~14N.2}.
We package it together with the spectral facts so that
downstream consumers receive a single, canonical witness.  All
remaining witness multiplicity at the package level is thereby removed.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.12: span-IJ coefficient witness is forced unique
SpanIJSpectralPackage : Op вҶ’ Set
SpanIJSpectralPackage f = ОЈ SpanIJ (О» p вҶ’ OpEq f (interpIJ p))

law14O-12-spanIJ-witness-unique : (f : Op) вҶ’ (wвӮҒ wвӮӮ : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ fst wвӮҒ вүЎ fst wвӮӮ
law14O-12-spanIJ-witness-unique f = law14N-2-image-witness-unique f

-- В§ Law 14O.13: spectral facts are read directly from a span witness
SpanIJPkg-coeffs : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJ
SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg = fst pkg

SpanIJPkg-opEq : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ OpEq f (interpIJ (SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg))
SpanIJPkg-opEq pkg = snd pkg

SpanIJPkg-a : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ в„Ө
SpanIJPkg-a pkg = fst (SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg)

SpanIJPkg-b : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ в„Ө
SpanIJPkg-b pkg = snd (SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg)

SpanIJPkg-spectral : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ SpanOpSpectralFacts f (SpanIJPkg-a pkg) (SpanIJPkg-b pkg)
SpanIJPkg-spectral {f} pkg =
  law14O-11-spanIJ-transport f (SpanIJPkg-a pkg) (SpanIJPkg-b pkg) (SpanIJPkg-opEq pkg)

law14O-13-spanIJ-package-projections : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ SpanOpSpectralFacts f (SpanIJPkg-a pkg) (SpanIJPkg-b pkg)
law14O-13-spanIJ-package-projections pkg = SpanIJPkg-spectral pkg

-- В§ Consumer projections for SpanIJSpectralPackage
SpanIJPkg-sum0-inv : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 (f v)
SpanIJPkg-sum0-inv pkg v = fst (SpanIJPkg-spectral pkg v)

SpanIJPkg-const-inv : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 v вҶ’ ConstVec12 (f v)
SpanIJPkg-const-inv pkg v = fst (snd (SpanIJPkg-spectral pkg v))

SpanIJPkg-sum0-eigen : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (f v) (scaleVec12в„Ө (SpanIJPkg-a pkg) v)
SpanIJPkg-sum0-eigen pkg v = fst (snd (snd (SpanIJPkg-spectral pkg v)))

SpanIJPkg-const-eigen : {f : Op} вҶ’ (pkg : SpanIJSpectralPackage f) вҶ’ (c : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (f (constVec12в„Ө c))
         (scaleVec12в„Ө ((SpanIJPkg-a pkg) +в„Ө twelveTimesв„Ө (SpanIJPkg-b pkg)) (constVec12в„Ө c))
SpanIJPkg-const-eigen pkg c = snd (snd (snd (SpanIJPkg-spectral pkg (constVec12в„Ө c)))) c
\end{code}


\section{Unified Span Transport Package}
\label{sec:span-ij:unified-transport-package}

The unified package collects the coefficient pair, the
pointwise equality, and both the operator and the
$\texttt{linIJ}$-level spectral facts into a single record.  The package is
forced because each component is fixed uniquely by the preceding
laws.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.14: unified span transport package
SpanIJUnifiedPackage : Op вҶ’ Set
SpanIJUnifiedPackage f =
  ОЈ SpanIJ (О» p вҶ’
    OpEq f (interpIJ p) Г—
    SpanOpSpectralFacts f (fst p) (snd p) Г—
    LinIJSpectralPackage (fst p) (snd p))

law14O-14-spanIJ-unified-package : (f : Op) вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f
law14O-14-spanIJ-unified-package f pkg =
  let
    p : SpanIJ
    p = SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg

    a : в„Ө
    a = fst p

    b : в„Ө
    b = snd p

    eq : OpEq f (interpIJ p)
    eq = SpanIJPkg-opEq pkg

    facts : SpanOpSpectralFacts f a b
    facts = law14O-11-spanIJ-transport f a b eq

    linPkg : LinIJSpectralPackage a b
    linPkg = law14O-10-linIJ-spectral-package a b
  in
  p , (eq , (facts , linPkg))

-- В§ Projections for SpanIJUnifiedPackage
SpanIJUpkg-coeffs : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJ
SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg = fst upkg

SpanIJUpkg-a : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ в„Ө
SpanIJUpkg-a upkg = fst (SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg)

SpanIJUpkg-b : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ в„Ө
SpanIJUpkg-b upkg = snd (SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg)

SpanIJUpkg-opEq : {f : Op} вҶ’ (upkg : SpanIJUnifiedPackage f) вҶ’ OpEq f (interpIJ (SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg))
SpanIJUpkg-opEq upkg = fst (snd upkg)

SpanIJUpkg-spectral : {f : Op} вҶ’ (upkg : SpanIJUnifiedPackage f) вҶ’ SpanOpSpectralFacts f (SpanIJUpkg-a upkg) (SpanIJUpkg-b upkg)
SpanIJUpkg-spectral upkg = fst (snd (snd upkg))

SpanIJUpkg-linIJ : {f : Op} вҶ’ (upkg : SpanIJUnifiedPackage f) вҶ’ LinIJSpectralPackage (SpanIJUpkg-a upkg) (SpanIJUpkg-b upkg)
SpanIJUpkg-linIJ upkg = snd (snd (snd upkg))

-- В§ Law 14O.15: unified span coefficients are forced unique
SpanIJUpkg-witness : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ ОЈ SpanIJ (О» p вҶ’ OpEq f (interpIJ p))
SpanIJUpkg-witness upkg = SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg , SpanIJUpkg-opEq upkg

law14O-15-unified-coeffs-unique : (f : Op) вҶ’ (uвӮҒ uвӮӮ : SpanIJUnifiedPackage f) вҶ’ SpanIJUpkg-coeffs uвӮҒ вүЎ SpanIJUpkg-coeffs uвӮӮ
law14O-15-unified-coeffs-unique f uвӮҒ uвӮӮ =
  law14N-2-image-witness-unique f (SpanIJUpkg-witness uвӮҒ) (SpanIJUpkg-witness uвӮӮ)
\end{code}


\section{Helper Coefficients}
\label{sec:span-ij:helper-coefficients}

The integer $12 \in \mathbb{Z}$ is definitional from
$\texttt{twelveTimesв„Ө}\;\texttt{oneв„Ө}$; its positivity witness
reduces to a constructor equation.  The following identities fix the coefficient forms
needed to identify the Laplacian inside the $(I,J)$-span.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Forced integer 12
twelveв„Ө : в„Ө
twelveв„Ө = twelveTimesв„Ө oneв„Ө

-- В§ Forced positivity witness for twelveв„Ө
twelveв„Ө-pos : ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ twelveв„Ө вүЎ +suc n)
twelveв„Ө-pos = (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc (suc zero))))))))))) , refl

-- В§ 12 on the left collapses to twelveTimes
twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө x
twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left x =
  trans
    (*в„Ө-twelveTimes-left oneв„Ө x)
    (cong twelveTimesв„Ө (*в„Ө-one-left x))

-- В§ Multiplication by (вҲ’1) collapses to additive negation
negOne-*в„Ө-left : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ (negв„Ө oneв„Ө) *в„Ө x вүЎ negв„Ө x
negOne-*в„Ө-left x =
  let
    neg1 = negв„Ө oneв„Ө

    dist : (neg1 +в„Ө oneв„Ө) *в„Ө x вүЎ (neg1 *в„Ө x) +в„Ө (oneв„Ө *в„Ө x)
    dist = *в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө neg1 oneв„Ө x

    sum0 : (neg1 +в„Ө oneв„Ө) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    sum0 = +в„Ө-inv-left oneв„Ө

    zeroMul : (neg1 +в„Ө oneв„Ө) *в„Ө x вүЎ 0в„Ө
    zeroMul = trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t *в„Ө x) sum0) (*в„Ө-zero-left x)

    eq0 : (neg1 *в„Ө x) +в„Ө (oneв„Ө *в„Ө x) вүЎ 0в„Ө
    eq0 = trans (sym dist) zeroMul

    eq1 : (neg1 *в„Ө x) +в„Ө x вүЎ 0в„Ө
    eq1 = trans (sym (cong (О» t вҶ’ (neg1 *в„Ө x) +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-one-left x))) eq0

    eq2 : (neg1 *в„Ө x) +в„Ө x вүЎ (negв„Ө x) +в„Ө x
    eq2 = trans eq1 (sym (+в„Ө-inv-left x))
  in
  +в„Ө-cancel-right (neg1 *в„Ө x) (negв„Ө x) x eq2
\end{code}


\section{Laplacian as a Forced \texorpdfstring{$(I,J)$}{(I,J)}-Span Element}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:as-span-element}

The K$_{12}$ Laplacian is identified as the concrete span element
$(12,\,-1)$.
Pointwise, $L_{12}\,v_i = 12\,v_i - \Sigma_{12}\,v$, which
matches $\texttt{linIJ}\;12\;(-1)\;v$ once the multiplication
lemmas collapse.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.4: LвӮҒвӮӮ is forced to equal (12В·I)+(вҲ’1)В·J
law14O-4-L-in-span : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (linIJ twelveв„Ө (negв„Ө oneв„Ө) v)
law14O-4-L-in-span v = eq0 , (eq1 , eq2)
  where
    s : в„Ө
    s = sum12в„Ө v

    neg1 = negв„Ө oneв„Ө

    rhs0 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’
      blockвӮҖ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
    rhs0 i =
      let
        pA : (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)
        pA = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)) (twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮҖ v i))

        pB : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
        pB = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө t) (negOne-*в„Ө-left s)
      in
      trans
        (blockвӮҖ-linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v i)
        (trans pA pB)

    rhs1 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’
      blockвӮҒ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
    rhs1 i =
      let
        pA : (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)
        pA = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)) (twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮҒ v i))

        pB : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
        pB = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө t) (negOne-*в„Ө-left s)
      in
      trans
        (blockвӮҒ-linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v i)
        (trans pA pB)

    rhs2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’
      blockвӮӮ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
    rhs2 i =
      let
        pA : (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)
        pA = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s)) (twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮӮ v i))

        pB : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө (neg1 *в„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s
        pB = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө t) (negOne-*в„Ө-left s)
      in
      trans
        (blockвӮӮ-linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v i)
        (trans pA pB)

    eq0 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҖ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i вүЎ blockвӮҖ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i
    eq0 i = trans (fst (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v) i) (sym (rhs0 i))

    eq1 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҒ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i вүЎ blockвӮҒ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i
    eq1 i = trans (fst (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v)) i) (sym (rhs1 i))

    eq2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮӮ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) i вүЎ blockвӮӮ (linIJ twelveв„Ө neg1 v) i
    eq2 i = trans (snd (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v)) i) (sym (rhs2 i))
\end{code}


\section{Laplacian Composition Closure}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:composition-closure}

The Laplacian, identified as the span element $(12,-1)$,
is closed under composition with every other span element
via the composition law 14N.3.  Composition closure eliminates any residual doubt
that the concrete Laplacian lies outside the forced span calculus.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.16: LвӮҒвӮӮ has forced span witness (12,вҲ’1)
LSpanIJ : SpanIJ
LSpanIJ = twelveв„Ө , (negв„Ө oneв„Ө)

law14O-16-L-span-witness : SpanIJSpectralPackage K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө
law14O-16-L-span-witness = LSpanIJ , (О» v вҶ’ law14O-4-L-in-span v)

-- В§ Law 14O.17: left composition by LвӮҒвӮӮ preserves span membership
law14O-17-L-compose-left-span : (f : Op) вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage (О» v вҶ’ K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (f v))
law14O-17-L-compose-left-span f pkg = p' , eq'
  where
    p : SpanIJ
    p = SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg

    p' : SpanIJ
    p' = mulSpanIJ LSpanIJ p

    fEq : OpEq f (interpIJ p)
    fEq = SpanIJPkg-opEq pkg

    eq' : OpEq (О» v вҶ’ K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (f v)) (interpIJ p')
    eq' v =
      let
        stepвӮҒ : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (f v)) (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (interpIJ p v))
        stepвӮҒ = K12Laplacian-cong (f v) (interpIJ p v) (fEq v)

        stepвӮӮ : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (interpIJ p v)) (interpIJ LSpanIJ (interpIJ p v))
        stepвӮӮ = law14O-4-L-in-span (interpIJ p v)

        stepвӮғ : Vec12Eq (interpIJ LSpanIJ (interpIJ p v)) (interpIJ p' v)
        stepвӮғ = law14N-3-IJ-compose-closed LSpanIJ p v
      in
      Vec12Eq-trans stepвӮҒ (Vec12Eq-trans stepвӮӮ stepвӮғ)

-- В§ Law 14O.18: right composition by LвӮҒвӮӮ preserves span membership
law14O-18-L-compose-right-span : (f : Op) вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage (О» v вҶ’ f (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
law14O-18-L-compose-right-span f pkg = p' , eq'
  where
    p : SpanIJ
    p = SpanIJPkg-coeffs pkg

    p' : SpanIJ
    p' = mulSpanIJ p LSpanIJ

    fEq : OpEq f (interpIJ p)
    fEq = SpanIJPkg-opEq pkg

    eq' : OpEq (О» v вҶ’ f (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (interpIJ p')
    eq' v =
      let
        stepвӮҒ : Vec12Eq (f (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (interpIJ p (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
        stepвӮҒ = fEq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)

        stepвӮӮ : Vec12Eq (interpIJ p (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (interpIJ p (interpIJ LSpanIJ v))
        stepвӮӮ = interpIJ-cong p (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (interpIJ LSpanIJ v) (law14O-4-L-in-span v)

        stepвӮғ : Vec12Eq (interpIJ p (interpIJ LSpanIJ v)) (interpIJ p' v)
        stepвӮғ = law14N-3-IJ-compose-closed p LSpanIJ v
      in
      Vec12Eq-trans stepвӮҒ (Vec12Eq-trans stepвӮӮ stepвӮғ)

-- В§ Law 14O.19: left composition by LвӮҒвӮӮ preserves unified packages
SpanIJUpkg-to-span : {f : Op} вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJSpectralPackage f
SpanIJUpkg-to-span upkg = SpanIJUpkg-coeffs upkg , SpanIJUpkg-opEq upkg

law14O-19-L-compose-left-unified : (f : Op) вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage (О» v вҶ’ K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (f v))
law14O-19-L-compose-left-unified f upkg =
  law14O-14-spanIJ-unified-package
    (О» v вҶ’ K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (f v))
    (law14O-17-L-compose-left-span f (SpanIJUpkg-to-span upkg))

-- В§ Law 14O.20: right composition by LвӮҒвӮӮ preserves unified packages
law14O-20-L-compose-right-unified : (f : Op) вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage f вҶ’ SpanIJUnifiedPackage (О» v вҶ’ f (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
law14O-20-L-compose-right-unified f upkg =
  law14O-14-spanIJ-unified-package
    (О» v вҶ’ f (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
    (law14O-18-L-compose-right-span f (SpanIJUpkg-to-span upkg))
\end{code}


\section{Forced Laplacian Eigenvalues}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:forced-eigenvalues}

The two Laplacian eigenvalues are direct consequences of the
span identification $(12,-1)$: sum-zero forces eigenvalue $12$,
constants force eigenvalue $0$.  These are the only two spectral actions that
survive on the forced invariant subspaces.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.5: sum-zero forces Laplacian eigenvalue 12
law14O-5-L-sum0-eigen12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө v)
law14O-5-L-sum0-eigen12 v sum0 =
  Vec12Eq-trans
    (law14O-4-L-in-span v)
    (law14O-2-linIJ-sum0-eigen twelveв„Ө (negв„Ө oneв„Ө) v sum0)

-- В§ Law 14O.6: constant vectors force Laplacian eigenvalue 0
law14O-6-L-const-eigen0 : (c : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (constVec12в„Ө c)) zeroVec12в„Ө
law14O-6-L-const-eigen0 = law14H-14-const-eigen0
\end{code}


\section{Laplacian Spectral Package}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:spectral-package}

The complete Laplacian spectral package bundles all forced spectral
behaviour into a single witness: span membership, drift
(sum of image is zero), JL-annihilation, sum-zero eigenvector
characterisation, image containment, and constant kernel.  The package adds no
new structure; it only collects the already-forced Laplacian facts.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.7: LвӮҒвӮӮ spectral package (7 components)
L12ConstKernel : Set
L12ConstKernel = (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (constVec12в„Ө x)) zeroVec12в„Ө

L12SpectralPackage : Vec12в„Ө вҶ’ Set
L12SpectralPackage v =
  (Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (linIJ twelveв„Ө (negв„Ө oneв„Ө) v)) Г—
  (sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г—
  (Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) zeroVec12в„Ө) Г—
  ((sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)) Г—
   (Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө)) Г—
  (Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
          (twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))) Г—
  L12ConstKernel

law14O-7-L-spectral-package : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v
law14O-7-L-spectral-package v =
  law14O-4-L-in-span v ,
  (law14H-8-sumL12-0 v ,
   (law14H-9-JL-zero v ,
    ((law14H-12-sum0-eigen12 v , law14H-13-eigen12вҶ’sum0 v) ,
     (law14H-16-imageвҠҶeigen12 v ,
      law14O-6-L-const-eigen0))))

-- В§ Projections for L12SpectralPackage
L12Pkg-span : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (linIJ twelveв„Ө (negв„Ө oneв„Ө) v)
L12Pkg-span pkg = fst pkg

L12Pkg-sumL0 : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ sum12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) вүЎ 0в„Ө
L12Pkg-sumL0 pkg = fst (snd pkg)

L12Pkg-JL0 : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) zeroVec12в„Ө
L12Pkg-JL0 pkg = fst (snd (snd pkg))

L12Pkg-sum0вҶ’eigen12 : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
L12Pkg-sum0вҶ’eigen12 pkg = fst (fst (snd (snd (snd pkg))))

L12Pkg-eigen12вҶ’sum0 : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ sum12в„Ө v вүЎ 0в„Ө
L12Pkg-eigen12вҶ’sum0 pkg = snd (fst (snd (snd (snd pkg))))

L12Pkg-imageвҠҶeigen12 : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (twelveVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
L12Pkg-imageвҠҶeigen12 pkg = fst (snd (snd (snd (snd pkg))))

L12Pkg-constKer : {v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ L12SpectralPackage v вҶ’ L12ConstKernel
L12Pkg-constKer pkg = snd (snd (snd (snd (snd pkg))))
\end{code}


\section{Eigen-Constraint Refinements}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:eigen-constraint-refinements}

The ``reverse direction'' facts from \hyperref[ch:triple-laplacian]{the Triple K$_4$ and K$_{12}$ spectral chapter}
are re-stated in the $\texttt{scaleVec12в„Ө}$ language of the $(I,J)$-span.  This
section removes the remaining mismatch between old operator notation and the
forced span normal form.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.21: scale-by-12 agrees with twelveVec12в„Ө
law14O-21-scale12вүЎtwelveVec12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
law14O-21-scale12вүЎtwelveVec12 v =
  (О» i вҶ’ twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮҖ v i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮҒ v i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left (blockвӮӮ v i)))

-- В§ Law 14O.22: scale-by-0 collapses to zeroVec12в„Ө
law14O-22-scale0вүЎzeroVec12 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө v) zeroVec12в„Ө
law14O-22-scale0вүЎzeroVec12 v =
  (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-zero-left (blockвӮҖ v i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-zero-left (blockвӮҒ v i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-zero-left (blockвӮӮ v i)))

-- В§ Law 14O.23: scale-form 12-eigenvectors force sum-zero
law14O-23-eigen12ScaleвҶ’sum0 : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө v) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v
law14O-23-eigen12ScaleвҶ’sum0 v eigen12Scale =
  let
    pkg : L12SpectralPackage v
    pkg = law14O-7-L-spectral-package v

    eigen12 : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
    eigen12 = Vec12Eq-trans eigen12Scale (law14O-21-scale12вүЎtwelveVec12 v)
  in
  L12Pkg-eigen12вҶ’sum0 {v = v} pkg eigen12

-- В§ Law 14O.24: scale-form 0-eigenvectors force 12В·v = J v
law14O-24-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveEqJ : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө v) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
law14O-24-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveEqJ v eigen0Scale =
  let
    L0 : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) zeroVec12в„Ө
    L0 = Vec12Eq-trans eigen0Scale (law14O-22-scale0вүЎzeroVec12 v)
  in
  law14H-15-L0вҶ’twelveEqJ v L0

-- В§ Law 14O.25: eigen-equation forces constraints for О»=12 or О»=0
law14O-25-eigen-constraints : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вҶ’
  ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v) Г—
  ((lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v))
law14O-25-eigen-constraints v lam eigen = sumPart , kernelPart
  where
    P : в„Ө вҶ’ Set
    P t = Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө t v)

    sumPart : (lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v
    sumPart eqО» = law14O-23-eigen12ScaleвҶ’sum0 v (subst P eqО» eigen)

    kernelPart : (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
    kernelPart eqО» = law14O-24-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveEqJ v (subst P eqО» eigen)

-- В§ Law 14O.26: J-images are forced constant
law14O-26-J-constVec : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
law14O-26-J-constVec v = (sum12в„Ө v) , ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) , ((О» _ вҶ’ refl) , (О» _ вҶ’ refl)))

-- В§ Law 14O.27: kernel constraint forces 12В·v to be constant
law14O-27-twelveEqJвҶ’twelveConst : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v) вҶ’ ConstVec12 (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
law14O-27-twelveEqJвҶ’twelveConst v twelveEqJ =
  let
    c : в„Ө
    c = sum12в„Ө v

    Jconst : Vec12Eq (J12Vec12в„Ө v) (constVec12в„Ө c)
    Jconst = snd (law14O-26-J-constVec v)
  in
  c , (Vec12Eq-trans twelveEqJ Jconst)

-- В§ Law 14O.28: scale-form 0-eigenvectors force 12В·v constant
law14O-28-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveConst : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө v) вҶ’ ConstVec12 (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
law14O-28-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveConst v eigen0Scale =
  law14O-27-twelveEqJвҶ’twelveConst v (law14O-24-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveEqJ v eigen0Scale)

-- В§ Law 14O.29: eigen-equation forces sum-zero (О»=12) and 12В·v constant (О»=0)
law14O-29-eigen-constraints-strong : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вҶ’
  ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v) Г—
  ((lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 (twelveVec12в„Ө v))
law14O-29-eigen-constraints-strong v lam eigen = sumPart , twelveConstPart
  where
    P : в„Ө вҶ’ Set
    P t = Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө t v)

    sumPart : (lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v
    sumPart eqО» = law14O-23-eigen12ScaleвҶ’sum0 v (subst P eqО» eigen)

    twelveConstPart : (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 (twelveVec12в„Ө v)
    twelveConstPart eqО» = law14O-28-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveConst v (subst P eqО» eigen)
\end{code}


\section{Torsion-Free Kernel Upgrade}
\label{sec:span-ij:torsion-free-kernel-upgrade}

The kernel constraint $12\!\cdot\!v = \mathbf{J}\,v$ forces
all coordinates to share the same $12$-multiple.
Once the positivity witness $12 = \texttt{+suc}\;11$ is supplied,
torsion-freeness eliminates all remaining coordinate freedom
and forces $v$ itself to be constant.  This is the step that collapses the
kernel witness from scaled constancy to actual constancy.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.30: 0-eigenvectors are forced constant (with positivity witness)
law14O-30-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const-assuming-twelvePos : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  ОЈ в„• (О» n вҶ’ twelveв„Ө вүЎ +suc n) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө v) вҶ’
  ConstVec12 v
law14O-30-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const-assuming-twelvePos v (n , twelvePos) eigen0Scale =
  c , (eq0 , (eq1 , eq2))
  where
    c : в„Ө
    c = blockвӮҖ v g0

    twelveEqJ : Vec12Eq (twelveVec12в„Ө v) (J12Vec12в„Ө v)
    twelveEqJ = law14O-24-eigen0ScaleвҶ’twelveEqJ v eigen0Scale

    -- Convert a coordinate equation 12В·x = ОЈ into twelveв„Ө*x = ОЈ
    toMul12 : (x s : в„Ө) вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө x вүЎ s вҶ’ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x вүЎ s
    toMul12 x s eq = trans (twelveв„Ө-*в„Ө-left x) eq

    -- From twelveв„Ө*x = twelveв„Ө*y, force x = y via torsion-freeness
    cancel12 : (x y : в„Ө) вҶ’ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x вүЎ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө y вҶ’ x вүЎ y
    cancel12 x y mulEq =
      let
        Q : в„Ө вҶ’ Set
        Q t = t *в„Ө x вүЎ t *в„Ө y
        mulEq' : (+suc n) *в„Ө x вүЎ (+suc n) *в„Ө y
        mulEq' = subst Q twelvePos mulEq

        diff : в„Ө
        diff = x +в„Ө negв„Ө y

        stepвӮҖ : (+suc n) *в„Ө diff +в„Ө ((+suc n) *в„Ө y) вүЎ ((+suc n) *в„Ө y)
        stepвӮҖ =
          trans
            (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө ((+suc n) *в„Ө y)) (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө (+suc n) x (negв„Ө y)))
            (trans
              (+в„Ө-assoc ((+suc n) *в„Ө x) ((+suc n) *в„Ө (negв„Ө y)) ((+suc n) *в„Ө y))
              (trans
                (cong (О» t вҶ’ ((+suc n) *в„Ө x) +в„Ө t)
                      (trans
                        (sym (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө (+suc n) (negв„Ө y) y))
                        (trans
                          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (+suc n) *в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left y))
                          (*в„Ө-zero-right (+suc n)))))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө 0в„Ө) mulEq')
                  (+в„Ө-zero-right ((+suc n) *в„Ө y)))))

        stepвӮҒ : ((+suc n) *в„Ө y) +в„Ө ((+suc n) *в„Ө diff) вүЎ ((+suc n) *в„Ө y)
        stepвӮҒ =
          trans
            (sym (+в„Ө-comm ((+suc n) *в„Ө diff) ((+suc n) *в„Ө y)))
            stepвӮҖ

        mulDiff0 : (+suc n) *в„Ө diff вүЎ 0в„Ө
        mulDiff0 = +в„Ө-cancel-left ((+suc n) *в„Ө y) ((+suc n) *в„Ө diff) stepвӮҒ

        diff0 : diff вүЎ 0в„Ө
        diff0 = *в„Ө-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zero n diff mulDiff0

        xy : x вүЎ y
        xy =
          let
            addY : (x +в„Ө negв„Ө y) +в„Ө y вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө y
            addY = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө y) diff0

            stepA : (x +в„Ө negв„Ө y) +в„Ө y вүЎ x
            stepA =
              trans
                (+в„Ө-assoc x (negв„Ө y) y)
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ x +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left y))
                  (+в„Ө-zero-right x))

            stepB : (x +в„Ө negв„Ө y) +в„Ө y вүЎ y
            stepB = trans addY (+в„Ө-zero-left y)
          in
          trans (sym stepA) stepB
      in
      xy

    sumVal : в„Ө
    sumVal = sum12в„Ө v

    eq0 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҖ v i вүЎ c
    eq0 i =
      let
        sx : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) вүЎ sumVal
        sx = fst twelveEqJ i

        sc : twelveTimesв„Ө c вүЎ sumVal
        sc = fst twelveEqJ g0

        mulEq : twelveв„Ө *в„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) вүЎ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө c
        mulEq = trans (toMul12 (blockвӮҖ v i) sumVal sx) (sym (toMul12 c sumVal sc))
      in
      cancel12 (blockвӮҖ v i) c mulEq

    eq1 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҒ v i вүЎ c
    eq1 i =
      let
        sx : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) вүЎ sumVal
        sx = fst (snd twelveEqJ) i

        sc : twelveTimesв„Ө c вүЎ sumVal
        sc = fst twelveEqJ g0

        mulEq : twelveв„Ө *в„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) вүЎ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө c
        mulEq = trans (toMul12 (blockвӮҒ v i) sumVal sx) (sym (toMul12 c sumVal sc))
      in
      cancel12 (blockвӮҒ v i) c mulEq

    eq2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮӮ v i вүЎ c
    eq2 i =
      let
        sx : twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) вүЎ sumVal
        sx = snd (snd twelveEqJ) i

        sc : twelveTimesв„Ө c вүЎ sumVal
        sc = fst twelveEqJ g0

        mulEq : twelveв„Ө *в„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) вүЎ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө c
        mulEq = trans (toMul12 (blockвӮӮ v i) sumVal sx) (sym (toMul12 c sumVal sc))
      in
      cancel12 (blockвӮӮ v i) c mulEq
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Eigenvalue Classification Without Positivity Witness.}
The positivity witness is discharged by direct construction,
yielding the stand-alone classification: any eigenvector
for eigenvalue 0 is necessarily constant.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-k12:eigen-constraints-final}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.31: 0-eigenvectors are forced constant (no extra witness)
law14O-31-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө 0в„Ө v) вҶ’
  ConstVec12 v
law14O-31-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const v eigen0Scale =
  law14O-30-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const-assuming-twelvePos v twelveв„Ө-pos eigen0Scale

-- В§ Law 14O.32: eigen-equation forces sum-zero (О»=12) and const (О»=0)
law14O-32-eigen-constraints-final : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вҶ’
  ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v) Г—
  ((lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 v)
law14O-32-eigen-constraints-final v lam eigen = sumPart , constPart
  where
    P : в„Ө вҶ’ Set
    P t = Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө t v)

    sumPart : (lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҶ’ ZeroSumVec12 v
    sumPart eqО» = law14O-23-eigen12ScaleвҶ’sum0 v (subst P eqО» eigen)

    constPart : (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) вҶ’ ConstVec12 v
    constPart eqО» = law14O-31-eigen0ScaleвҶ’const v (subst P eqО» eigen)
\end{code}


\section{Eigenvalue Exhaustion}
\label{sec:laplacian-k12:eigenvalue-exhaustion}

The earlier laws force the constraints for $\lambda=12$ and $\lambda=0$;
here we force that any eigen-equation can only occur with
$\lambda=12$, $\lambda=0$, or with the zero vector.
The key ingredient is the Laplacian's commutativity with scaling
and torsion-freeness over $\mathbb{Z}$.  Every further eigenvalue candidate is
eliminated as incoherent.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-k12:eigenvalue-exhaustion}

\begin{code}
-- В§ scaleVec12 congruence and associativity
scaleVec12-cong : (a : в„Ө) вҶ’ {u v : Vec12в„Ө} вҶ’ Vec12Eq u v вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө a u) (scaleVec12в„Ө a v)
scaleVec12-cong a eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (fst eq i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (fst (snd eq) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ cong (О» t вҶ’ a *в„Ө t) (snd (snd eq) i)))

scaleVec12-assoc : (a b : в„Ө) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө a (scaleVec12в„Ө b v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө (a *в„Ө b) v)
scaleVec12-assoc a b v =
  (О» i вҶ’ sym (*в„Ө-assoc a b (blockвӮҖ v i))) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ sym (*в„Ө-assoc a b (blockвӮҒ v i))) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ sym (*в„Ө-assoc a b (blockвӮӮ v i)))
  )

-- В§ Law 14O.33: Laplacian commutes with scaleVec12в„Ө
law14O-33-L-scale : (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v))
law14O-33-L-scale lam v = eq0 , (eq1 , eq2)
  where
    s : в„Ө
    s = sum12в„Ө v

    sScale : sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вүЎ lam *в„Ө s
    sScale = sum12-scaleVec12в„Ө lam v

    sNegScale : negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) вүЎ negв„Ө (lam *в„Ө s)
    sNegScale = cong negв„Ө sScale

    rhsBlock : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’
      lam *в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө s) вүЎ twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө x) +в„Ө negв„Ө (lam *в„Ө s)
    rhsBlock x =
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-right-+в„Ө lam (twelveTimesв„Ө x) (negв„Ө s))
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө (lam *в„Ө negв„Ө s)) (*в„Ө-twelveTimes-right lam x))
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө x) +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-neg-right lam s)))

    eq0 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҖ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ blockвӮҖ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i
    eq0 i =
      let
        lhsBridge : blockвӮҖ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ
                    twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
        lhsBridge = fst (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i

        stepвӮҒ :
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
            вүЎ
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (lam *в„Ө s)
        stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө t) sNegScale

        rhsBridge : blockвӮҖ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i вүЎ
                    lam *в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҖ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s)
        rhsBridge = cong (О» z вҶ’ lam *в„Ө z) (fst (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v) i)
      in
      trans lhsBridge (trans stepвӮҒ (trans (sym (rhsBlock (blockвӮҖ v i))) (sym rhsBridge)))

    eq1 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҒ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ blockвӮҒ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i
    eq1 i =
      let
        lhsBridge : blockвӮҒ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ
                    twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
        lhsBridge = fst (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))) i

        stepвӮҒ :
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
            вүЎ
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (lam *в„Ө s)
        stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө t) sNegScale

        rhsBridge : blockвӮҒ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i вүЎ
                    lam *в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮҒ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s)
        rhsBridge = cong (О» z вҶ’ lam *в„Ө z) (fst (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v)) i)
      in
      trans lhsBridge (trans stepвӮҒ (trans (sym (rhsBlock (blockвӮҒ v i))) (sym rhsBridge)))

    eq2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮӮ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ blockвӮӮ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i
    eq2 i =
      let
        lhsBridge : blockвӮӮ (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) i вүЎ
                    twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
        lhsBridge = snd (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))) i

        stepвӮҒ :
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (sum12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
            вүЎ
          twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө (lam *в„Ө s)
        stepвӮҒ = cong (О» t вҶ’ twelveTimesв„Ө (lam *в„Ө blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө t) sNegScale

        rhsBridge : blockвӮӮ (scaleVec12в„Ө lam (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) i вүЎ
                    lam *в„Ө (twelveTimesв„Ө (blockвӮӮ v i) +в„Ө negв„Ө s)
        rhsBridge = cong (О» z вҶ’ lam *в„Ө z) (snd (snd (law14H-6-L-twelve-minus-J v)) i)
      in
      trans lhsBridge (trans stepвӮҒ (trans (sym (rhsBlock (blockвӮӮ v i))) (sym rhsBridge)))

-- В§ Law 14O.34: nonzero scalar has no torsion on Vec12в„Ө
scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (+suc n) v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө
scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n v eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮҖ v i) (fst eq i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮҒ v i) (fst (snd eq) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮӮ v i) (snd (snd eq) i)))

scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec : (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (-suc n) v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө
scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n v eq =
  (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮҖ v i) (fst eq i)) ,
  ((О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮҒ v i) (fst (snd eq) i)) ,
   (О» i вҶ’ *в„Ө-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zero n (blockвӮӮ v i) (snd (snd eq) i)))

-- В§ Helper: О»вҲ’12=0 forces О»=12
lamMinusTwelve0вҶ’lamEqTwelve : (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’ lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө вҶ’ lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө
lamMinusTwelve0вҶ’lamEqTwelve lam eq =
  let
    eq' : (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) +в„Ө twelveв„Ө вүЎ 0в„Ө +в„Ө twelveв„Ө
    eq' = cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө twelveв„Ө) eq

    lhsReduce : (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) +в„Ө twelveв„Ө вүЎ lam
    lhsReduce =
      trans
        (+в„Ө-assoc lam (negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) twelveв„Ө)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ lam +в„Ө t) (+в„Ө-inv-left twelveв„Ө))
          (+в„Ө-zero-right lam))
  in
  trans (sym lhsReduce) (trans eq' (+в„Ө-zero-left twelveв„Ө))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 3: Scale Equation and Eigenvalue Dichotomy.}
If $\lambda \cdot w = 12 \cdot w$ then $(\lambda - 12) \cdot w = 0$.
Combined with torsion-freedom, this forces $\lambda \in \{0, 12\}$
or $w = 0$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Helper: О»В·w = 12В·w implies (О»вҲ’12)В·w = 0
scaleEqвҶ’scaleDiff0 : (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’ (w : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) w) zeroVec12в„Ө
scaleEqвҶ’scaleDiff0 lam w eq = eq0 , (eq1 , eq2)
  where
    mk : (x : в„Ө) вҶ’ lam *в„Ө x вүЎ twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x вҶ’ (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) *в„Ө x вүЎ 0в„Ө
    mk x e =
      let
        inv : lam *в„Ө x +в„Ө negв„Ө (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x) вүЎ 0в„Ө
        inv = trans (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„Ө negв„Ө (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x)) e) (+в„Ө-inv-right (twelveв„Ө *в„Ө x))
      in
      trans
        (*в„Ө-distrib-left-+в„Ө lam (negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) x)
        (trans
          (cong (О» t вҶ’ (lam *в„Ө x) +в„Ө t) (*в„Ө-neg-left twelveв„Ө x))
          inv)

    eq0 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҖ (scaleVec12в„Ө (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) w) i вүЎ blockвӮҖ zeroVec12в„Ө i
    eq0 i = mk (blockвӮҖ w i) (fst eq i)

    eq1 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮҒ (scaleVec12в„Ө (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) w) i вүЎ blockвӮҒ zeroVec12в„Ө i
    eq1 i = mk (blockвӮҒ w i) (fst (snd eq) i)

    eq2 : (i : Fin4) вҶ’ blockвӮӮ (scaleVec12в„Ө (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө) w) i вүЎ blockвӮӮ zeroVec12в„Ө i
    eq2 i = mk (blockвӮӮ w i) (snd (snd eq) i)

-- В§ Inspect pattern for case-splitting on computed values
data Inspect {A : Set} (x : A) : Set where
  reveal : (y : A) вҶ’ x вүЎ y вҶ’ Inspect x

inspect : {A : Set} (x : A) вҶ’ Inspect x
inspect x = reveal x refl

-- В§ Law 14O.35: eigen-equation forces О»вҲҲ{0,12} or zero vector
law14O-35-eigenvalue-exhaustion : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вҶ’
  ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҠҺ (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө)) вҠҺ (Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө)
law14O-35-eigenvalue-exhaustion v lam eigen with inspect (lam +в„Ө negв„Ө twelveв„Ө)
... | reveal 0в„Ө eq = injвӮҒ (injвӮҒ (lamMinusTwelve0вҶ’lamEqTwelve lam eq))
... | reveal (+suc n) eq =
  let
    w : Vec12в„Ө
    w = scaleVec12в„Ө lam v

    LL : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
    LL = K12Laplacian-cong (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) eigen

    eqLamW : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w)
    eqLamW =
      let
        left : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w)
        left =
          Vec12Eq-trans
            (law14H-11-LL-twelveL v)
            (Vec12Eq-trans
              (Vec12Eq-sym (law14O-21-scale12вүЎtwelveVec12 (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)))
              (scaleVec12-cong twelveв„Ө eigen))

        right : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w)
        right = Vec12Eq-trans (law14O-33-L-scale lam v) (scaleVec12-cong lam eigen)

        both : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w)
        both = Vec12Eq-trans (Vec12Eq-sym left) (Vec12Eq-trans LL right)
      in
      Vec12Eq-sym both

    diff0 : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (+suc n) w) zeroVec12в„Ө
    diff0 = subst (О» t вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө t w) zeroVec12в„Ө) eq (scaleEqвҶ’scaleDiff0 lam w eqLamW)

    w0 : Vec12Eq w zeroVec12в„Ө
    w0 = scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n w diff0
  in
  caseLam lam w0
  where
    caseLam : (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҠҺ (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө)) вҠҺ (Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө)
    caseLam lam w0 with lam
    ... | 0в„Ө = injвӮҒ (injвӮӮ refl)
    ... | +suc m = injвӮӮ (scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec m v w0)
    ... | -suc m = injвӮӮ (scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec m v w0)

... | reveal (-suc n) eq =
  let
    w : Vec12в„Ө
    w = scaleVec12в„Ө lam v

    LL : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v))
    LL = K12Laplacian-cong (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) eigen

    eqLamW : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w)
    eqLamW =
      let
        left : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w)
        left =
          Vec12Eq-trans
            (law14H-11-LL-twelveL v)
            (Vec12Eq-trans
              (Vec12Eq-sym (law14O-21-scale12вүЎtwelveVec12 (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v)))
              (scaleVec12-cong twelveв„Ө eigen))

        right : Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v)) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w)
        right = Vec12Eq-trans (law14O-33-L-scale lam v) (scaleVec12-cong lam eigen)

        both : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө twelveв„Ө w) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam w)
        both = Vec12Eq-trans (Vec12Eq-sym left) (Vec12Eq-trans LL right)
      in
      Vec12Eq-sym both

    diff0 : Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (-suc n) w) zeroVec12в„Ө
    diff0 = subst (О» t вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө t w) zeroVec12в„Ө) eq (scaleEqвҶ’scaleDiff0 lam w eqLamW)

    w0 : Vec12Eq w zeroVec12в„Ө
    w0 = scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n w diff0
  in
  caseLam lam w0
  where
    caseLam : (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’ Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) вҠҺ (lam вүЎ 0в„Ө)) вҠҺ (Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө)
    caseLam lam w0 with lam
    ... | 0в„Ө = injвӮҒ (injвӮӮ refl)
    ... | +suc m = injвӮӮ (scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec m v w0)
    ... | -suc m = injвӮӮ (scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec m v w0)
\end{code}


\section{Corrected Ausschlussgesetz}
\label{sec:reals:corrected-ausschlussgesetz}

The eigenvalue exhaustion (\hyperref[law:laplacian-k12:eigenvalue-exhaustion]{Law~14O.35}) combines with the forced
constraint laws (\hyperref[law:laplacian-k12:eigen-constraints-final]{Law~14O.32}) to produce the unique coherent
eigenvector classification: $\lambda=12$ forces sum-zero,
$\lambda=0$ forces constant, and every other $\lambda$ forces
the zero vector.  The final exclusion law is packaged with no
surviving branch left open.

\phantomsection\label{law:laplacian-k12:eigen-classification}

\begin{code}
-- В§ Law 14O.36: corrected Ausschlussgesetz (exhaustion + constraints)
law14O-36-eigen-classification : (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’ (lam : в„Ө) вҶ’
  Vec12Eq (K12LaplacianVec12в„Ө v) (scaleVec12в„Ө lam v) вҶ’
  ((lam вүЎ twelveв„Ө) Г— ZeroSumVec12 v) вҠҺ (((lam вүЎ 0в„Ө) Г— ConstVec12 v) вҠҺ (Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө))
law14O-36-eigen-classification v lam eigen with law14O-35-eigenvalue-exhaustion v lam eigen
... | injвӮҒ (injвӮҒ lam12) =
  injвӮҒ (lam12 , fst (law14O-32-eigen-constraints-final v lam eigen) lam12)
... | injвӮҒ (injвӮӮ lam0) =
  injвӮӮ (injвӮҒ (lam0 , snd (law14O-32-eigen-constraints-final v lam eigen) lam0))
... | injвӮӮ v0 =
  injвӮӮ (injвӮӮ v0)

-- В§ Bundled torsion-freeness pair for Vec12в„Ө
scaleVec12_nonzero_left_zero_to_zeroVec :
  (n : в„•) вҶ’ (v : Vec12в„Ө) вҶ’
  (Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (+suc n) v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө)
  Г— (Vec12Eq (scaleVec12в„Ө (-suc n) v) zeroVec12в„Ө вҶ’ Vec12Eq v zeroVec12в„Ө)
scaleVec12_nonzero_left_zero_to_zeroVec n v =
  scaleVec12-pos-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n v , scaleVec12-neg-left-zeroвҶ’zeroVec n v
\end{code}

The rational measurement layer expresses the spectral content exactly. Quotients, distances, finite-index operators, coupled and triple K$_4$ Laplacians, word algebra, and rational order describe the combinatorial data without leaving gaps at the level of explicit calculation. The graph evaluation $\mathcal{C} = 137$ is computed as a Simplex-Euler invariant in Chapter~\ref{ch:rational-numbers-measurement}; the spectral eigenvalues $\{0, 4\}$ of $K_4$ are determined; and the $3{:}1$ eigenspace split is a forced structural consequence of the four-vertex completion. These numbers emerge from the graph. What the remaining chapters establish is that they cannot emerge from any other source.

What remains is not another finite algebraic law but closure itself. Once the metric structure is explicit, Cauchy data that does not settle inside $\mathbb{Q}$ must be given a legitimate home. The next step is therefore forced completion: the passage from rational measurement to the reals.

Figure~\ref{fig:q-to-r-closure} fixes that transition in one glance. Rational points do not disappear; they embed as constant sequences. What changes is that the metric space is no longer allowed to leak Cauchy processes that have nowhere to land. The closure adds precisely those limit points the rational layer could approach but not contain.

\begin{figure}[h]
\centering
\resizebox{\linewidth}{!}{%
\begin{tikzpicture}[>=Latex, node distance=3.0cm]
  \node[concept] (q) {$\mathbb{Q}$\\rational data};
  \node[derives, right=3.6cm of q] (seq) {Cauchy\\sequences};
  \node[concept, right=3.8cm of seq] (r) {$\mathbb{R}$\\closure};

  \draw[flow] (q) -- node[label, above] {constant embedding $\,\mathbb{Q}\to\mathbb{R}$} (seq);
  \draw[flow] (seq) -- node[label, above] {quotient by asymptotic equivalence} (r);

  \node[rectangle, rounded corners=1mm, draw=fdBlue, thick, fill=fdLight, below=1.5cm of seq] (eps) {tails cluster below every $\varepsilon > 0$};
  \draw[->, thick, fdGray] (eps.north) -- (seq.south);

  \draw[dashed, thick, fdRed] ($(q.north)+(0.25,0.35)$) to[bend left=18] node[label, above] {incomplete metric} ($(r.north)+(-0.25,0.35)$);
\end{tikzpicture}%
}
\caption{Forced Cauchy closure: $\mathbb{Q}$ embeds as constant sequences, while the missing limits of rational Cauchy data are closed inside $\mathbb{R}$.}
\label{fig:q-to-r-closure}
\end{figure}


%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
\chapter{Reals as Forced Cauchy Closure over \texorpdfstring{$\mathbb{Q}$}{Q}}
\label{ch:reals-cauchy}
%в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

\begin{quote}
The metric on $\mathbb{Q}$ is incomplete, so Cauchy data cannot remain inside
$\mathbb{Q}$ without loss.  The reals are therefore forced as the Cauchy
closure, with arithmetic and order lifted pointwise through explicit
preservation proofs.  Every later real operation and law is fixed by that
single closure step, with no additional parameters.
\end{quote}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Cauchy condition and the real number type}
\label{sec:reals:cauchy-condition-real-type}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

A sequence is Cauchy when, for every rational tolerance~$\varepsilon > 0$,
all sufficiently late terms cluster within~$\varepsilon$ of each other.
A real number is a sequence carrying a proof of this condition.
The embedding~$\mathbb{Q} \hookrightarrow \mathbb{R}$ sends each rational
to the constant sequence, whose Cauchy proof is immediate from
\texttt{distв„ҡ-const<Оө}.  What follows fixes the only admissible entry point
from rational metric data to real closure.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Cauchy condition: eventual Оө-clustering
record IsCauchy (seq : в„• вҶ’ в„ҡ) : Set where
  field
    cauchy : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө) вҶ’ ОЈ в„• (О» N вҶ’ (m n : в„•) вҶ’ N вүӨ m вҶ’ N вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq m) (seq n) <в„ҡ Оө)

-- В§ Type alias for Cauchy predicate
IsCauchyP : (в„• вҶ’ в„ҡ) вҶ’ Set
IsCauchyP = IsCauchy

-- В§ Real number: sequence + Cauchy proof
record в„қ : Set where
  constructor mkв„қ
  field
    seq : в„• вҶ’ в„ҡ
    isCauchy : IsCauchy seq

open в„қ public

-- В§ Rational embedding: constant sequences
в„ҡtoв„қ : в„ҡ вҶ’ в„қ
в„ҡtoв„қ q = mkв„қ (О» _ вҶ’ q) record
  { cauchy = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» m n _ _ вҶ’ distв„ҡ-const<Оө q Оө Оөpos)
  }
\end{code}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Real equivalence and symmetry}
\label{sec:reals:real-equivalence-symmetry}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Without an equivalence relation, Cauchy sequences are merely sequences: distinct as data, indistinguishable as limits.  The passage from sequences to real numbers demands a quotient, and the quotient demands a relation that is reflexive, symmetric, and transitive.  Once the rational metric is in place, the only relation that captures "same limit" is asymptotic distance elimination: two sequences are equivalent when their pointwise distance is eventually below every positive~$\varepsilon$.

The quotient relation on Cauchy data is forced here: two representatives may describe the same real only when their rational distance is eventually eliminated at every positive scale. Symmetry then removes the residual orientation freedom, since the witnessing distance is already fixed by the symmetry law for \texttt{distв„ҡ}.

\textbf{Constraint:} Equivalent sequences must have vanishing pointwise distance at every positive scale, or the quotient would identify sequences with distinct limits.

\textbf{Construction:} Any identification weaker than pointwise $\varepsilon$-convergence fails to separate distinct limits; any identification stronger collapses sequences that converge to the same value. The only surviving relation is $x \simeq_{\mathbb{R}} y$ iff for every $\varepsilon > 0$ there exists $N$ such that $\texttt{distв„ҡ}(x_n, y_n) < \varepsilon$ for all $n \geq N$.  Symmetry follows from $\texttt{distв„ҡ-sym}$.

\textbf{Consequence:} The equivalence relation is locked.  Reflexivity and transitivity are inherited from the metric; symmetry is proved below.  No weaker or stronger identification survives.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Real equivalence: difference converges to 0
infix 4 _вүғв„қ_

record _вүғв„қ_ (x y : в„қ) : Set where
  field
    conv0 : (Оө : в„ҡ) вҶ’ (0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оө) вҶ’ ОЈ в„• (О» N вҶ’ (n : в„•) вҶ’ N вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n) <в„ҡ Оө)

-- В§ Symmetry of real equivalence
вүғв„қ-sym : {x y : в„қ} вҶ’ x вүғв„қ y вҶ’ y вүғв„қ x
вүғв„қ-sym {x} {y} xвүғy = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      let
        pack : ОЈ в„• (О» N вҶ’ (n : в„•) вҶ’ N вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n) <в„ҡ Оө)
        pack = _вүғв„қ_.conv0 xвүғy Оө Оөpos

        N : в„•
        N = fst pack

        conv : (n : в„•) вҶ’ N вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n) <в„ҡ Оө
        conv = snd pack
      in
      N , (О» n NвүӨn вҶ’
        let
          swap : distв„ҡ (seq y n) (seq x n) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n)
          swap = distв„ҡ-sym (seq y n) (seq x n)

          dвүӨ : distв„ҡ (seq y n) (seq x n) вүӨв„ҡ distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n)
          dвүӨ = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ (seq y n) (seq x n)} {distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n)} swap
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ (seq y n) (seq x n)} {distв„ҡ (seq x n) (seq y n)} {Оө} dвүӨ (conv n NвүӨn))
  }
\end{code}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Addition on \texorpdfstring{$\mathbb{R}$}{R}}
\label{sec:reals:addition}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

The Cauchy closure carries sequences, but sequences without operations are inert.  If addition is not extended from~$\mathbb{Q}$ to~$\mathbb{R}$, the real field never forms, and the later spectral constants have no additive home.  The extension is forced to be pointwise: any other rule would sever the sum from the underlying rational terms and destroy the Cauchy property that defines the closure.

Addition on $\mathbb{R}$ is forced to be the pointwise lift of rational addition: any other operation would detach the real structure from the Cauchy witnesses that generate it. The proof eliminates instability by quartering $\varepsilon$, pulling Cauchy moduli from both summands, and collapsing the total distance through \texttt{distв„ҡ-triangle} together with the two translation laws for \texttt{distв„ҡ}.

\textbf{Constraint:} Two Cauchy error budgets must be merged without overflow.

\textbf{Construction:} Quarter $\varepsilon$ to eliminate cross-term overflow, extract moduli independently from each summand, and drive the total distance below~$\varepsilon$ via the triangle inequality. Any coarser budget allocation fails the Cauchy condition.

\textbf{Consequence:} Real addition is the unique Cauchy-compatible pointwise lift.  No alternative survives.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Real addition with Cauchy preservation via Оө-quartering
_+в„қ_ : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ
x +в„қ y = mkв„қ (О» n вҶ’ seq x n +в„ҡ seq y n) record
  { cauchy = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      let
        -- В§ Phase 1: Budget allocation
        Оөq : в„ҡ
        Оөq = ОөQuarter Оө

        ОөqPos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оөq
        ОөqPos = ОөQuarter-pos Оө

        -- В§ Phase 2: Independent Cauchy moduli
        cxPack = IsCauchy.cauchy (isCauchy x) Оөq ОөqPos
        cyPack = IsCauchy.cauchy (isCauchy y) Оөq ОөqPos

        CxN : в„•
        CxN = fst cxPack

        CyN : в„•
        CyN = fst cyPack

        cx : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ CxN вүӨ m вҶ’ CxN вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n) <в„ҡ Оөq
        cx = snd cxPack

        cy : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ CyN вүӨ m вҶ’ CyN вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq y m) (seq y n) <в„ҡ Оөq
        cy = snd cyPack

        -- В§ Phase 3: Global modulus N
        N : в„•
        N = CxN +в„• CyN

        CxNвүӨN : CxN вүӨ N
        CxNвүӨN =
          let
            step : (CxN +в„• zero) вүӨ (CxN +в„• CyN)
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = CyN} zвүӨn CxN
          in
          subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (CxN +в„• CyN)) (+в„•-zero-right CxN) step

        CyNвүӨN : CyN вүӨ N
        CyNвүӨN =
          let
            step : (CyN +в„• zero) вүӨ (CyN +в„• CxN)
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = CxN} zвүӨn CyN

            base : CyN вүӨ (CyN +в„• CxN)
            base = subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (CyN +в„• CxN)) (+в„•-zero-right CyN) step
          in
          subst (О» t вҶ’ CyN вүӨ t) (+в„•-comm CyN CxN) base

        Оөq+Оөq<Оө : (Оөq +в„ҡ Оөq) <в„ҡ Оө
        Оөq+Оөq<Оө = ОөQuarter-double<Оө Оө Оөpos

        ОөqNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ Оөq
        ОөqNonneg = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {0в„ҡ} {Оөq} ОөqPos
      in
      N , (О» m n NвүӨm NвүӨn вҶ’
        let
          -- в”Җв”Җ Phase 4: Propagate N to both moduli в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
          CxвүӨm : CxN вүӨ m
          CxвүӨm = вүӨ-trans CxNвүӨN NвүӨm

          CxвүӨn : CxN вүӨ n
          CxвүӨn = вүӨ-trans CxNвүӨN NвүӨn

          CyвүӨm : CyN вүӨ m
          CyвүӨm = вүӨ-trans CyNвүӨN NвүӨm

          CyвүӨn : CyN вүӨ n
          CyвүӨn = вүӨ-trans CyNвүӨN NвүӨn

          dx : в„ҡ
          dx = distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n)

          dy : в„ҡ
          dy = distв„ҡ (seq y m) (seq y n)

          dx<Оөq : dx <в„ҡ Оөq
          dx<Оөq = cx m n CxвүӨm CxвүӨn

          dy<Оөq : dy <в„ҡ Оөq
          dy<Оөq = cy m n CyвүӨm CyвүӨn

\end{code}

The threshold propagation settles the bookkeeping first.  Once both sequences are controlled at the same modulus floor, the remaining argument can only collapse through the triangle inequality; there is no second route left.

\begin{code}

          -- В§ Phase 5: Triangle inequality collapse
          dxвүӨОөq : dx вүӨв„ҡ Оөq
          dxвүӨОөq = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {dx} {Оөq} dx<Оөq

          dyвүӨОөq : dy вүӨв„ҡ Оөq
          dyвүӨОөq = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {dy} {Оөq} dy<Оөq

          dxNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ dx
          dxNonneg = distв„ҡ-nonneg (seq x m) (seq x n)

          dyNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ dy
          dyNonneg = distв„ҡ-nonneg (seq y m) (seq y n)

          d1 : в„ҡ
          d1 = distв„ҡ ((seq x m) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y m))

          d2 : в„ҡ
          d2 = distв„ҡ ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y n))

          d1вүӨdx : d1 вүӨв„ҡ dx
          d1вүӨdx = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {d1} {dx} (distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-right (seq x m) (seq x n) (seq y m))

          d2вүӨdy : d2 вүӨв„ҡ dy
          d2вүӨdy = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {d2} {dy} (distв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-left (seq x n) (seq y m) (seq y n))

          d1вүӨОөq : d1 вүӨв„ҡ Оөq
          d1вүӨОөq = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {d1} {dx} {Оөq} d1вүӨdx dxвүӨОөq

          d2вүӨОөq : d2 вүӨв„ҡ Оөq
          d2вүӨОөq = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {d2} {dy} {Оөq} d2вүӨdy dyвүӨОөq

          d1Nonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ d1
          d1Nonneg = distв„ҡ-nonneg ((seq x m) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y m))

          d2Nonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ d2
          d2Nonneg = distв„ҡ-nonneg ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y n))

          sumвүӨ : (d1 +в„ҡ d2) вүӨв„ҡ (Оөq +в„ҡ Оөq)
          sumвүӨ = вүӨв„ҡ-sumвүӨdouble-nonneg d1 d2 Оөq d1Nonneg d2Nonneg ОөqNonneg d1вүӨОөq d2вүӨОөq

          sum<Оө : (d1 +в„ҡ d2) <в„ҡ Оө
          sum<Оө = вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {(d1 +в„ҡ d2)} {(Оөq +в„ҡ Оөq)} {Оө} sumвүӨ Оөq+Оөq<Оө

          tri : distв„ҡ ((seq x m) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y n)) вүӨв„ҡ (d1 +в„ҡ d2)
          tri = distв„ҡ-triangle ((seq x m) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y n))
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ ((seq x m) +в„ҡ (seq y m)) ((seq x n) +в„ҡ (seq y n))} {(d1 +в„ҡ d2)} {Оө} tri sum<Оө)
  }
\end{code}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Negation, subtraction, and constants}
\label{sec:reals:negation-subtraction-constants}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Once addition has entered the closure, negation is forced by the demand for additive inverses: without negation, the reals would be a monoid rather than a group, and the later additive algebra laws would have no cancellation target.  The key enabler is that the rational metric is already sign-invariant (\texttt{distв„ҡ-neg}), so negating every term of a Cauchy sequence preserves the Cauchy property without any additional $\varepsilon$-budget.

Negation must preserve real structure because the rational metric is invariant under sign reversal through \texttt{distв„ҡ-neg}. Subtraction therefore has no separate freedom beyond addition with negation, and the distinguished constants $0_{\mathbb{R}}$ and $1_{\mathbb{R}}$ are forced as the direct images of the corresponding rational constants.

\textbf{Constraint:} Subtraction must decompose as addition-with-negation so that no independent Cauchy proof is needed.

\textbf{Construction:} Pointwise rational negation is the only operation whose Cauchy proof inherits from $\texttt{distв„ҡ-neg}$ without additional witness data. Any alternative negation either breaks the Cauchy property or fails to invert addition. Subtraction reduces to $x + (-y)$; the constants $0$ and $1$ embed as constant sequences.

\textbf{Consequence:} The additive group structure is complete.  No further algebraic primitive is needed until multiplication.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Real negation via distв„ҡ-neg
-в„қ_ : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ
-в„қ x = mkв„қ (О» n вҶ’ -в„ҡ (seq x n)) record
  { cauchy = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      let
        pack = IsCauchy.cauchy (isCauchy x) Оө Оөpos
        N : в„•
        N = fst pack
        cx = snd pack
      in
      N , (О» m n NвүӨm NвүӨn вҶ’
        let
          dвүғ : distв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (seq x m)) (-в„ҡ (seq x n)) вүғв„ҡ distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n)
          dвүғ = distв„ҡ-neg (seq x m) (seq x n)

          dвүӨ : distв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (seq x m)) (-в„ҡ (seq x n)) вүӨв„ҡ distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n)
          dвүӨ = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (seq x m)) (-в„ҡ (seq x n))} {distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n)} dвүғ
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ (-в„ҡ (seq x m)) (-в„ҡ (seq x n))} {distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n)} {Оө} dвүӨ (cx m n NвүӨm NвүӨn))
  }

-- В§ Real subtraction
_-в„қ_ : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ
x -в„қ y = x +в„қ (-в„қ y)

-- В§ Zero and one in в„қ
0в„қ : в„қ
0в„қ = в„ҡtoв„қ 0в„ҡ

1в„қ : в„қ
1в„қ = в„ҡtoв„қ 1в„ҡ
\end{code}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Additive algebra laws}
\label{sec:reals:additive-algebra-laws}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

With addition, negation, and the distinguished constants in place, the additive algebra must now be shown to obey the same laws as $\mathbb{Q}$---commutativity, associativity, identity, and inverse.  If any of these failed, the real field would diverge from the rational one it was built to complete, and the later spectral identities could not be transported from $\mathbb{Q}$ to~$\mathbb{R}$.

The additive algebra on $\mathbb{R}$ cannot differ from the rational algebra already fixed pointwise on representatives. Each law is forced by the same elimination pattern: take threshold $N = 0$, invoke the corresponding rational identity, and collapse the resulting distance to zero via \texttt{distв„ҡ-вүғ0}.

\textbf{Constraint:} Every additive law must hold up to $\simeq_{\mathbb{R}}$, not merely pointwise, so that the laws descend to the quotient.

\textbf{Construction:} For each law, the Cauchy threshold collapses to $N = 0$: the corresponding rational identity eliminates all distance between the two sides at every index. No finite-prefix correction survives.

\textbf{Consequence:} Commutativity, associativity, identity, and inverse are forced.  The additive group is an abelian group over~$\mathbb{R}$.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Commutativity of real addition
+в„қ-comm : (x y : в„қ) вҶ’ (x +в„қ y) вүғв„қ (y +в„қ x)
+в„қ-comm x y = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» n _ вҶ’
        let
          p : в„ҡ
          p = seq x n +в„ҡ seq y n

          q : в„ҡ
          q = seq y n +в„ҡ seq x n

          pqвүғ : p вүғв„ҡ q
          pqвүғ = +в„ҡ-comm (seq x n) (seq y n)

          dвүғ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүғ0 = distв„ҡ-вүғ0 pqвүғ

          dвүӨ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүӨв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүӨ0 = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} dвүғ0
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} {Оө} dвүӨ0 Оөpos)
  }

-- В§ Associativity of real addition
+в„қ-assoc : (x y z : в„қ) вҶ’ ((x +в„қ y) +в„қ z) вүғв„қ (x +в„қ (y +в„қ z))
+в„қ-assoc x y z = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» n _ вҶ’
        let
          p : в„ҡ
          p = (seq x n +в„ҡ seq y n) +в„ҡ seq z n

          q : в„ҡ
          q = seq x n +в„ҡ (seq y n +в„ҡ seq z n)

          pqвүғ : p вүғв„ҡ q
          pqвүғ = +в„ҡ-assoc (seq x n) (seq y n) (seq z n)

          dвүғ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүғ0 = distв„ҡ-вүғ0 pqвүғ

          dвүӨ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүӨв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүӨ0 = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} dвүғ0
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} {Оө} dвүӨ0 Оөpos)
  }

-- В§ Right identity for real addition
+в„қ-zero-right : (x : в„қ) вҶ’ (x +в„қ 0в„қ) вүғв„қ x
+в„қ-zero-right x = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» n _ вҶ’
        let
          p : в„ҡ
          p = seq x n +в„ҡ 0в„ҡ

          q : в„ҡ
          q = seq x n

          pqвүғ : p вүғв„ҡ q
          pqвүғ = +в„ҡ-zero-right (seq x n)

          dвүғ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүғ0 = distв„ҡ-вүғ0 pqвүғ

          dвүӨ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүӨв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүӨ0 = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} dвүғ0
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} {Оө} dвүӨ0 Оөpos)
  }

-- В§ Left identity for real addition
+в„қ-zero-left : (x : в„қ) вҶ’ (0в„қ +в„қ x) вүғв„қ x
+в„қ-zero-left x = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» n _ вҶ’
        let
          p : в„ҡ
          p = 0в„ҡ +в„ҡ seq x n

          q : в„ҡ
          q = seq x n

          pqвүғ : p вүғв„ҡ q
          pqвүғ = +в„ҡ-zero-left (seq x n)

          dвүғ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүғ0 = distв„ҡ-вүғ0 pqвүғ

          dвүӨ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүӨв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүӨ0 = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} dвүғ0
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} {Оө} dвүӨ0 Оөpos)
  }

-- В§ Right inverse for real addition
+в„қ-inv-right : (x : в„қ) вҶ’ (x +в„қ (-в„қ x)) вүғв„қ 0в„қ
+в„қ-inv-right x = record
  { conv0 = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      zero , (О» n _ вҶ’
        let
          p : в„ҡ
          p = seq x n +в„ҡ (-в„ҡ (seq x n))

          q : в„ҡ
          q = 0в„ҡ

          pqвүғ : p вүғв„ҡ q
          pqвүғ = +в„ҡ-inv-right (seq x n)

          dвүғ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүғв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүғ0 = distв„ҡ-вүғ0 pqвүғ

          dвүӨ0 : distв„ҡ p q вүӨв„ҡ 0в„ҡ
          dвүӨ0 = вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} dвүғ0
        in
        вүӨ<в„ҡвҶ’<в„ҡ {distв„ҡ p q} {0в„ҡ} {Оө} dвүӨ0 Оөpos)
  }
\end{code}


%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
\section{Eventual boundedness and multiplication}
\label{sec:reals:eventual-boundedness-multiplication}
%в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Cauchy closure, once created, cannot remain a purely additive object.
If multiplication is left outside the closure, the real field collapses
to a module over~$\mathbb{Q}$ and loses the self-interaction that every
later derived quantity depends on.  But admitting multiplication forces
a new constraint: the product of two convergent sequences need not
converge unless both factors are eventually bounded.  Boundedness is
therefore not an optional refinement; it is the gate through which
multiplication enters, and without it the Cauchy property of the product
cannot even be stated.

Multiplication cannot be admitted until eventual boundedness is extracted from every Cauchy representative, because product control requires fixed bounds on one factor while the other factor oscillation is eliminated. The proof first forces a tail bound by evaluating the Cauchy condition at $1_{\mathbb{Q}}$, then decomposes the product distance into two terms and drives each term below $\varepsilon/4$ by the same $\delta$-scaling discipline used throughout the metric development.

\textbf{Constraint:} Without bounded tails, the product distance
$|f_n g_n - f_m g_m|$ contains a term proportional to an unbounded
factor, so no uniform $\varepsilon$-control exists.

\textbf{Construction:} Extract a tail bound~$B$ from the Cauchy
condition at tolerance~$1$, eliminating unbounded growth beyond that tail. Then decompose the product distance via
the identity $fg - f'g' = f(g-g') + g'(f-f')$ and drive each summand
below~$\varepsilon/4$ using the bound and $\delta$-scaling. Any sequence without a finite tail bound is excluded.

\textbf{Consequence:} Multiplication enters $\mathbb{R}$ with its
Cauchy property locked to the same $\varepsilon$-quartering discipline
that governs addition.  No alternative entry survives.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Cauchy sequences are eventually bounded
IsCauchy-eventually-bounded :
  (f : в„• вҶ’ в„ҡ) вҶ’ IsCauchy f вҶ’
  ОЈ в„• (О» N вҶ’ ОЈ в„ҡ (О» B вҶ’ (n : в„•) вҶ’ N вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (f n) 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ B))
IsCauchy-eventually-bounded f ic =
  let
    pack = IsCauchy.cauchy ic 1в„ҡ 0в„ҡ<1в„ҡ
    N : в„•
    N = fst pack
    conv = snd pack

    B : в„ҡ
    B = distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ +в„ҡ 1в„ҡ
  in
  N , (B , (О» n NвүӨn вҶ’
    let
      d<1 : distв„ҡ (f n) (f N) <в„ҡ 1в„ҡ
      d<1 = conv n N NвүӨn (вүӨ-refl N)

      dвүӨ1 : distв„ҡ (f n) (f N) вүӨв„ҡ 1в„ҡ
      dвүӨ1 = <в„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡ {distв„ҡ (f n) (f N)} {1в„ҡ} d<1

      tri : distв„ҡ (f n) 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ (distв„ҡ (f n) (f N) +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)
      tri = distв„ҡ-triangle (f n) (f N) 0в„ҡ

      step : (distв„ҡ (f n) (f N) +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ) вүӨв„ҡ (1в„ҡ +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)
      step = вүӨв„ҡ-+в„ҡ-mono-right (distв„ҡ (f n) (f N)) 1в„ҡ (distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ) dвүӨ1

      comm : (1в„ҡ +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ) вүғв„ҡ B
      comm = +в„ҡ-comm 1в„ҡ (distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)
    in
    вүӨв„ҡ-trans {distв„ҡ (f n) 0в„ҡ} {(1в„ҡ +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)} {B}
      (вүӨв„ҡ-trans {distв„ҡ (f n) 0в„ҡ} {(distв„ҡ (f n) (f N) +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)} {(1в„ҡ +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)} tri step)
      (вүғв„ҡвҶ’вүӨв„ҡЛЎ {(1в„ҡ +в„ҡ distв„ҡ (f N) 0в„ҡ)} {B} comm)))
\end{code}

\paragraph{Step 2: Real Multiplication.}
\texttt{\ensuremath{\cdot_{\mathbb{R}}}} multiplies Cauchy sequences
pointwise. The Cauchy property of the product uses eventual boundedness
plus $\delta$-scaling to control the error.

\begin{code}
-- В§ Real multiplication with full Cauchy proof
_вӢ…в„қ_ : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ
x вӢ…в„қ y = mkв„қ (О» n вҶ’ seq x n *в„ҡ seq y n) record
  { cauchy = О» Оө Оөpos вҶ’
      let
        -- В§ Phase 1: Budget allocation
        Оөq : в„ҡ
        Оөq = ОөQuarter Оө

        ОөqPos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оөq
        ОөqPos = ОөQuarter-pos Оө

        -- В§ Phase 2: Eventual bounds on both factors
        bxPack = IsCauchy-eventually-bounded (seq x) (isCauchy x)
        byPack = IsCauchy-eventually-bounded (seq y) (isCauchy y)

        Nx : в„•
        Nx = fst bxPack

        Ny : в„•
        Ny = fst byPack

        Bx : в„ҡ
        Bx = fst (snd bxPack)

        By : в„ҡ
        By = fst (snd byPack)

        bxBound : (n : в„•) вҶ’ Nx вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x n) 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ Bx
        bxBound = snd (snd bxPack)

        byBound : (n : в„•) вҶ’ Ny вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq y n) 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ By
        byBound = snd (snd byPack)

        -- В§ Phase 3: Integer ceiling bounds
        BxNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ Bx
        BxNonneg =
          вүӨв„ҡ-trans {0в„ҡ} {distв„ҡ (seq x Nx) 0в„ҡ} {Bx}
            (distв„ҡ-nonneg (seq x Nx) 0в„ҡ)
            (bxBound Nx (вүӨ-refl Nx))

        ByNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ By
        ByNonneg =
          вүӨв„ҡ-trans {0в„ҡ} {distв„ҡ (seq y Ny) 0в„ҡ} {By}
            (distв„ҡ-nonneg (seq y Ny) 0в„ҡ)
            (byBound Ny (вүӨ-refl Ny))

        mx : в„•
        mx = fst (nonneg-bound-sucInt Bx BxNonneg)

        my : в„•
        my = fst (nonneg-bound-sucInt By ByNonneg)

        Ix : в„ҡ
        Ix = fromв„•в„Ө (suc mx) / oneвҒә

        Iy : в„ҡ
        Iy = fromв„•в„Ө (suc my) / oneвҒә

        BxвүӨIx : Bx вүӨв„ҡ Ix
        BxвүӨIx = snd (nonneg-bound-sucInt Bx BxNonneg)

        ByвүӨIy : By вүӨв„ҡ Iy
        ByвүӨIy = snd (nonneg-bound-sucInt By ByNonneg)

        IxNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ Ix
        IxNonneg = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {0в„ҡ} {Bx} {Ix} BxNonneg BxвүӨIx

        IyNonneg : 0в„ҡ вүӨв„ҡ Iy
        IyNonneg = вүӨв„ҡ-trans {0в„ҡ} {By} {Iy} ByNonneg ByвүӨIy

        -- В§ Phase 4: Оҙ-scaling
        dyPack = Оҙ-scale-suc Оөq ОөqPos mx
        dxPack = Оҙ-scale-suc Оөq ОөqPos my

        Оҙy : в„ҡ
        Оҙy = fst dyPack

        Оҙx : в„ҡ
        Оҙx = fst dxPack

        ОҙyPos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оҙy
        ОҙyPos = fst (snd dyPack)

        ОҙxPos : 0в„ҡ <в„ҡ Оҙx
        ОҙxPos = fst (snd dxPack)

        ОҙyIx<Оөq : (Оҙy *в„ҡ Ix) <в„ҡ Оөq
        ОҙyIx<Оөq = snd (snd dyPack)

        ОҙxIy<Оөq : (Оҙx *в„ҡ Iy) <в„ҡ Оөq
        ОҙxIy<Оөq = snd (snd dxPack)

        -- Cauchy moduli at Оҙx, Оҙy
        cxPack = IsCauchy.cauchy (isCauchy x) Оҙx ОҙxPos
        cyPack = IsCauchy.cauchy (isCauchy y) Оҙy ОҙyPos

        CxN : в„•
        CxN = fst cxPack

        CyN : в„•
        CyN = fst cyPack

        cx : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ CxN вүӨ m вҶ’ CxN вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq x m) (seq x n) <в„ҡ Оҙx
        cx = snd cxPack

        cy : (m n : в„•) вҶ’ CyN вүӨ m вҶ’ CyN вүӨ n вҶ’ distв„ҡ (seq y m) (seq y n) <в„ҡ Оҙy
        cy = snd cyPack

        -- В§ Phase 5: Global modulus N
        N : в„•
        N = Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN))

        NxвүӨN : Nx вүӨ N
        NxвүӨN =
          let
            step : (Nx +в„• zero) вүӨ (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = (Ny +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN))} zвүӨn Nx
          in
          subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))) (+в„•-zero-right Nx) step

        NyвүӨN : Ny вүӨ N
        NyвүӨN =
          let
            step : (Ny +в„• zero) вүӨ (Ny +в„• (Nx +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = (Nx +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN))} zвүӨn Ny

            base : Ny вүӨ (Ny +в„• (Nx +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))
            base = subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (Ny +в„• (Nx +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))) (+в„•-zero-right Ny) step

            rhsEq : (Ny +в„• (Nx +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN))) вүЎ (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)))
            rhsEq =
              trans
                (sym (+в„•-assoc Ny Nx (CxN +в„• CyN)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• (CxN +в„• CyN)) (+в„•-comm Ny Nx))
                  (+в„•-assoc Nx Ny (CxN +в„• CyN)))
          in
          subst (О» t вҶ’ Ny вүӨ t) rhsEq base

        CxNвүӨN : CxN вүӨ N
        CxNвүӨN =
          let
            step : (CxN +в„• zero) вүӨ (CxN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN)))
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN))} zвүӨn CxN

            base : CxN вүӨ (CxN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN)))
            base = subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (CxN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN)))) (+в„•-zero-right CxN) step

            rhsEq : (CxN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN))) вүЎ N
            rhsEq =
              trans
                (sym (+в„•-assoc CxN Nx (Ny +в„• CyN)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• (Ny +в„• CyN)) (+в„•-comm CxN Nx))
                  (trans
                    (+в„•-assoc Nx CxN (Ny +в„• CyN))
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ Nx +в„• t)
                      (trans
                        (sym (+в„•-assoc CxN Ny CyN))
                        (trans
                          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• CyN) (+в„•-comm CxN Ny))
                          (+в„•-assoc Ny CxN CyN))))))
          in
          subst (О» t вҶ’ CxN вүӨ t) rhsEq base

        CyNвүӨN : CyN вүӨ N
        CyNвүӨN =
          let
            step : (CyN +в„• zero) вүӨ (CyN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN)))
            step = вүӨ-+в„•-monoЛЎ {a = zero} {b = (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN))} zвүӨn CyN

            base : CyN вүӨ (CyN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN)))
            base = subst (О» t вҶ’ t вүӨ (CyN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN)))) (+в„•-zero-right CyN) step

            rhsEq : (CyN +в„• (Nx +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN))) вүЎ N
            rhsEq =
              trans
                (sym (+в„•-assoc CyN Nx (Ny +в„• CxN)))
                (trans
                  (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• (Ny +в„• CxN)) (+в„•-comm CyN Nx))
                  (trans
                    (+в„•-assoc Nx CyN (Ny +в„• CxN))
                    (cong (О» t вҶ’ Nx +в„• t)
                      (trans
                        (sym (+в„•-assoc CyN Ny CxN))
                        (trans
                          (cong (О» t вҶ’ t +в„• CxN) (+в„•-comm CyN Ny))
                          (trans
                            (+в„•-assoc Ny CyN CxN)
